body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120178876/585482575/-31663778?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.28_OTS-Nowhere-to-turn_B2_F1_S1_C1_NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg1NzE2Mi1iNmNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IxucZ6m_PDitg5sz1Qh0hOXBOPG0BVQVdH4KTA0xv0=) When I am being this direct, it’s for a reason. Fundraising has fallen off a cliff, and we’ve got a lot of work to do if we’re going to flip the Senate in 2026. But now it feels like everyone is back on the sidelines. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The lies just keep coming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9247%2E5257348%2EYiKSep ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Trump just can’t help himself. He can’t stop lying. He’s certainly never
been known for his integrity or his commitment to the truth, but it’s
getting more outrageous by the day.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=q42025_abs_em.bOXSWp&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9247%2E5257348%2EYiKSep ]Here are just ten of his most recent lies from a single interview. But
if you want to spare yourself the trouble of reading on, then I’ll cut
right to the chase: I’m asking for $10 to help me hold him accountable for
these lies.

1. Cost of living: He said that grocery prices are going down. If he
spent less time in his Golden Great Gatsby ballroom and more time in a
grocery store, he would know that prices are going up.
2. Inflation: Trump said Biden gave him the worst inflation rate in all
of US history. Nope. It was 3% in January when Trump took over, and
it’s 3% today. If you're curious what the worst inflation rate was:
27% in 1920.
3. Tariffs: Trump said countries like China are paying tariffs. In fact,
the costs of tariffs are paid by the U.S. importers and passed on to
you, the consumer.
4. AI and energy costs: Trump said he came up with the brilliant idea of
co-locating an artificial intelligence data center and power plant to
"make their own energy." Once again, nope. This is Donald Trump's
equivalent of saying that he invented the internet.
5. Fentanyl: Trump said that every attack on a fishing boat in the
Caribbean effectively saves 25,000 American lives. That's just absurd.
The area is not a fentanyl trafficking route. And if you add up all of
the loss of lives from all of the sources of drug overdoses, it would
amount to about 80 or 90,000 deaths, which is horrible, but nothing
near the scale that Trump has claimed every non-fentanyl carrying boat
has caused.
6. Wars: Trump said, again, that he has ended eight wars. Some of his
examples were Egypt and Ethiopia — which weren’t even at war — and
Kosovo, which didn’t even take place during his tenure in office.
7. Ukraine: Trump claimed Joe Biden provided $350 billion to Ukraine. I
mean, even if you got your degree from Trump University, the numbers
don't add up. In fact, the U.S. has spent about less than half of that
sum in Ukraine.
8. Democrats and the shutdown: Trump said Democrats were seeking $1.5
trillion to end the government shutdown. Completely bogus. What we
were seeking was to bring down the skyrocketing costs of health care
for Americans.
9. The Insurrection Act: Trump threatened again to use the Insurrection
Act to take over American cities, and said it was used by other
presidents as many as 28 times. That's just false. No president has
invoked the Act more than Ulysses S. Grant in the early 1800s, and he
did so six times.
10. Using the DOJ as a weapon: Trump said he did not instruct the
Department of Justice to go after his political enemies. We know of
course that he publicly called on Pam Bondi to go after three of his
enemies, including me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=q42025_abs_em.bOXSWp&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=9247%2E5257348%2EYiKSep ]These are just ten of his top lies in one interview. If you can, pitch
in $10 to help me continue calling them out.

donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, Trump just can’t help himself. He can’t stop lying. He’s certainly never been known for his integrity or his commitment to the truth, but it’s getting more outrageous by the day. [ ]Here are just ten of his most recent lies from a single interview. But if you want to spare yourself the trouble of reading on, then I’ll cut right to the chase: I’m asking for $10 to help me hold him accountable for these lies. 1. Cost of living: He said that grocery prices are going down. If he spent less time in his Golden Great Gatsby ballroom and more time in a grocery store, he would know that prices are going up. 2. Inflation: Trump said Biden gave him the worst inflation rate in all of US history. Nope. It was 3% in January when Trump took over, and it’s 3% today. If you're curious what the worst inflation rate was: 27% in 1920. 3. Tariffs: Trump said countries like China are paying tariffs. In fact, the costs of tariffs are paid by the U.S. importers and passed on to you, the consumer. 4. AI and energy costs: Trump said he came up with the brilliant idea of co-locating an artificial intelligence data center and power plant to "make their own energy." Once again, nope. This is Donald Trump's equivalent of saying that he invented the internet. 5. Fentanyl: Trump said that every attack on a fishing boat in the Caribbean effectively saves 25,000 American lives. That's just absurd. The area is not a fentanyl trafficking route. And if you add up all of the loss of lives from all of the sources of drug overdoses, it would amount to about 80 or 90,000 deaths, which is horrible, but nothing near the scale that Trump has claimed every non-fentanyl carrying boat has caused. 6. Wars: Trump said, again, that he has ended eight wars. Some of his examples were Egypt and Ethiopia — which weren’t even at war — and Kosovo, which didn’t even take place during his tenure in office. 7. Ukraine: Trump claimed Joe Biden provided $350 billion to Ukraine. I mean, even if you got your degree from Trump University, the numbers don't add up. In fact, the U.S. has spent about less than half of that sum in Ukraine. 8. Democrats and the shutdown: Trump said Democrats were seeking $1.5 trillion to end the government shutdown. Completely bogus. What we were seeking was to bring down the skyrocketing costs of health care for Americans. 9. The Insurrection Act: Trump threatened again to use the Insurrection Act to take over American cities, and said it was used by other presidents as many as 28 times. That's just false. No president has invoked the Act more than Ulysses S. Grant in the early 1800s, and he did so six times. 10. Using the DOJ as a weapon: Trump said he did not instruct the Department of Justice to go after his political enemies. We know of course that he publicly called on Pam Bondi to go after three of his enemies, including me. [ ]These are just ten of his top lies in one interview. subject: Help us finish strong

body:

| | | Hi null, we’re jumping into your inbox with one last update before tonight’s midnight deadline:

**We’re still $4,379 short of our $15,000 fundraising goal.** With national Republicans spending big to flip Michigan red, we cannot afford to fall behind.

If you’ve been waiting for the right time to chip in, this is it. **[Will you rush $5 now to power Haley’s fight for a fairer economy?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9883?amount=5&t=2&akid=1492%2E49239%2ECjxoCd)**

Here’s your personalized fundraising goal link:**[https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9741?c0=dpwillis67%40gmail.com.KE-76r&t;=4&akid;=1492%2E49239%2ECjxoCd](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9883?t=3&akid=1492%2E49239%2ECjxoCd)**

Team Haley

The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. Haley

name: James Carville
subject: I’m fuming — and you should be too
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss the Senate majority goodbye.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251128-9772&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9772%2E614464%2EEmSpIq)
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**
John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — just jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.
**[💥Before you read another word, split $10 or whatever you can between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to help Chris fight back right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251128-9772&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9772%2E614464%2EEmSpIq)**
Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**
This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**
He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the far-right’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.
Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **_cannot_** — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Split a contribution between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251128-9772&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9772%2E614464%2EEmSpIq)**
**[Split a donation now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251128-9772&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9772%2E614464%2EEmSpIq)**
I’m mad as HELL that this race just shifted in the wrong direction — but that means it’s time to get serious. Chris is the only one who can hold this seat, but he needs a hell of a lot more firepower to fend off what’s coming.
Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251128-9772&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9772%2E614464%2EEmSpIq)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=6&akid=9772%2E614464%2EEmSpIq).

body:

Peter,
All of Katie’s wins for California families have been because of grassroots supporters like you.

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: “It’s the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Sean Wilentz, a professor of American History at Princeton University, makes the stakes of the SAVE Act clear: “ It’s the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history .”
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it, but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in Congress start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112825_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112825_3&amount=25]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
PITCH IN $25 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE ACT NOW ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112825_3&amount=25]
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112825_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_3&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112825_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112825_3&amount=20]

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me.
body:
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251128-2.vT5K5L&refcode=em-20251128-2&t=1&akid=982%2E1086043%2EGyj8r5)
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
**[The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Wes Moore and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251128-2.vT5K5L&refcode=em-20251128-2&t=2&akid=982%2E1086043%2EGyj8r5)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251128-2.vT5K5L&amount=5&refcode=em-20251128-2&t=21&akid=982%2E1086043%2EGyj8r5)**
We will not give up the ship.
Mark Kelly
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251128-2.vT5K5L&refcode=em-20251128-2&t=22&akid=982%2E1086043%2EGyj8r5)

clean_body: The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say. When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since. If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work. I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution. Call this what it is: Political persecution. You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point. We will not give up the ship. Mark Kelly

body:

name: MGP
subject: We’ve come too far to slow down
body:
| | Peter – I know it’s a holiday weekend, so I’ll keep this short. This month’s numbers matter more than usual. National groups are already arguing that WA-03 is “ripe for pickup,” and they’re pouring money in early to make that happen.

Before the weekend gets away from you, will you chip in $10 to help us close the gap?

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/november](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120183733/585530651/-1425100085?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251128_2_7&refcode2=02b777bc-cccc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI3NzdiYy1jY2NjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cVMAQndtVaCqa0gwBLZ36Nd2xTTE7EBU1Xvs-uHwi0E=)

We’ve proved the experts wrong before by building a campaign rooted in real people – parents, farmers, small business owners, tradespeople, and folks who deserve a voice that isn’t for sale.

Let’s do it again.

Thanks for stepping up.

– Marie

name: Kristen Waggoner
subject: Defend freedom before it is too late
body:
There’s a sense right now—you can feel it—that something is shifting.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpga24v0v9fvttkgdbgno74v8c2lrs4rinfj6jc0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o35chh2bs)

## ****
Dear Friend of Freedom,

There's a sense right now--you can feel it--that something is shifting.

People are weary of censorship, weary of hostility to faith, weary of watching freedom bow to ideology.

Some call it a "vibe shift."

But a vibe shift alone will not sustain a nation.

A cultural moment is fragile. It doesn't pass laws, build institutions, or defend the next generation's rights.

That's why Alliance Defending Freedom exists--[to turn conviction into action and ensure that liberty endures in law.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv576rvlc4jskevm6ogqhfaa02k6gremgpcd6v20_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o35chh2bs)

**America now stands alone in the Western world, still upholding robust protections for religious liberty and free expression.**

* In the UK and Europe, Christians have been arrested for praying silently outside abortion facilities and criminally prosecuted for posting Bible verses on social media.

* In Mexico, current and former congressmen have been convicted of "gender based political violence" for speaking biological truth.

* And here at home, our freedoms often hang by a single vote at the Supreme Court.

**Freedom is not self-perpetuating. It must be defended --case by case, precedent by precedent, generation by generation.**

Your gift today helps ADF defend that freedom in the courtroom, protect those silenced for their faith, and secure lasting victories that no administration can undo.

Please make your gift before December 31. And right now, every dollar you give will be matched--dollar for dollar while matching funds last.

This moment will pass. But your action today can make freedom endure.

[Give now to defend freedom before the match expires.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi61g4t6euph82ncjmm3vqj6lj3sbgti524rnfb0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o35chh2bs)

May God give us the conviction to stand firm, the grace to speak truth in love, and the faith to defend the freedom that allows both truth and love to flourish.
With gratitude to God,

**Kristen Waggoner**
CEO, President & Chief Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom
---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

|
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ik5bbm1grped2cd68mdvgditaeq100ues2l3ig_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcg642k4iddrgovup1deck8apv9n1k4gdqu85218_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)
[Donate >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv1bj3eiifm4dasv0k8isunge9ar1osok41dosb0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ _skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_.”
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.”

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9n8fr78cjpjjpn0naabcbsf7j0o49jg5q2p2ki8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2imc49lvkh4be5a30t45bsu923vnokskdl67tk0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z86vauk7cml5db0dpqac1p1ivc8t69galq4dhido_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zao3etf47hd0ap8h3qe2hng3mp2rgfiq8j674ic8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkv1vd6ir40gqbrohash8cvn958com135g57t7ho_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeieqqqq3556he3dhgftgac85vu6e7opflo3odtg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zksgcq9fpjvt7obfd9k1v97gt40sntv5t3p52tno_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1peuq9a5nm6nump7pfkku92megcgj62b2v6rvgo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmf4rkihakbp0qp7v19rifp0vkaaueb9j5i1nhtg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O’Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society’s top student leaders.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb597uvfdqckdsm7h9n5dp94o7mf0n2a65lek4lo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvaj9gl9s71kaod3g3lurml9a1n7j7eu72c1ptm0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62o31c5h2bs)

Thank you,

James

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me. FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. Make no mistake: They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for. They failed. SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech. One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society. Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of The Fountainhead by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity. Which is why I am personally reaching out to you. I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country. I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before. So keep reading! My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways. Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s Atlas Shrugged or The Fountainhead? These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it. But they are 700+ pages long! Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me: Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today. So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers.” Skimmers: Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration. Swimmers: Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.” Deep Divers: They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate: Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR: Free market capitalism Rational self-interest Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST: Cancel Culture Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas * Big government I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount. As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000. Thank you for everything, James O’Keefe P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society’s top student leaders. These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity. Well, NOT these students. The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same. Thank you, James The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zugjlbs72khvsaot348nvb5lrq95rqq6vgagru6g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62p71cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2f8uknt4mdf4qli5k70h8g4rnghhn43n8daqslg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62p71cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0msco7mm8c6pdvjkgn1msttgoqasmilt7g8tmt0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62p71cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1lcq5tk69oddte3bcv2odnjnrpniejs1j0e4000_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62p71cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziqp7qvuhol4r50cbjlvvtl89j0s8t61608c5l48_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62p71cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuifcbhdidok1ekrdlnkcmm6itkaj8mclk8ao9tg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62p71cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8up8379o909v1k5o67c9h3oj257gpkadibmsa7g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62p71cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfbrlbh19qr66oomfhida8itdlm54lmenrmvrmbg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i62p71cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---

---

---

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5d2jnbtvbcbegbhibd3ftes0qnjcmhfdrjeh2i0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i61pb4c3h2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrhr3pd39nige87kgfaqkl5cs13kgqbu4j0hnrhg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i61pb4c3h2bs)
[Donate >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6f8d9pi6222i8eb1oceotdko4natfige8ere4jg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5i61pb4c3h2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ _skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_.”
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.”

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).

The new screen even shows you the time until empty, even if it's under 1 watt. Excellent redesign on the handle, as well as the slim lightweight solar panels too." Donald L. "I decided to buy the Patriot Power Generator with the solar panel and this thing is fantastic. Not only is the generator a great product, the 4Patriots customer service folks are fantastic, easy to work with, answer all your questions and make interactions very pleasant. It's a company I will order from again in the future. Thanks 4Patriots, and nice job on this product." Skip B. "You can run things like your refrigerator, your freezer, your television. All completely silent. No fumes. You can keep this in your house or your car, You can run it inside your house. There's no gas. There's no fumes. Which is great!" Greg R. "The Patriot Power Generator kept everything in my fridge and freezer properly chilled. Having the lights on to do other things while waiting for the power to come back on was quite nice as well. The next day, I daisy-chained the two solar panels together and recharged the generator for 8 hours in the open sunlight. With 4Patriots' easy pay plans, there is no reason to wait until the lights go out and wish you had pulled the trigger and made your purchase sooner." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017!" Gary R. "Very well built and does what it is advertised to do. I researched other solar generators and they were priced much higher than this one. I like being able to add an additional battery pack for more power and solar panels to increase recharge speed. I will be ordering those, too. I've never been disappointed. The generator was the cherry on top!" Linda S. "Storms can sneak up on you. Lights, flashlights, fans, the Patriot Power Generator 1200 can handle it all. And it doesn't have to be an emergency situation. Take it camping, play karaoke at a barbeque. I'm telling you, this is the perfect 'I love you and want you to stay safe' gift. Thank you, 4Patriots!"

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie showed us how we take back our culture for good
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt4eldj9a98hu9tb2125n29g0tonb98b2h74asfg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5h68oj6chh2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt1crgn93vaoa1utad14dkrcrk2kvnsudhed1k5o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5h68oj6chh2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5134qm4afqn222nf6bphbrmf6a3g4q7if65fm8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5h68oj6chh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_****today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z19nprp9gmd2qoasom3rtd579a21ajb2kvgm5tc8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5h68oj6chh2bs)
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhtspo8t83dbcbb0hr11fmfrbephnuqsmb6v89h8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5h68oj6chh2bs)
---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies.Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeapsub4nuqv4nqg239afoo010b82e6a88sge9gg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c5h68oj6chh2bs)

body:
(or from heaven if you look at it the way we do)
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018-Ru0K_sijlZLCaXjOhGvZUzi1Jwns5OBviROWBjiabIuia7X7p4ZKMtp9aiXAnyK-PmS2u3DdbXfu9GPgffM0MYrOFMOBJAupiGX1NfpRFGfnJXIii5SIIkdAy9aPaoPQ-UnBGun-ibBhdly1OkLT_scHfqBSIrvgv5aM2ipQ997oQIcg-TijoCfYBHaznTgwuAFe6EcJ8tYXxbZ_HAZ22r8Knr4kWqVk_RqFwgZpc=&c=avpaG06m2hpZOscYTyiuwq7jsdOnuUP0m_WMb000lhGBEtIcfjjhRA==&ch=l9Cl4j7BlZbAyJf5JuVJeIb7sTJKiCHE18u3VRa2UimSWn_EYunASw==)

Peter,
Lauren Boebert is among the most vulnerable Republicans in the entire nation.
Her personal life is in shambles and frequently explodes into public view.
She was forced to flee her old district and move hundreds of miles across Colorado after her grasp on the old one became untenable and is seen as a carpetbagger in the new one.
She just reported her lowest ever fundraising numbers last quarter, $110k, huge for a county dog catchers race but abysmal for a sitting member of Congress. And now even Trump is on the cusp of abandoning her.
And then there is what many are calling her problem from hell (or from heaven if you look at it the way we do 😇) her Democratic opponent:
Trisha Calvarese.
Boebert is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. In 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county.
She's vulnerable and can be easily beaten but only if we get the tidal wave of small dollar support that a challenge like this requires. [The best way you can help us is with a monthly contribution of $25, $10, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to beat Boebert, flip this seat, and take back the House for Democrats. clean_body: (or from heaven if you look at it the way we do) | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert is among the most vulnerable Republicans in the entire nation. Her personal life is in shambles and frequently explodes into public view. She was forced to flee her old district and move hundreds of miles across Colorado after her grasp on the old one became untenable and is seen as a carpetbagger in the new one. She just reported her lowest ever fundraising numbers last quarter, $110k, huge for a county dog catchers race but abysmal for a sitting member of Congress. And now even Trump is on the cusp of abandoning her. And then there is what many are calling her problem from hell (or from heaven if you look at it the way we do 😇) her Democratic opponent: Trisha Calvarese. Boebert is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. In 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county. She's vulnerable and can be easily beaten but only if we get the tidal wave of small dollar support that a challenge like this requires. == Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | Trisha could be the straw that breaks the camels back but only if we can get people to believe in her. Thank you. Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: War coming home
subject: MAGA pushes for predawn special forces raid on Dem candidate
body:
MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bK_9XJzb3AQ9-UqXJfHYueqh3iaQtmKfkzEOutEBKTkahwdKkxa6XeNORxA46l96_8JplFtLHlgQ4n3c3s45WEX04MbBWFN6yJx1dTY-diThQpjOfZd8AjlEkaQZDqG-rN2C5QocDGf_jkXe0oSTw2zxXrKQn1OiYRl742-6lpb8_hfakvaWy7otv78NL2xeB0uwKY74zekLD1WLnwgjBbZfKrsl-GmX&c=FzZBULedB0Fw_BiwKUERzhYNq40LvA6FCNfScbkyiK8fm4BwcYWp4Q==&ch=nxNUZbbQHLpv3BAzpuXMQAaDic02l4Bz4linBOH2qdpY8j_ouFrtgw==)
---
|
Peter,
The notorious Chicago area Broadview ICE facility is a blacksite that has served as the beating heart of Trump's Operation Midway Blitz which saw a national guard deployment to the city, the shooting down of innocent civilians, and a dragnet roundup that saw arrests of undocumented Chicagoans and black and brown US citizens alike.
Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared from this facility.
This is why this fall myself and hundreds of my peers gathered in front of the facility to protest against ICE and the Trump administration's fascist crackdown. In response ICE rammed a car through the crowd of protestors and tear gassed us. I was hit by the car as well as teargassed.
In response to the video I shared of ICE's crackdown against protestors, MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US citizen.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bK_9XJzb3AQ9-UqXJfHYueqh3iaQtmKfkzEOutEBKTkahwdKkxa6XeNORxA46l96_8JplFtLHlgQ4n3c3s45WEX04MbBWFN6yJx1dTY-diThQpjOfZd8AjlEkaQZDqG-rN2C5QocDGf_jkXe0oSTw2zxXrKQn1OiYRl742-6lpb8_hfakvaWy7otv78NL2xeB0uwKY74zekBM87x9CLtjxDjcqCWHtzr&c=FzZBULedB0Fw_BiwKUERzhYNq40LvA6FCNfScbkyiK8fm4BwcYWp4Q==&ch=nxNUZbbQHLpv3BAzpuXMQAaDic02l4Bz4linBOH2qdpY8j_ouFrtgw==)
---
What he called for is disgusting, unAmerican, and evidence of our gruesome foreign wars coming home to American soil.
The War on Terror has conditioned millions of Americans to think of Muslims as terrorists. And the answers to terrorists: solutions like pre-dawn special forces raids and Guantanamo style solitary confinement and suspension of habeas corpus.
I am fighting to end America's blood soaked foreign policy. The uptick in violence in our country, the militarization of our police, the dehumanization of non-white Americans, all of it can be traced back to what we've done abroad and now we are witnessing what happens when that violence inevitably comes home.
Because IL-09 is a deep blue seat MAGA knows that they can't win here with a GOP candidate. Instead, ultra-MAGA donors and donors to the Trump aligned AIPAC organization are pumping hundreds of thousands of dollars into my primary opponents campaign coffers in the hopes of having a Democrat in Congress who will collaborate, support Trump's wars, and do MAGA's bidding.
[We can't let MAGA neutralize this seat, we need to make sure Chicago elects a real Democrat who will fight the administration tooth and nail. Please can you rush a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 to ensure the real Democrat comes out on top in this primary?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bK_9XJzb3AQ9-UqXJfHYueqh3iaQtmKfkzEOutEBKTkahwdKkxa6XeNORxA46l96A7a9j2CDVTwGFiHbGFT2d5r1DYHGd6MN60RYFQkSSE-c7Gh3h07ixOnQiWhIn5tHKg5dwMvShEXHobs7C628VHiqKOt1_4XrLrWKPbxVTPIVV2uK64o2VXTwFf-isSaonXxZIX0Xc3IOBtV76rTAe98U0Refpvn3AybalhgEjRc=&c=FzZBULedB0Fw_BiwKUERzhYNq40LvA6FCNfScbkyiK8fm4BwcYWp4Q==&ch=nxNUZbbQHLpv3BAzpuXMQAaDic02l4Bz4linBOH2qdpY8j_ouFrtgw==)

Step into the holiday season with Snowfall and Steel Guitars -- a country Christmas experience that blends small-town warmth, heartfelt faith, and boot-stompin' cheer.

# Saturday, November 29, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1972, Atari launched [Pong](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwVssuIBdBoZIVbZ0aaV2QxiuYypsLHwdK336Kn2FrudI3_B_Xt3Vp5yW25uf0dJY3ILHlpEIq6O6z2vwS8C8-Z3KikupEevmgIM-CXEC46JP-eFUE-2ICCgbtKLvlBJKia6Z7NBpOQQ0EUSnoxk0mFH24IHLwDU3TbJPTQgwQvBOq5a_CDWIPkQZgucamOIYE5Xafpe00IRjfpQ71jaUucl2Ilo3Js8MLgwux3G0j7LTPuDzfy6ewsTk5c7k65jepy9YP37Muak2rkfKOW1dzxS_zT7lP5L-1eFu4TcAAP__B6BxEw), a simple table tennis-themed arcade game. It was the first commercially successful video game and helped establish the video game industry.****

Today’s _Flyover_ features a list of [60 unexpected destinations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhSAUQL8GNwxceagDQxe317Wj4clVaa5gALX-ffP6C91PzknO13N8Wk8-LJ92Q1PmOAa8MmEpmMaSjm2fbJiQsj1K3DHE5DDlEQQ8uJQc-tFZT_eoKmdmRMCmQiNbrZRUSupqNbPWVnSdUAiNhMYJ23eq7cUMXauFFpU3b5uU0Esp9EPVopPqJdvJNdNkxQOYEuh8ian-jj6UFWe644mpnuJWkVlL2TNrPhgMDIbrumqKJ-LPTjH5sLwpBsNiiTDd5HNhMLQaoGUw7GQnzPyOB79iKPyF5PFEbhNyH3hZkR_ZVsm4_fJEPuuWKbFs1tNfvfxr2WngNwAA___8v4CD) that challenge the idea of what America looks like, including Venetian-style mansions, glowing waterfalls, and even a Martian-style desert in Hawaii. Whether you're planning a future road trip or just daydreaming, this roundup is full of surprises. Today’s edition is a bit shorter than usual as our team takes time to enjoy the holiday with their families. We’ll be back with the full-length version on Monday.

Missed our Christmas Gift Guide yesterday? Check [it out here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7FuwyAUheGngS0RF65xPDB08ZauHRGGi02FjYVxorx9lS59gM7n6JP-r7u9u5TTNn-6lUyLxW70PDK1RtW2eq67d5unfLizlZ22UgPVw0ohuwvARQ42uJRfFnkwkUiS4mSg14iACJovJmhNk3KTvmnEflJAXRcQlYiTgiEGnsxbA5ADgNAdXsUNcILeB-W9E51kKCikVur1u6StLRTzqzyoXn1ZeTZLa_vB1AeTI5Pj3zyn2OYzBXr_mBx5NWF_ppzToXuGYl5dyr9G-1f4w8ifAAAA__9PPm1G). Take advantage of huge holiday savings during Amazon Cyber Week with today's sponsor, [Brad's Deals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbuunDAQhp_GdF7hC-ZQUERa0Z20Ka3BHlgnvhDbLCJPH7FZKXWU0p9H_z_65tun_gTnXVy_QsCxLklHPIrHWjHrmvewGYgGfYG9pg1jyhZz0bzlHWWM8kFbcP7UsrHjgshRNDiyXknJpGSqeYxDLwfV9lJ2PXSdkUv3IaTkEhQTajCsceOVxhgfGGtVJ2_tB5Mz640VxkDbcSJbtK6mfPueXKwPXPyZnphvJoXGj49at0LEF8InwqfjOG5zBlssgi_XCOHT7NNK-MRaCgF-pUi37ALSGSMurhZ6pp0GOGlMlf6I6aAwp70SMe016JL2bJCI-99maisQrq7fgNbtgYi7dWXzcL6xgbCBWyMR939s_aOVXk4IV0Y7-8oYXk8wP3VIFvy1Tt7xjR6Q7QoV37TJo90O570rqieyXQM4_7JV_-vEz5H_DgAA__93ZbzC).

## Trump to Cancel All Biden Autopen Decrees
President Trump said on Friday that [he will cancel every executive order](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMZ0jezEGChfX0OXaK5Gxl7AnYyOzSS5vf0r-_w3-eqQZffPnOl89Jcq3335Hx2uZMz7PhMxYZ673_Qg-B0ynv3M5MJcasZ4zKOik1hLGOXpKr9k00a2IgG2DTvfWGG2Mts3mFhtaUNAqq9dh0O1ofb_EtV8wLp0GbMi927SGUWtlO3NRgzaL7kNsQ_CqA2EURuJSL38LZd5wTa_ywHoJZW-S25iPU7S_BEwCJt5wo5TemYBpKzu-QQImH3fKdHL1TCULmDoL3TAO8qOU30y5UMQs8R-GO9MD5RdYwNRUF48npUSn7YVRt93TZ6bhH_32cPA_AAD__2uWgxo) former President Biden signed with an autopen instead of his own signature, claiming 92% of those orders are invalid. Trump alleged on Truth Social that [Biden’s staff illegally operated the autopen](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO8yAQBeDT4A6LIWPsFBR_4y5_u6WFYRyzwmABiZXbr5zNDbYbaaT39L2v23QzPvh4_2820nVJU6SjBKqV8lTzY9utiZZCMY-adoopO8plkkJ2HIDL6-SMD68JG6cXIkmXhjT0ChEQQTWrHgRZpQDU7Az0SiJeF-xw6ImGYUHXeH2mAcgrgFAdtmIAnKG37mKtEZ1kKMj5mnL7nXysKy3hlZ6UW5u2Jui11r2wyz8mRybH4zhaO5dTcf6ZHM-TyfGN4R8Nn72jyH81vPh7JMc_RCbHJmu3Hz4EX1TPUNw348O7rv5po6eWPwEAAP__mp58cQ), a mechanical device that reproduces signatures, without presidential approval, warning Biden could face perjury charges if he asserts he was involved. Auto-penned signatures historically have held full legal force when aides act under a president’s directive and have been used by chief executives for decades. [Biden signed 162 executive orders](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0b-O3CAQBvCnwd1aMPyxr6BItNru0qZELIxtEmwQ4LX89pEvSRHpunSjnz590sx8fzfvNsSwzd_sirpNyWx41IitYTGt7Gt2dnMYq91byril4rFUAxTkjbEbvBlvQzyN6LyeEAF5h5oNSggmBFPdopkfRy6fgKOiEtwwMQqU2wGkeHLnXBf01cYYvDFGlRQ9HZl4ssF57pylEoig6ENLpf-RwtYWnOKZXlh6l9Yu6qW1XAn_QuBB4HEcR58L1uBxc2e_u_rs0e8EHta_rlX8raItbiH8MQWM_vYTzyMVXwm_E1D_GnyG_A-WtBKQ8qu3Da_h_ttb-kwzlpq2qw8o5UAJKGcbzqmc8JH_m5UjARUartVkLCbbGQm_M0q7on0-QoyhqoEIOq82xI8btP963EvDrwAAAP__uMCnNw) during his presidency, and while it’s unclear how many used an autopen, presidents commonly revoke their predecessor’s directives.
## List: 60 Places You Won't Believe Are in the USA
Even if you're familiar with the United States, this list of [60 places you won’t believe are in the USA](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhSAUQL8GNwxceagDQxe317Wj4clVaa5gALX-ffP6C91PzknO13N8Wk8-LJ92Q1PmOAa8MmEpmMaSjm2fbJiQsj1K3DHE5DDlEQQ8uJQc-tFZT_eoKmdmRMCmQiNbrZRUSupqNbPWVnSdUAiNhMYJ23eq7cUMXauFFpU3b5uU0Esp9EPVopPqJdvJNdNkxQOYEuh8ian-jj6UFWe644mpnuJWkVlL2TNrPhgMDIbrumqKJ-LPTjH5sLwpBsNiiTDd5HNhMLQaoGUw7GQnzPyOB79iKPyF5PFEbhNyH3hZkR_ZVsm4_fJEPuuWKbFs1tNfvfxr2WngNwAA___8v4CD) offers some stunning surprises, from alien-looking badlands to a glittering array of man-made ice castles in Utah. The list ranges from the Mars-like landscapes that exist in the remote Summit District of Hawaii's Haleakala National Park to the Ca' d’Zan, a glittering residence inspired by the palazzos of Venice, built in the Roaring ‘20s. Springtime in Holland, Michigan, brings 5 million tulips that carpet the town, while winter in Yosemite features a waterfall glowing orange as it flows down El Capitan in February. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: An everyday man taps his credit card at the gas pump. He just tapped his credit card at the gas station terminal... | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | An everyday man taps his credit card at the gas pump. body:
#

Hey, it’s Jon Ossoff’s campaign team. **Before you close this email, we need you to know this:**
* The President is wielding the full weight of the federal government against his critics and political opponents.

* At the same time, his MAGA allies in Congress are desperately working to take health care from millions of Americans and cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations.

* And of course, Republicans (including Jon’s three opponents) are continuing to debase themselves, fawning over and praising Donald Trump like he’s some sort of monarch.

Here’s the thing: **Jon is the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won, and that means MAGA is going to pour hundreds of millions of dollars into this race to try to take him down.**
_So if you’re upset with what’s happening to our country right now and you’re ready to fight back, please chip in what you can before our end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight to support our team here in Georgia._
We mean this when we say it: **Together, we can win in Georgia. We can save the Republic.** `
Here’s your link to chip in: [**https://act.electjon.com/go/Nov29th**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251129-1-subs-a&t=1&akid=1154%2E5691347%2E9ozO58)
Thanks so much for your support ahead of our big deadline tomorrow night!
Team Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=2&akid=1154%2E5691347%2E9ozO58) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1154%2E5691347%2E9ozO58) if you'd like to unsubscribe.
