name: Douglas Carswell
subject: A very grateful immigrant’s Thanksgiving
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/happythanksgiving?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
This week, we celebrated Thanksgiving here in the United States. If you’re an American who’s grown up with the holiday your whole life, it’s easy to take it for granted. Speaking as an immigrant, let me tell you: there’s something genuinely magical about a country setting aside a national day simply to give thanks.
---
|
---
_I love the USA_
| Most nations have a national day, and like America’s July 4th, they’re often about celebrating independence.

France’s Bastille Day marks the occasion a mob stormed the Bastille (and committed all manner of atrocities). Japan’s marks the ascension of an emperor. England, Ireland and Scotland have national days for their patron saints – with the Scots sneaking in an extra national occasion, Burns Night, when they raise a glass or three to the poet Robert Burns.

Yet, I can’t think of any country besides America that dedicates a national holiday purely to gratitude. That, to me, says something beautiful about America.

Thanksgiving may have started as an English-style harvest festival - when getting the crops in before winter was literally a matter of life and death - but it has become something uniquely American: a day to gather with loved ones, count our blessings, and say thank you for the privilege of living in this country. As a relatively recent arrival, I find the tradition uplifting.

Here are just a few of the things I found myself especially grateful for this year:
1. **For America itself**
Every single day feels like Thanksgiving to me. I’ve now been in this country for 1,794 days, and I still don’t think I’ve woken up once without a quiet “Wow! I’m in America!”
2. **For the astonishing welcome my family has received**
Five years ago this week, I was starting to pack up in London, about to move to Mississippi - with my family to follow later. I arrived with only two suitcases, but we’ve been so warmly embraced since stepping off the ‘plane. People here didn’t just tolerate us - they opened their arms, their homes, and their hearts.
3. **For Mississippi**
This state is on the rise. In the five years I’ve lived here, there’s been more economic growth than in the previous fifteen combined. Drive around nearly any corner of Mississippi today and you’ll see good things happening.
4. **For the Mississippi Center for Public Policy**
We’re a small team, but we’re happy warriors who punch way above our weight. Team MCPP has helped deliver a string of major free-market reforms that are making life better for families across the state. I’m proud to be part of it.
5. **For American football**
I regret the decades I spent not knowing this sport existed. From high school Friday night lights to college games to even the NFL, no other game I know is as exhilarating. No other game I know can turn in an instant.
6. **For you**
If you’re reading this, you’re one of the more than 80,000 people who subscribe to our newsletter. None of the wins we celebrate would be possible without your encouragement, your ideas, and your support. So, from the bottom of my heart: thank you. You make everything we do worthwhile.

Happy Thanksgiving, from a very grateful immigrant in a very grateful state in the greatest republic on earth.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=dd2c790234&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=48e6862f0b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=48e6862f0b).

_Copyright © 2025 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

name: Tim Walz
subject: How you can support your community today
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter,
I hope you had an amazing Thanksgiving filled with good food and great times spent with family and friends!
If your inbox looks anything like mine, you’ve probably seen plenty of Black Friday emails this week. Today, I’d like to shift the focus to something a little closer to home — Small Business Saturday.
Today is a chance to support local stores in your community and make sure that they’re able to thrive!
It’s a great chance to grab some holiday gifts like a great read from your local bookstore or a gift card from your favorite neighborhood restaurant.
So join me shopping local today!
-Tim Walz

Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=1&akid=190%2E34582%2EsoBtVa)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=190%2E34582%2EsoBtVa)

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Pulling back the curtain for you
body:
|
#
Friend, I’m going to pull back the curtain a bit, because this is a critical moment for our campaign. **MI-08 just became “Seat 218,” the district that could decide which party controls the House next year. That news didn’t surprise me – we always knew this was a swing seat in a swing state – but it does raise the stakes for us.** And as you might know, MAGA groups have already come after me with nearly a million dollars in attack ads. With MI-08 now officially the tipping-point seat for control of Congress, we can expect those attacks to intensify. We’re still nearly a year out from Election Day, and they’re already trying to define this race before voters even tune in. **Here’s the truth:** In a district that could determine who controls Congress, we don’t have the option to sit back and hope things work out. We have to be prepared for whatever comes next. As of this morning, we’re falling a bit short of our November fundraising goal, and $3 from you would help get us back on track. clean_body: | Friend, I’m going to pull back the curtain a bit, because this is a critical moment for our campaign. MI-08 just became “Seat 218,” the district that could decide which party controls the House next year. That news didn’t surprise me – we always knew this was a swing seat in a swing state – but it does raise the stakes for us. And as you might know, MAGA groups have already come after me with nearly a million dollars in attack ads. With MI-08 now officially the tipping-point seat for control of Congress, we can expect those attacks to intensify. We’re still nearly a year out from Election Day, and they’re already trying to define this race before voters even tune in. Here’s the truth: In a district that could determine who controls Congress, we don’t have the option to sit back and hope things work out. We have to be prepared for whatever comes next. As of this morning, we’re falling a bit short of our November fundraising goal, and $3 from you would help get us back on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

This holiday season has been a clear reminder of how far Republicans have gone to make life more difficult for the American people.

From cutting food assistance and blocking SNAP benefits from being paid out during our government’s longest-ever shutdown to refusing to come to the table to ensure that healthcare premiums don’t skyrocket next year, Republicans have shown their true colors again and again.

To add insult to injury, the cost of groceries and holiday gifts is record high due to Trump’s tariffs. Under Republican control, we can’t catch a break – and they need to be held responsible.

[**Next year, critical midterm elections will determine control of the House, and it’s essential that we secure a Democratic majority in order to put a long-overdue check and balance on the White House. \-------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------
Peter,
My team and I have been working day and night for the last few months to stop what feels like constant attempts to dismantle and undermine our democracy.
They passed an egregious racial gerrymander in Texas and Missouri. Fights in Indiana and Ohio are on deck. It’s been a hectic few months to say the least. So I want to take a step back — and talk about why they’re so desperate to rewrite the rules of the next election.
**The Republicans are scared. Donald Trump is scared.** They’re worried that if the election is fair, they’re going to lose the House and their anti-democracy agenda will finally be put in check.
We fight for fairness for a reason. For us, fairness is an invaluable tool. If things are fair, Democrats win. We don’t need special treatment or a leg up. We win because we have better candidates, better policies, and better ideas.
[**If you’re with the NDRC in our fight for fairness, we need your support. This is an existential moment for our democracy, and what we do today will resonate for years to come. Make no mistake: Being committed to fairness does not mean being blind to reality.
This movement has a state-by-state strategy that deploys different tactics to combat unfairness in whatever form it takes. That allows our side to challenge unfair and illegal maps in the courts. We organize grassroots supporters to hold state lawmakers accountable. In California, we’re supporting responsible, temporary measures to respond to craven Republican power grabs. And throughout the country, we have kept our eyes on a 10-year plan to ensure we’re winning the most critical state-level elections for the future of our democracy.
**So even as we’re ready to push back against the new egregious gerrymanders coming down the pike, we’re also laser-focused on our long-term strategy to secure fairness. **
Because we know one thing for certain — Republicans are not going to suddenly give up and start playing fair. Texas Governor Greg Abbott swore the redistricting fight “could last years.” Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is demanding a redo of the 2020 Census to “award Florida what we’re entitled to.”
[**They’re not going to let up — so we’ve got to be ready for whatever it is they try to throw at us. clean_body: We need to keep tackling these urgent threats to democracy – together | Peter, {else}}A.G. Eric Holder isn’t mincing words about why Republicans are waging an all-out war to silence the voice of voters in Texas and across the country: They are terrified of the voters. After ripping away healthcare from millions of Americans and giving billions in tax handouts to the ultra-rich, Republicans know they’re deeply unpopular. But instead of offering up better ideas to voters, they’ve decided to gerrymander to strip power away from them. Enough is enough.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = \-------------------------Forwarded Message------------------------- Peter, My team and I have been working day and night for the last few months to stop what feels like constant attempts to dismantle and undermine our democracy. They passed an egregious racial gerrymander in Texas and Missouri. Fights in Indiana and Ohio are on deck. It’s been a hectic few months to say the least. So I want to take a step back — and talk about why they’re so desperate to rewrite the rules of the next election. The Republicans are scared. Donald Trump is scared. They’re worried that if the election is fair, they’re going to lose the House and their anti-democracy agenda will finally be put in check. We fight for fairness for a reason. For us, fairness is an invaluable tool. If things are fair, Democrats win. We don’t need special treatment or a leg up. We win because we have better candidates, better policies, and better ideas. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Make no mistake: Being committed to fairness does not mean being blind to reality. This movement has a state-by-state strategy that deploys different tactics to combat unfairness in whatever form it takes. That allows our side to challenge unfair and illegal maps in the courts. We organize grassroots supporters to hold state lawmakers accountable. In California, we’re supporting responsible, temporary measures to respond to craven Republican power grabs. And throughout the country, we have kept our eyes on a 10-year plan to ensure we’re winning the most critical state-level elections for the future of our democracy. So even as we’re ready to push back against the new egregious gerrymanders coming down the pike, we’re also laser-focused on our long-term strategy to secure fairness. Because we know one thing for certain — Republicans are not going to suddenly give up and start playing fair. Texas Governor Greg Abbott swore the redistricting fight “could last years.” Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is demanding a redo of the 2020 Census to “award Florida what we’re entitled to.” = Peter, you’re a critical part of this effort — thank you for never giving up on our movement. Sincerely, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. | | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)

| | Fellow Conservative, **As you already know, the holiday season is officially _here_.** Schedules are getting messy, inboxes are filling up, and everything is moving at double speed. But here's the truth: **The issues we 're fighting for aren't taking a holiday break.** Of course, the Democrats aren't slowing down- to them, nothing is more important than destroying President Trump's America First agenda and returning to their far-left quest for domination, while most Republicans don't obsess over politics all the time- sadly, that gives Democrats a twisted advantage... Right now, you can help us in a big way. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming fast -- whether we're ready or not... _If we fall short, we lose ground we can 't easily get back..._ _If we stay on track, we stay in the fight and keep the Democrats on defense!_ [**Your support is truly crucial for us. Chip in here >>**](https://trk.email.tedcruz.) Thank you for showing up, even when life is busiest. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: To the State Supreme Court…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=84d48256837f4ef3aef265db166c7289&_e=t6dfo51HIi7vrumCl1EmucCOWPdJ7hkP0cbZEEOQVwWj0rJBrCzsQMDaH3GhCd1YCKFQJQKZ3tkWpr7RfAWZ2T8TgB7qczlky2sZCCZXfzgzjuDjfeH3vx9QovWYMI9P40jCo8mgFoxnrEgQqbU3iEDMoRS5GdNE_ufQVEOdofkIZnap3oGm5HFgqCSH44J_o9ynBFB8HCWC-7S1IgEmsd9mEgoXBSNGChmsOhbIXYW8oY5IfBHEdrSi-QdfTxNIsiGuKzNlmORYI7AYAoxYW7hQUf3EAZxFINTtdH5A4iJVYYDujN2alm9U2HBnXEIOBomW5cmOwXshSqNuhivBmhcef-ZRZZMAAAvRRP4jwn_qbyqR9CZc_QBGf_aLaU7Z1IfPhnwxDAwgYBB3_VAshiQk61x8YzxnJ5vhzR-Yvugf1gt3zRW5vUrLyimBRDyC-vTygwzbmc9sUZaetZHF-L93HKWlzxpPTHbU-o3JtYdSAyRO-2dcURByFrwjwK4zvOt2y5XFrVJGckMgfKtjrcnBIeFL1GBFTmTSTvZvRC37CNkGzqekR415DPTInjNICX-mFrgd5x__GfSg47LeIah13pYpwRL_OsxIiucm8zS3VnLYsB2LjH7Zl25FGwZCJzZFA3pp2Dwj2PgQ4M5pvw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
On 11/21, the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona had the chance to do the right thing and DROP her wrongful prosecution against me – an _innocent_ 80-year-old man facing 20 years in prison.
---
_But at the _final_ _hour__ , she chose bloodthirsty **VENGEANCE** over **JUSTICE** , and decided to continue her prosecution against me and put me on _TRIAL_ right after the holidays are over.
---
**She is now rushing to the __State__ Supreme Court for emergency assistance.**
---
It’s all viciously calculated. She knows the President has no pardon authority for __state__ crimes.
---
But let me be clear: **I will never give up the fight for my freedom**.
---
When President Trump and I were arrested in the most violent jail in America, we proclaimed, “ _NEVER_ SURRENDER!”
---
Two years later, President Trump is back in the White House.
---
_**But I’m still fighting for my freedom!** And Democrats have RIGGED the case so that a federal pardon from President Trump is **_POWERLESS_** in _state_ court._
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=84d48256837f4ef3aef265db166c7289&_e=t6dfo51HIi7vrumCl1EmucCOWPdJ7hkP0cbZEEOQVwWj0rJBrCzsQMDaH3GhCd1YCKFQJQKZ3tkWpr7RfAWZ2T8TgB7qczlky2sZCCZXfzgzjuDjfeH3vx9QovWYMI9P40jCo8mgFoxnrEgQqbU3iEDMoRS5GdNE_ufQVEOdofkIZnap3oGm5HFgqCSH44J_o9ynBFB8HCWC-7S1IgEmsRTdvkZZmHMnK3Pq9y_OdVO8tWtPqAY8CM6_e399QlN0DuiY0PPlEf2OQWrMDt35WQOqwO7Y8o-4sSVSslj1QnTeIhGZxtpaVxQNr8rxjOOSgvgpVyHmNK7KI8SDNEKyCopXNKFILjCJFbJrjIbKxde5iAZj0rtj7yQAKOEvK_kDAhcvuvHQQB46JCHjMjFx5r0gXOV_mMKEHGnvNm_j4UyNbVifySmaaqcWfG3JNzxy79GqMKCD0pwaw9Sy7qNzIt3fiKfJa9qWs5l4mF-zufglMjbKFK4FzH1Lsa0RY8gQ-jD51LNGhFsYzNb_r7xFkY3k_e156dy9oOlT6GpxIHWtX44d6QzzR-Cy4r4l2eGlrqejcDPhyqQsn6vnlfONtCCnM9MhBJ418B0ftgkror3ozApFdUKuojd0i5ZVtyR8IH28menGnInk5EZeZLsuZA%3D%3D)
__
---
The night I was arrested in the most violent jail in America, the Left filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757.**
---
_Now, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will not stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for _successfully_ defending President Trump as his lawyer, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my defense trust to retain a top-notch defense team to fight for my _FREEDOM_._
---
Let me put it bluntly: _you_ truly are my final hope.
---

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | Friend, On 11/21, the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona had the chance to do the right thing and DROP her wrongful prosecution against me – an innocent 80-year-old man facing 20 years in prison. But at the final hour , she chose bloodthirsty VENGEANCE over JUSTICE , and decided to continue her prosecution against me and put me on TRIAL right after the holidays are over. She is now rushing to the State Supreme Court for emergency assistance. It’s all viciously calculated. She knows the President has no pardon authority for state crimes. But let me be clear: I will never give up the fight for my freedom. When President Trump and I were arrested in the most violent jail in America, we proclaimed, “ NEVER SURRENDER!” Two years later, President Trump is back in the White House. But I’m still fighting for my freedom! And Democrats have RIGGED the case so that a federal pardon from President Trump is POWERLESS in state court. The night I was arrested in the most violent jail in America, the Left filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757. Now, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will not stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for successfully defending President Trump as his lawyer, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my defense trust to retain a top-notch defense team to fight for my FREEDOM. Let me put it bluntly: you truly are my final hope. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust | 3300 S Dixie Hwy West Palm Beach, FL 33405 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

subject: Your file looks WRONG, Peter
body:
If you don’t correct this tonight, the error becomes permanent.

| | | | Peter, our system just flagged your MAGA file, and I'm not happy about it.
You're showing up as UNVERIFIED on some of the most critical issues facing our nation, AND our records indicate YOU'RE a supporter of D.C. statehood - which would be a TOTAL disaster.[ | ⚠️ ALERT for Peter We've detected **3 MAJOR ISSUES** in your MAGA Profile:
---
❌ **UNVERIFIED** status on core **GOP 2026** issues
❌ Listed as a **SUPPORTER of D.C. Statehood** _(Schumer’s dream)_
❌ **ONLY** supporter from YOUR STATE flagged **[MISSING]** from the **MAGA Response Sweep** ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
And that LAST ONE? It stings. Because Trump’s top allies are watching this fight closely. And we need 100% VERIFIED MAGA support before the next phase of election defense launches.

The RINOs, the Dems, the media, they’re counting on us to slip. They're hoping we ignore red flags like this.

[But you’re not one of them... RIGHT?](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)

Peter, could you please take JUST 60 seconds to review your MAGA file and fix the error. This opportunity disappears at 11:59 PM, and the record will be LOCKED IN!
[CORRECT MY FILE >>
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._sAShZJeipg)
[I AM NOT A SUPPORTER OF ANY OF THIS CRAZINESS
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
Do this for MAGA, for truth, and for the movement.

Sincerely,

Team Marsha Blackburn
| |

---

Brentwood, TN 37024

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community.
[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUxMTI5X0hPLTVILjExMDExN190MTc2MjU4NS0xMDQzJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTEyOV9ITy01SC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjI1ODUtMTA0MyJ9/7sXTPk04DERJbyWRvY6OIQ)

To unsubscribe from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund , [click here](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?James_O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: They're Coming for Me Again—But With Your Help, We Fight Back and Win
body:
Yesterday, the war on truth escalated.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270902/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZnZ1SHNHSnc5Tg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjk/LbmNsMURvaGFYeg/qP2hpZHM9bmNsNEdGZDBqSDZRQXZscw/gaSsBlA/s5qde1516ea)

| | | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

Yesterday, the war on truth escalated.

I received a **litigation hold letter** from attorney Mark Zaid—yes, _that_ Mark Zaid, the national security litigator who appears to be making a new career out of suing me. This time, he’s suing on behalf of his client, Joseph Schnitt.

You remember Schnitt: the DOJ's Acting Deputy Chief of the Office of Enforcement Operations, caught on hidden camera in our September OMG report spilling explosive truths about how the deep state protects its own.

In that undercover video, Schnitt talked about Ghislaine Maxwell's "special treatment," shuttled to a cushy minimum-security prison in violation of federal policy for convicted sex offenders. "It's a benefit... to keep her mouth shut," he said. This isn't speculation; it's **raw, unfiltered corruption** laid bare.

**[**I urgently need your help to defend against this lawsuit**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
**[**and the other ongoing cases designed to stop me.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
But now, they're striking back. Schnitt was fired after our report—for speaking out, they claim. And Zaid, with his history of aggressive suits against truth-tellers like me, is leading the charge. This isn't just a lawsuit; it's a **full-frontal assault** on investigative journalism. Zaid's playbook? Harass, litigate, bankrupt, and intimidate until the light of accountability flickers out.

Remember, this comes amid my **ongoing battles with Project Veritas** , where they're still dragging me through court over fabricated claims from my ouster.

Now, I’m being sued _again_ because they fear what I uncover next.

**[**Help me fight back by donating to my legal defense fund hosted by Liberty Guard.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
I didn't start this fight—I exposed it. I've dedicated my life to arming you with the facts they don't want you to see. But their machine is relentless, and legal fees are mounting into the millions. [**That's why I'm turning to you**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.), and other patriots who believe **truth is the ultimate weapon**.

**[**Every dollar you contribute today goes straight to the James O'Keefe Legal Defense Fund, hosted by Liberty Guard—a battle-tested nonprofit safeguarding the First Amendment for journalists like me**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).**

Your support isn't charity; [**it's ammunition**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

It funds top-tier lawyers to dismantle these lawsuits, depose the liars, and turn their attacks into our victories.

We've beaten them before, and with you, we'll do it again.

Imagine: your gift exposing more corruption, freeing more whistleblowers, and holding the untouchables accountable.

**[** Please stand with me now. Donate $25, $50, $100, or whatever God puts on your heart. Together, we don't just defend—we advance.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
I can only keep going with your support. So please, donate all you can to help me defend against these attacks so I can focus on bringing you the truth.

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. Zaid's not alone— the full deep-state echo chamber is mobilizing. But they've underestimated us. Your immediate action today could be the turning point. **[**Donate now, and let's bury this lawsuit before it buries the truth.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**

---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270902/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjk/LbmNsMURvaGFYeg/qP2hpZHM9bmNsNEdGZDBqSDZRQXZscw/gaSsBlA/saj3bf02fff)

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Can I count on you before this important deadline?
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=3763%2E582294%2EpE4Scx ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=3763%2E582294%2EpE4Scx ]Chris Pappas for Senate

There’s no sugarcoating it: This has been a slow month
for fundraising.

So we’re setting a last-minute end-of-month goal to close this gap:
$30,000 by tomorrow at midnight.

This isn’t an arbitrary number. Hitting this goal means we can keep
organizing across New Hampshire, reaching voters, and building the
grassroots energy we need to win.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251129_1_eom.n8Qz4n&refcode=em20251129-1&t=1003&akid=3763%2E582294%2EpE4Scx ]If you’re ready to help us turn this around, will you pitch in
$5 right now?

I’m running for U.S. Senate to stand up for New Hampshire and fight for
commonsense solutions that actually improve people’s lives. That means
lowering costs, protecting freedoms, and bringing integrity back to
Washington.

But here’s the reality: National Republicans are lining up behind John
Sununu, and they’ll spend whatever it takes to flip this seat red. If we
fall behind now, we risk being outpaced when it matters most.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251129_1_eom.n8Qz4n&refcode=em20251129-1&t=1004&akid=3763%2E582294%2EpE4Scx ]We need to hit this $30,000 goal, and I need your help to get there.
Will you be one of the supporters who steps up before our deadline?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251129_1_eom.n8Qz4n&amount=5&refcode=em20251129-1&t=1023&akid=3763%2E582294%2EpE4Scx ]Donate $5 »

Thanks for being a part of this team. With you by my side, I know we can
win this fight for the Granite State.

Thank you,

Chris

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3763%2E582294%2EpE4Scx

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40487%2E3422442%2EkYUhvu)
Peter,
A billionaire entered this race last week and his whole strategy to win is by spending an obscene amount of money. He’s already bought $2 million in ads!
Katie is a single mom who budgets for groceries and clips coupons to save a dollar here and there; she knows how rising costs are hurting everyday Californians. There’s no way a billionaire who spent $350 million on a failed presidential campaign can relate to what Californians are experiencing right now.
Katie is the fighter we need in Sacramento.
But Katie doesn’t have millions of dollars to write her campaign a blank check. She has us.
**[That’s why we’re asking: can you chip in $5, or whatever you can to help Katie fight back against this billionaire’s ads and make sure working families have a voice in this race? name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: One day away
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

$1.
That’s how much we’re asking you to donate to GIFFORDS ahead of our November fundraising deadline tomorrow night.
No, that's not a typo. Just $1.
We know what you’re thinking: “What difference can $1 really have?”
$1 might not mean a lot on its own — but by the time you read this, a dozen people have already chipped in $1. They know the power of this grassroots team, and they’re hoping you join them to help us stop gun violence.
Suddenly, that $1 donation adds up to $5,000 or even $10,000 of impact. We then have the resources to run more ads calling out the gun lobby, or educating voters in swing races.
_And look, reaching even a few hundred more voters could mean the difference between winning and losing — especially if we can reach them before the NRA does._
If everyone reading this email donated $1, we would reach our ambitious fundraising goal and have the resources to overcome the gun lobby’s spending. But not everyone can, which is why we’re asking you:
[**Will you contribute $1 (or more, if you’re feeling generous) so GIFFORDS PAC can reach our fundraising goal before tomorrow’s 11/30 deadline? This is our first end-of-month deadline since the fall elections >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251129-1-b&t=1&akid=11068%2E3935704%2En8jlR5)

We know what you’re thinking: “What difference can $1 really have?” $1 might not mean a lot on its own — but by the time you read this, a dozen people have already chipped in $1. They know the power of this grassroots team, and they’re hoping you join them to help us stop gun violence. Suddenly, that $1 donation adds up to $5,000 or even $10,000 of impact. We then have the resources to run more ads calling out the gun lobby, or educating voters in swing races. And look, reaching even a few hundred more voters could mean the difference between winning and losing — especially if we can reach them before the NRA does. If everyone reading this email donated $1, we would reach our ambitious fundraising goal and have the resources to overcome the gun lobby’s spending. But not everyone can, which is why we’re asking you: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: We’re sure you didn’t wake up thinking, "today is the day I am donating to James Talarico!"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Tomorrow at midnight, campaigns across the country (including ours) close the books on an end-of-month fundraising drive. It's an important one, especially at the end of a slow month.
So if you're anything like us, you're getting a million requests for donations via email and text messaging. Today, we're asking for a moment to explain why we hope you'll choose to give to James Talarico before November ends.
Here is the truth:
This is going to be a difficult Senate race, but that's only because victory here will mean everything.
Of course, winning here would likely mean the Senate is flipped. That's why Republicans will spend whatever it takes to defeat us.
But more than that, in these difficult times, electing someone like James has a chance to move our politics toward a better place. No, it won't solve everything — but it will be a breath of fresh air at a time it's needed most.
So while we are sure you didn't wake up, jump out of bed and shout, "Today is the day I am donating to James Talarico!", that is what we are asking you to do:
[**Please contribute to James Talarico's campaign for U.S. Senate in Texas. Our average online donation is around $30. Many give more, some give less. All that matters is that lots of people give before our November deadline ends tomorrow at midnight.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251129-1-ak&t=1&akid=279%2E1347274%2EK2x2qc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

[**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=27&refcode2=279_1347274_K2x2qc&akid=279%2E1347274%2EK2x2qc)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=279%2E1347274%2EK2x2qc).

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Republicans are already zeroing in on Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
The work to win next year has to start right now. | | | |
---
Hey friend,
I'm going to be direct: everything is on the line next year — for Nevada and for our nation’s future.
**Republicans are already zeroing in on Nevada.** Pundits marked our House races as some of the most competitive in the country and the NRCC put all three of our Democratic incumbents on their top targets list.
**GOP megadonors are pouring millions into Nevada to hold onto control at every level.**
We can’t afford to fall behind — every victory we’ve achieved has been through grassroots supporters like you, and it’s why we will win again.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I am MAGA’s #1 target without a doubt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is not a drill, and it’s not a bad dream
| | |
---
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– **[please split $5 between my reelection campaign and Jacky Rosen’s campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120213054/585586374/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5641-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTAxOGFjYy0zNGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KcbXCEOvVCHVMZaeRoER0M269yRPXj1JMiiJCtzOyZY=)**
| | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120213055/585586375/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5641-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTAxOGFjYy0zNGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KcbXCEOvVCHVMZaeRoER0M269yRPXj1JMiiJCtzOyZY=)
---
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill, and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
**[Please split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Jacky Rosen’s campaign today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120213056/585586377/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5641-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTAxOGFjYy0zNGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KcbXCEOvVCHVMZaeRoER0M269yRPXj1JMiiJCtzOyZY=)**
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120213058/585586378/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5641-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTAxOGFjYy0zNGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KcbXCEOvVCHVMZaeRoER0M269yRPXj1JMiiJCtzOyZY=)

As always,
Jon Ossoff

subject: Circling back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
A couple weeks ago, Ilhan reached out
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1969%2E791427%2E79GcEF)
Hey there, we wanted to circle back on something.
A couple weeks ago, Ilhan reached out and explained that our campaign has to pay for a security team out-of-pocket.
She humbly requested that the folks on this team chip in whatever they can to cover the cost, **and the response was absolutely massive.**
In today’s political climate, the threats and harassment are constant. On top of all of the hate Ilhan gets from Trump, JD Vance, and everyone else on the far-right, there are thousands of conspiracy theorists and hateful people who threaten Ilhan’s safety every day.
That’s why it was so heartening to see this grassroots movement step up and provide for Ilhan’s security. It shows that folks like you have her back in these tough and dangerous times.
In fact, we came incredibly close to actually covering our entire security budget!
Which is why we’re reaching out again. Because if only a handful of people chipped in today, we could close this budget gap and provide for Ilhan’s security for the months to come. Are you in?
[**Please, if you can afford it, chip in to Ilhan’s campaign today and help us pay for security. We wish we didn’t have to ask, but we have to be safe and ensure we can keep campaigning loud and proud.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov25.AgDe-P&refcode=em251129-1-180&t=2&akid=1969%2E791427%2E79GcEF)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

subject: We need just one minute of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
We’re just one day away from our November deadline, and right now we’re not where we need to be to finish strong.

| | | To all of Hillary’s supporters,

We’re just one day away from our November deadline, and right now we’re not where we need to be to finish strong.
---
| | Michigan is a battleground state, and the **House majority could be won or lost right here.**

Republicans know it, and they’ve made Michigan their top target because some of the most competitive races in the country are happening in our communities – including Hillary’s.
---
| | Hillary is laser-focused on taking back the House majority right here in Michigan. She’s ready to play offense, and she’ll never sit on the sidelines and watch.

That’s why we need your help. Our average gift this month is just $28 — and we know it might not seem like much, but when everyone chips in, it adds up and makes a huge difference.

| **Am I the only one who feels it’s been four years already? And it’s not even been eleven months.** In just the last ten months, attacks against all Americans who aren’t part of the 1%, who aren’t white, or those who might not fit into a "typical" box have been relentless. They’re direct attacks on our future. They’re not accidents. And the fight against them starts NOW.

Every dollar we put up is proof that we won’t stand by and let underqualified bigots pretend to be in charge, while Trump's billionaire puppet masters truly run the show.

And that’s why this end-of-month goal is so important. Meeting this end-of-month goal of $16,000 is a real chance to show Trump and his cronies that their fear tactics _WILL NOT WIN_.

[**_So I need you with me every step – and every cent – of the way. name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: Why these fundraising emails are so important to our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1380%2E251025%2EOKC-p- ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1380%2E251025%2EOKC-p- ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi friends — important message for you today.

By now, almost everyone has heard of AIPAC. Across multiple campaign arms,
they spent more than $100,000,000 in MAGA billionaire money in 2024 to get
politicians to turn a blind eye to the genocide in Gaza, or worse yet,
support it outright.

But have you heard of their little cousin, DMFI?

In the past three cycles, “Democratic Majority for Israel” spent more than
$21,000,000 on elections to boost democrats who support sending our tax
dollars to Israel:

[ A ]A graphic showing the millions of dollars DMFI has raised and spent
from 2020-2024

DMFI just endorsed our opponent in this primary. In her statement
accepting their backing, she calls herself a “proud pro-Israel Democrat.”

Peter, this is
it. This is the start. The AIPAC folks, the DMFI folks, and the entirety
of their super PAC network are coming with a vengeance to defeat Abdul and
prop up a candidate who would rather send our money abroad to drop bombs
on Gaza than to spend it on our schools here at home. We need to respond
urgently.

Here are three reasons we need your help right this moment:

1. Blank check support for Israel will hurt the Democrats’ chances in
2026. If we nominate a candidate in Michigan who wants to underwrite
genocide, we could seriously harm our chances of getting elected by
alienating the young, multicultural voters who make up the Democratic
base. That could cost us Michigan and the Senate majority.
2. Abdul will be attacked relentlessly. They will spend millions against
him on misleading ads to smear us. And we need the resources to get
the truth out.
3. We are the bellwether. Elsewhere in places like New York City, voters
have shown they’ll support anti-genocide, pro-peace candidates no
matter how much AIPAC or DMFI spends against them. If we show them
their money doesn’t buy them elections in Michigan, we can strike a
decisive blow to their stranglehold over the power in Washington, D.C.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251129-1-ak.2xGWvh&amount=10&refcode=em20251129-1366&t=1004&akid=1380%2E251025%2EOKC-p- ]Now, if we’ve convinced you even a little bit, we are counting on you.
We cannot win this race without significant grassroots contributions from
people like you. Please make a $10 donation — or give as
much as you can — to elect Abdul and defeat AIPAC, DMFI, and the big money
PACs.

The good news is we can beat them. Multiple polls show we’re basically all
tied up.

But that’s only going to happen if friends like you choose to back Abdul
financially by donating what you can right now. That’s why these
fundraising emails are so important to our movement.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251129-1-ak.2xGWvh&amount=10&refcode=em20251129-1366&t=1005&akid=1380%2E251025%2EOKC-p- ]Please donate $10 now to elect Abdul, the only
unapologetically anti-AIPAC, anti-genocide candidate in this race.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251129-1-ak.2xGWvh&amount=10&refcode=em20251129-1366&t=1024&akid=1380%2E251025%2EOKC-p- ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you for hearing us out today. We appreciate your support.

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

clean_body: [ - ]Abdul for US Senate [ - ]Abdul for US Senate Hi friends — important message for you today. By now, almost everyone has heard of AIPAC. Across multiple campaign arms, they spent more than $100,000,000 in MAGA billionaire money in 2024 to get politicians to turn a blind eye to the genocide in Gaza, or worse yet, support it outright. But have you heard of their little cousin, DMFI? In the past three cycles, “Democratic Majority for Israel” spent more than $21,000,000 on elections to boost democrats who support sending our tax dollars to Israel: [ A ]A graphic showing the millions of dollars DMFI has raised and spent from 2020-2024 DMFI just endorsed our opponent in this primary. In her statement accepting their backing, she calls herself a “proud pro-Israel Democrat.” Peter, this is it. This is the start. The AIPAC folks, the DMFI folks, and the entirety of their super PAC network are coming with a vengeance to defeat Abdul and prop up a candidate who would rather send our money abroad to drop bombs on Gaza than to spend it on our schools here at home. We need to respond urgently. Here are three reasons we need your help right this moment: 1. Blank check support for Israel will hurt the Democrats’ chances in 2026. If we nominate a candidate in Michigan who wants to underwrite genocide, we could seriously harm our chances of getting elected by alienating the young, multicultural voters who make up the Democratic base. That could cost us Michigan and the Senate majority. 2. Abdul will be attacked relentlessly. They will spend millions against him on misleading ads to smear us. And we need the resources to get the truth out. 3. We are the bellwether. Elsewhere in places like New York City, voters have shown they’ll support anti-genocide, pro-peace candidates no matter how much AIPAC or DMFI spends against them. If we show them their money doesn’t buy them elections in Michigan, we can strike a decisive blow to their stranglehold over the power in Washington, D.C. [ - ]Now, if we’ve convinced you even a little bit, we are counting on you. We cannot win this race without significant grassroots contributions from people like you. Please make a $10 donation — or give as much as you can — to elect Abdul and defeat AIPAC, DMFI, and the big money PACs. The good news is we can beat them. Multiple polls show we’re basically all tied up. But that’s only going to happen if friends like you choose to back Abdul financially by donating what you can right now. That’s why these fundraising emails are so important to our movement. [ - ]Please donate $10 now to elect Abdul, the only unapologetically anti-AIPAC, anti-genocide candidate in this race. [ - ]Donate $10 ›› Thank you for hearing us out today. We appreciate your support. Team Abdul

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: We Have to Be Ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1bc89e4a8a97/be-the-difference-today-50266?e=561a28864e)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=773ea6cc4b&e=561a28864e)
| | | | |
---
| |

Friends,
I’m reaching out today because this is shaping up to be an important year and one that may look very different from what any of us expected. With all the recent discussions and actions around Wisconsin’s congressional districts, there’s a possibility that the lines could change before November. Nothing is certain yet, but we need to be prepared for anything.
**And make no mistake control of the U.S. House of Representatives could very well come down to Wisconsin. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we’re ready for whatever the next few months bring**.
No matter what happens, my focus remains the same: fighting for Wisconsin families, standing up for common-sense leadership, and making sure our values are represented in Washington. But to stay competitive we need a strong, energized campaign ready to move at a moment’s notice.
[That’s why I’m asking for your support today. If you’re able, would you consider making a contribution to help us stay prepared?](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=e66918a4a9&e=561a28864e) Every donation helps ensure we have the resources to adapt quickly, defend the 5th, and keep working for the people of Wisconsin.
[You can chip in by clicking here.](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=a94a8c6062&e=561a28864e)
Thank you for being part of this team. Your support truly makes the difference.
Sincerely,
Congressman Scott FitzgeraldWisconsin 5th Congressional District

subject: The fight for our planet and our democracy didn't end on Election Night.

body:
We won big this month. Now we need to finish strong.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120217090/585596742/1328794144?refcode=ea.b0f749d1-3acd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.b0f749d1-3acd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwZjc0OWQxLTNhY2QtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N1u4LwGINewhln5J-CaOxD_wz249x66Wii9b18u_Usc=&emci=1151acfa-f4ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b0f749d1-3acd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)
---
**[Today is the day we’re counting on an increase in individual donations — enough that we can hit our $45,000 goal before tomorrow at midnight and ensure our endorsed climate champions have what they need to win _two runoffs_ and a _special election_ that could flip a Republican seat in Congress — and set us up to win big in 2026. Can we count you in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120217094/585596744/2105508926?refcode=ea.b0f749d1-3acd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.b0f749d1-3acd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwZjc0OWQxLTNhY2QtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N1u4LwGINewhln5J-CaOxD_wz249x66Wii9b18u_Usc=)** | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120217097/585596746/2105508926?refcode=ea.b0f749d1-3acd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.b0f749d1-3acd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwZjc0OWQxLTNhY2QtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N1u4LwGINewhln5J-CaOxD_wz249x66Wii9b18u_Usc=)
---
Otherwise, let us explain why your support — especially today — is so important.
**FIRST:** Big Oil and the GOP spent the entire election cycle trying to crush our JanePAC-endorsed climate champions. They poured hundreds of thousands of dollars into attack ads and flooded competitive races with millions in fossil fuel cash — all to protect their profits and advance Trump’s fossil fuel agenda.
**THEN:** On November 4th, voters proved grassroots power can beat Big Oil. We flipped seats Republicans thought they owned, made history in states that hadn't elected Democrats in nearly two decades, and transformed state and local governments in over a dozen states.
**AND NOW:** We’re facing critical runoffs that could send even more JanePAC-backed champions into office, plus a high-stakes special election in Tennessee – our last opportunity this year to flip a Republican congressional seat and shift the balance of power in Washington. _But as of this morning, we’re not on track to hit our November fundraising goal._
**Look, everything from here hinges on what we do now. Early resources will determine whether we can win these upcoming fights and head into 2026 from a position of strength. They’re what allow our candidates to knock on doors, run digital ads, and mobilize undecided voters before Big Oil’s spending drowns them out.**
**[That’s why your grassroots donation matters today. Can you be one of the people we're counting on from Cresco to make today, November 29, 2025, the day you chip in a few dollars to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120217099/585596748/2105508926?refcode=ea.b0f749d1-3acd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.b0f749d1-3acd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwZjc0OWQxLTNhY2QtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N1u4LwGINewhln5J-CaOxD_wz249x66Wii9b18u_Usc=)**

clean_body: We won big this month. Now we need to finish strong. | = | = Otherwise, let us explain why your support — especially today — is so important. FIRST: Big Oil and the GOP spent the entire election cycle trying to crush our JanePAC-endorsed climate champions. They poured hundreds of thousands of dollars into attack ads and flooded competitive races with millions in fossil fuel cash — all to protect their profits and advance Trump’s fossil fuel agenda. THEN: On November 4th, voters proved grassroots power can beat Big Oil. We flipped seats Republicans thought they owned, made history in states that hadn't elected Democrats in nearly two decades, and transformed state and local governments in over a dozen states. AND NOW: We’re facing critical runoffs that could send even more JanePAC-backed champions into office, plus a high-stakes special election in Tennessee – our last opportunity this year to flip a Republican congressional seat and shift the balance of power in Washington. But as of this morning, we’re not on track to hit our November fundraising goal. Look, everything from here hinges on what we do now. Early resources will determine whether we can win these upcoming fights and head into 2026 from a position of strength. They’re what allow our candidates to knock on doors, run digital ads, and mobilize undecided voters before Big Oil’s spending drowns them out. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's finish strong, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: How we stop Trump. -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's newest Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue.

**[In a moment, I'm going to tell you why we _must_ take back the Senate majority to stop Trump's agenda. But first, I need to ask: Will you donate $5 to the DSCC to make it happen?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251129-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251129-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21881%2E9716520%2EgJDFQE)**

Let me make this as plain as possible: **Donald Trump isn't fit to lead.**

We see it in his actions every day. Pardoning January 6th defendants on his first day in office, cutting Medicaid to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, attempting to end birthright citizenship, turning his back on our allies -- **if you asked AI to invent a fictional politician hellbent on harming our country, they probably would look exactly like Donald Trump.**

But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and -- more importantly -- _votes_ to let Donald Trump have his way with our government and continue on his authoritarian path.

**And that is exactly why we _must_ take back the Senate: Republicans will _never_ stand up to Trump, so if _anyone_ is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us.**

**[DSCC leadership, myself included, is counting on this team to raise $250,000 by the end-of-month deadline to keep our plan to flip the Senate on track._Nothing_ could be more important in these early days. So let me personally ask you -- will you rush $5 or more immediately to help fight for a Democratic majority? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251129-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251129-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21881%2E9716520%2EgJDFQE)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| Final Notice: this is your last chance | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=389f7eb80dfde57dae6246bcd0f6b17f374586389690377b29ffcf01cd74483676f528bf0fff65bfd623b0c10845fa3c0a90062d312da9c75d479dceceacae89) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=389f7eb80dfde57dae6246bcd0f6b17f374586389690377b29ffcf01cd74483676f528bf0fff65bfd623b0c10845fa3c0a90062d312da9c75d479dceceacae89) **SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. POWER GRID** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=389f7eb80dfde57dae6246bcd0f6b17f374586389690377b29ffcf01cd74483676f528bf0fff65bfd623b0c10845fa3c0a90062d312da9c75d479dceceacae89) **National Security Reports China's Attacks On Critical U.S. Electric Grid, Food Supply and Water Systems** The FBI warns that China has gained access to electric companies throughout the U.S., and experts are now urging Americans to protect their homes. A new alarming report reveals over 70 attacks on America's power grid in just one year, and these are calculated strikes designed to weaken our nation's most essential lifeline. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **OUR CRUMBLING ELECTRIC GRID** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? I’m confident we can do it again in 2026, but with so much on the line, we can’t risk falling short of fundraising goals — especially with the election less than one year away. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States

Hey there, it’s Jay Jones.
I’m sure you want to be hearing from me on a Saturday night just about as much as I want to be writing this, so I promise I’ll make it quick.
My inauguration is just around the corner , and we’re still $3,761 away from our first post-election end-of-month goal. And with each minute that passes, the likelihood of us reaching it before our deadline shrinks. So I’m hoping you’ll help us out, because I need your support to hit the ground running and ensure the Attorney General’s office once again serves as a watchdog for all Virginians.
Before you set your phone down or turn your computer off for the evening, could you take 60 seconds of your time to chip in $15, $25, or even $100 if you can swing it right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025?amount=15]

subject: I need to speak with you first about something very important to me.

name: Team Bell
subject: Mom-and-pop shops deserve our dollars
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Spread some love this Small Business Saturday Peter,

Small Business Saturday is a reminder of what really keeps our communities going: Family-owned shops, local manufacturers, and neighborhood restaurants. It's all the people who pour their time, energy, and hearts into their businesses and communities every single day.

This Small Business Saturday, skip the big box stores and shop local! St. Louis is full of bustling neighborhoods home to businesses stocked for the holidays, from the antique stores lining Cherokee Street to the galleries and boutiques of Central West End. [SHOP ST. LOUIS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120218104/585600437/912318535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhOTdkN2MtM2NjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H7TK1tTZ280QHhN-hKkePOnn0mTBmv-BBBR4ZwnxchE=&emci=1148057b-6fc9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=75a97d7c-3ccd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1020964) Wesley grew up in a working-class family, and he's spent his career fighting for people who don't have an army of lobbyists behind them. In Congress, he's pushing for stable economic policies, lower costs, and fair access to capital so small businesses can hire, grow, and thrive.

But right now, **they're being pushed to the breaking point.**

Costs are up on everything from materials to groceries, and it's squeezing already-tight margins. Healthcare prices for small employers have been climbing for years, making it even harder for them to compete with big corporations. And with the GOP's reckless tariffs and high borrowing rates, too many small business owners feel like they have to "hunker down" instead of growing.

People are working harder than ever and still living paycheck to paycheck, and when families struggle, small businesses struggle too.

This Small Business Saturday, we're asking you to stand with Wesley and with every small business fighting to stay afloat. [**Check out the small businesses in your area and support your local economy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120218113/585600469/912318535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhOTdkN2MtM2NjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H7TK1tTZ280QHhN-hKkePOnn0mTBmv-BBBR4ZwnxchE=&emci=1148057b-6fc9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=75a97d7c-3ccd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1020964)

Thank you,

Team Bell | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120218126/585600503/-1347839382?refcode=em25_251129_smlbsa_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251129_smlbsa_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=75a97d7c-3ccd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhOTdkN2MtM2NjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H7TK1tTZ280QHhN-hKkePOnn0mTBmv-BBBR4ZwnxchE=)

| | To be honest, team, we don’t have a splashy discount to offer you today, unlike what you can probably find throughout the rest of your inbox. But in this message, you do have the opportunity to help defend democracy. And it couldn't come at a more critical time — with anti-voter extremists trying to silence the American people because they’d rather give up on free and fair elections than give up power. One example: a case that’s before the Supreme Court right now could allow Republicans to cement one-party control of Congress for a generation. The Court could overturn Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, let states eliminate districts that create opportunity for Black and minority representation, and lay the groundwork for lawmakers to draw 19 safe new GOP seats. [**Too many people have fought too hard for fair representation and equal access to the ballot box for us to turn back now. We’re fighting for democracy, and we need to raise $10,000 by Sunday’s end-of-month deadline as we plan our work ahead. clean_body: Can you help reach this target by the end-of-month deadline? | | | To be honest, team, we don’t have a splashy discount to offer you today, unlike what you can probably find throughout the rest of your inbox. But in this message, you do have the opportunity to help defend democracy. And it couldn't come at a more critical time — with anti-voter extremists trying to silence the American people because they’d rather give up on free and fair elections than give up power. One example: a case that’s before the Supreme Court right now could allow Republicans to cement one-party control of Congress for a generation. The Court could overturn Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, let states eliminate districts that create opportunity for Black and minority representation, and lay the groundwork for lawmakers to draw 19 safe new GOP seats. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Your donation can help organize for fair maps with fair representation, advocate for legislation to outlaw extreme gerrymandering, and fight back against a rising wave of anti-voter legislation. name: Voter Action Project
subject: This case is about whether we can protect our fundamental right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: New Ruling Cuts Off Key Tool to Protect Minority Voters [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112925_1&amount=25]
Folks: An update from the federal 8th Circuit on one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
A federal appeals court recently cut off a key avenue for private groups and individuals to bring racial discrimination claims under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The ruling, which applies in seven states, further weakens the ability of our civil rights law to protect voters, and could lead to the Supreme Court settling the issue.
This goes back to an initial ruling from 2023, the impact of which is pretty simple to understand: That voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, and now confirmed on appeal, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
With former Florida AG Pam Bondi -- a "big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte -- serving as Attorney General, it's clear that the DOJ is not going to protect voting rights over the next four years.
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112925_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_1&amount=35]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this new appellate ruling is not overturned by the Supreme Court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112925_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112925_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112925_1&amount=20]

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: From diaper banks to food pantries, we’re making sure no one goes without this winter
body:
Here are members of our campaign team helping the Metropolitan Detroit Diaper Bank package up pajamas and school supplies for kids in Metro Detroit: | | |
---
Friend, From rising costs to cuts in nutrition and healthcare services, our communities are hurting. We created the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to invest in our communities and ensure no one goes without. **Each month, our campaign team is pitching in at food pantries, community dinners, and more.** Here we are this month helping fill backpacks with school supplies and pajamas for local school kids: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtsvPhtry74smccu5zEUdPpMD2ijS4G5qWYmkZPcf3KSLyRwc0lNAjXIm2GbrJrFEBdlIOgJ1IKatoiC0hJ-sqGnv0MvV01IhBbMpqrSJCtfzOS5qJyDWFOUOP7rDGdS2hxtZTiQ_0Q2NmxoYFVyXcMcPatTCnmCA67JFdtCC6peZ4Fg2uTX8auUYGZyZJp2jyqprOm2OVpPHY-LXjbVXkp5FI1wlHI1wzQDuTTy9E78mfZvSR_PwZ7CG8CFO5CMw2O3DXflZ4PclmOVtgjMyJZwRQYgGhgDpLS0x3hBMhM9-m3-XOhfHdYAL2uqjWhuUxS7fjmH92vhjxF_AE6Scq7Ai28mQdqx_2ZwVqhqCISXxg3gAbJAwopY5YyjHPg3oUSnwLPwoEbzYugWmd00Z8p0lY767lzsm72oWSk5rOPckq5LD6UQt3WPiwwRMXFLNA/4m0/qCY29ijXTh2SfrX8gttAig/h0/h001.h9oLxfLJ6IJKwjL8YdqnT9ZnoeoPyObbZjFtfd8Phtw) We’re also providing direct financial support, donating $1,000 each to 9 food banks during the government shutdown earlier this month, and donating nearly $100,000 this year, mostly to nonprofit organizations in our communities. From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Nov 28, 2025
Subject: From diaper banks to food pantries, we’re making sure no one goes without this winter
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This Black Friday, instead of bargain shopping on Amazon, I hope you’ll consider supporting families in need.
When we created our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC (RIC PAC), it was always about much more than training young people and candidates to run for office and give back to their communities. **It was also about direct community support.**
This year alone, RIC PAC has donated nearly $100,000, mostly to nonprofits providing critical services to our communities. **Members of our campaign are in the community every week, whether it’s supporting diaper drives, collecting canned food, or helping out at community dinners.**
Here are members of our campaign team helping the Metropolitan Detroit Diaper Bank package up pajamas and school supplies for kids in Metro Detroit:[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtsvPhtry74smccu5zEUdPpHCiz5hFOsANpS4Il1vOCv3RIFF4n_zyuIrSfxIR2uCZ3FGnfJAMkJuCsQHK4u-kNxajA3DrCAOyo4dYXHrrv1UUA9DiTuVWCDBvYUxpqa2CnIjbT7Mq9UcSEOlQDWpRHpv8_1HL61beSEOs-uhotvi9YkJN8-ZXSDD-mHNmDUvCrYi6ld9TMpg7ieCg8yjiV0pFxKIPU64Ty1XohUPcBuZ1KwlJO8J_5pZhN9-LSlfY8__ldKmXYAQErhBzuOx45GcdNtHBn6P5dalqdrPxbx72aW1_wv7P5L-pbi2pNXf0FgL49xsGDDcdWuILcfDDQgtU7WD6hycC6Lvf97WdJRXMXU0BdYkFHG2RSqDeZAJZLgM3TBscDMtV6rq3CIeRWggLiS62h4e18GNnJmzs34PbpkNzMwAZ-_3KjIjRmLyi/4m0/qCY29ijXTh2SfrX8gttAig/h3/h001.76XPswunw9Cx06bRawaXF7Kd9Fqe7z3-clL_x9gsSvU)[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtsvPhtry74smccu5zEUdPpBzwVcX4cblytjJiMdW85SZWDKKdVPcN_H3WntSwd1RPCM6ygYoP38UBmUo549FDhF9K-MvUl_B_Eczpq9PnNWG8NTtOO5XLiylswK3mHxevQesg-dhBGqSIWqnNf-ZwtDQp8XLv6P_LBEYJ0HOL9G10kVI-0tx6ZVCBkp0ZbTnulXjTZV2s_jgjGOVkWfyraf5KHHRR7D8EvbAEWUYzUliNXMjP7Cg0dZf51nqQl-6ycVsk39K8zuyF57G4pF9aD0JBkjOWBEX1xlhXgpZhIqR5KpnR5Tx7vMropSE0uPGmhKgDY744209D4GUqDiWg0Ir-jq4YkCuNLWCHFOW34hzFwhAq9GTFttd9o9IY7rtVJrvk3nKWhCh4yoBke0nKR_RSKiwZzrn9oGqt6BaKKFiWn-dj5OvmcdfFPbPWAGaE/4m0/qCY29ijXTh2SfrX8gttAig/h4/h001.ap7cHFaOwdh-lqa4bqwFJ7IiTKwXIa3YZiP8tHGWL7I)
We supported the Elmwood Blessing Box this year with direct financial support, allowing them to purchase diapers and period supplies.
And, we’re adopting families this Christmas through local nonprofits, including Goodfellows.
