Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. A new alarming report reveals over 70 attacks on America's power grid in just one year, and these are calculated strikes designed to weaken our nation's most essential lifeline. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **OUR CRUMBLING ELECTRIC GRID** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's critical infrastructure. [**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=7tjluyuhdlunj0fc78gzpv2wr56mht1rp6jc43dcwez7kkgtv3err2q5col3wg4tj8lw43gicjt18k4ekhazyn7hg5a9xxzg2r4yf9sbfcsnr6g7nb3lfzyp7sdyk4qm97i4i0oac0g0v6emvzkl8lumnwpqw17aicgzkjrp3sx2gw6ppee14me2se3mlcom9mgrwgjheqbqddkrrgostft95r19bkip351fen2i4dltasy8jmdrsoeie3f1v9cw2ci70n8np89cf7jw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6hzyi&__onlt=h) Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This is what real people-powered organizing looks like
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

As we close out the month, I’ve been thinking a lot about what this
community has made possible. Every conversation we’ve had, every voter
we’ve registered, every candidate we’ve recruited, every volunteer we’ve
brought into this movement—all of it has only happened because people like
you stepped up to power this work.

Powered by People is exactly what our name says. We don’t rely on
corporate money or ultra-wealthy donors writing big checks. The work we do
is entirely fueled by thousands of grassroots supporters who believe that
democracy works best when all of us take part in it. And that support is
what makes everything else possible.

Because of you, we’ve been able to hit our previous fundraising goals this
year. Those dollars aren’t just numbers—they’re the fuel that keeps us
meeting people where they are, registering voters, showing up on college
campuses, and building an effective volunteer network that can’t be
ignored.

This is what real people-powered organizing looks like. Every
contribution, every action, every volunteer shift, every voice helps us
fight for the Texas we know we can become.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251129.UiFiRU&refcode=ema20251129-240493&t=1002&akid=240493%2E444211%2EUcI5hz ]Tomorrow marks our end-of-month fundraising deadline. If you’re able, I
hope you’ll chip in $3 to help us close this month out
strong and keep this movement going into the next.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251129.UiFiRU&refcode=ema20251129-240493&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=240493%2E444211%2EUcI5hz ]DONATE $3

Thank you for showing up, for stepping up, and for powering this work,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=240493%2E444211%2EUcI5hz

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

**_Begin Forwarded message:_** Peter,

I want to level with you as we close the month. The work ahead of us is shaping up to be some of the most difficult that we've faced this year. Working families in CA-19 are _feeling the strain_ of higher costs, cuts to essential programs, and an administration pushing policies that make life more expensive for working people.

That's why our grassroots fundraising matters. We’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 before Sunday at midnight. Every dollar counts and will help fuel the work ahead. We need your support now more than ever.

clean_body: Our district continues to be one of the most competitive in the country and everything we are seeing points to a tough fight ahead. | = | Peter, Our district continues to be one of the most competitive in the country and everything we are seeing points to a tough fight ahead. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Anthony D’Esposito is refusing to rule out another run after losing to us by only 2 points. He has been attacking me online for months and is not ruling out trying to make a comeback. If D’Esposito enters the race, he will have national Republicans behind him on day one. That’s why tomorrow’s fundraising deadline is so crucial. The work we do now will decide whether we are ready for whatever comes next. This seat could determine control of the House and we need to show strength before the deadline hits. = | = Election analysts have already identified this district as a total toss-up. That means every dollar we raise before tomorrow night helps us build the early organizing and outreach we need to win again. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being part of this team. name: Troy Downing
subject: Our House Majority hangs by a thread
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need help TONIGHT

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)I'm staring defeat in the face.
As a combat veteran, Christian, husband, and father, I thought I could count on fellow Patriots like you to stand with me against the radical Left. But it hasn’t panned out like I hoped.
**I'm Troy Downing, a freshman GOP Congressman fighting to put America First.**
Our House Majority hangs by a thread – just a few seats separate us from the Democrats' socialist agenda.
I'm facing a brutal truth: the November deadline is looming, and my campaign could be over if we fail to meet our goal. Democrats are waiting to pounce with their massive cash advantage.
_We can't let them see weakness now._
I'm not asking for a bailout or a massive donation. **[I just need a small contribution from patriots like you to keep my campaign alive:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyOV9GVS1CUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjE4MDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjlfRlUtQlAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYxODAxLTI4OTkifQ/HfL8RoEScUyDek3lCxZUUQ)**[ SEND A CARE PACKAGE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Without your help, I'll be forced to surrender this critical House seat to the radical Left. But if you chip in right now, you’ll help deliver a victory over the Democrats' agenda.
We’re not just aiming to win an election– We’re in this for our country's future.
[So please, will you make a small contribution to help a combat veteran take down the Democrat machine?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
Your support is my last line of defense.
God Bless You and God Bless America,
Troy Downing | |

I only reach out when it’s important, so believe me when I tell you: this is as important as it gets.
[Hakeem Jeffries filed a lawsuit to block Trump’s attempt to undermine our elections – _and he needs your grassroots support to help us win._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120227381/585627744/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQyMGVkNS00NmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7WtJp42x9H8emGnXhwkT75D_qT5yJMEDaEWqagM4JM=)

That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help defend our democracy. If you – and everyone else reading – give before midnight, we can hold Trump accountable and hand the far right extremists a stunning rebuke. Can I count on you to kick in $15? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120227382/585627745/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQyMGVkNS00NmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7WtJp42x9H8emGnXhwkT75D_qT5yJMEDaEWqagM4JM=)

[We cannot let Trump and his allies seize our elections, silence our voices and reject any result they dislike. We must keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120227383/585627746/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQyMGVkNS00NmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7WtJp42x9H8emGnXhwkT75D_qT5yJMEDaEWqagM4JM=)

Patriot, we are on pace for a historic victory!
I am so thankful for all of the support I have already received from across the Empire State and the nation from patriots like you that are committed to saving America from Radical Leftists like Zohran Mamdani and Kathy Hochul.
Thanks to you this race in a traditionally Democrat stronghold is already within the margin of error.
**New York is now a toss-up state!**
Our message of delivering a safer and more affordable state for all is resonating with New Yorkers who are tired of nearly two decades of single party Democrat rule currently led by the embattled and deeply unpopular Governor Kathy Hochul.
**[Kathy Hochul is the _WORST_ governor in America.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9693023/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjk/LbmNsRW04U2prcA/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMQ/gaSsr4Q/s8g12bf644a)**

[SAVE NEW YORK](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9693023/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjk/LbmNsRW04U2prcA/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMQ/gaSsr4Q/s8g12bf644a)
Under her abysmal leadership New York has implemented** _failed bail reform_** and was** _cemented as a sanctuary state_**. The results of these decisions have been devastating as violent criminals are routinely put back on our streets to recommit violent crimes and we are seeing a rise in crime from illegal immigrants.
Her record on handling the state’s economy is even worse. She has** _raised taxes_** and pushed failed policies that** _raised the cost of living_**. With Kathy Hochul at the helm New York has some of the highest taxes, rent, energy prices, utility bills, and cost of groceries in the country.
And when New Yorkers looked to Governor Hochul to rein in the extremism emerging from her own party she decided to bend the knee. She** _helped elect Zohran Mamdani_** , who is a communist and jihadist sympathizer, as Mayor of NYC.
To borrow a phrase from Governor Hochul herself: **"This bullsh*t has to stop"**.
It is clear that Hochul is out of touch and New Yorkers are ready for new leadership. But now it is up to us to lay the groundwork for victory next year.
Every major Democrat donor in the country is being called upon to save Kathy Hochul from her coming reckoning at the ballot box in a last-ditch effort to keep New York blue.
**Firing Hochul and flipping New York red is going to be a team effort** and I need every one of my patriotic supporters right now to help me deliver my message to every voter across the Empire State.

[FIRE KATHY HOCHUL](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9693023/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjk/LbmNsRW04U2prcA/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMQ/gaSsr4Q/s8g12bf644a)
Patriot, here is how you can help today.
My team just dropped a new ad that I want every New Yorker to see:

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9693023/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjk/LbmNsRW04U2prcA/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMQ/gaSsr4Q/s8g12bf644a)
_NEW AD: Kathy’s Own Words: This Bullsh*t has to stop._

[WATCH ELISE’S NEW AD](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9693023/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjk/LbmNsRW04U2prcA/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMQ/gaSsr4Q/s8g12bf644a)
To defeat Hochul we need to expose her failed record and provide voters with an alternative vision for the state. This ad helps with that mission.
**_[So please, take a minute to watch my new ad, send it to every New Yorker you know, and make a contribution of whatever you can so we can keep it running](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9693023/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjk/LbmNsRW04U2prcA/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMQ/gaSsr4Q/s8g12bf644a)_****.**
This is our opportunity to SAVE NEW YORK!
I am grateful for all of the support I am receiving to win this fight. Thank you for continuing to stand by my side.
**Let’s finish the fight to make New York affordable and safe again.**

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9693023/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjk/LbmNsRW04U2prcA/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMQ/gaSsr4Q/s8g12bf644a)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker

clean_body: I'm not going to sugarcoat it. We're running out of time. As your Majority Leader, I made a promise to fight for you and our Conservative values. But with our fundraising numbers in a slump, I'm facing a harsh reality: This is it - One of our VERY LAST DEADLINES of the year. If we don't meet our goal, the consequences will be dire. They'll destroy every last one of our MAGA candidates in close races, barge their way back to power, investigate Trump's Cabinet, and impeach your President. Luckily, you're a true American Patriot who never backs down from a fight. If we don't hit our target by November 30th, the Radical Democrats will be one step closer to taking control of the House and destroying everything we've worked for. This is our last chance to make a difference before the year ends. If we don't act now, we risk losing the House and everything we've fought for. Don't let that happen. now and help us save the House from the Radical Democrats. We can't afford to wait. The stakes are too high. We’ve had a busy month, folks.
* Trump’s government shutdown finally ended after 43 days (the longest in history).
* Democrats had HUGE wins on Election Night.
* We finished the petitioning period here in Illinois to get candidates on the ballot.
* We started challenging Republican candidates if they submitted incorrect, bad, or fraudulent petitions.

And there’s no sign that things will let up in December. We’re spending the rest of the year in meetings and strategy sessions about how to win in 2026, and that means that we need to finish the year strong.

Every dollar we raise is being meticulously budgeted towards our 2026 operations, to support our candidates, educate voters, and win more races.

[**And that’s why these final deadlines are so critical. We need to see where we’ll land for 2025 before we can accurately start planning for 2026. A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board’s official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL

clean_body: = We’ve had a busy month, folks. Trump’s government shutdown finally ended after 43 days (the longest in history). Democrats had HUGE wins on Election Night. We finished the petitioning period here in Illinois to get candidates on the ballot. We started challenging Republican candidates if they submitted incorrect, bad, or fraudulent petitions. And there’s no sign that things will let up in December. We’re spending the rest of the year in meetings and strategy sessions about how to win in 2026, and that means that we need to finish the year strong. | | | **Gutless... and deadly.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXORSRIQeiOCMS9G3C_viYiwQl39iocQFF3fnhAG36_4WtKMtWsCcApiJNQ4S6_hhYoMYqJ7NgMTsIDKwVTbnuuV4L6nnz-Mv-9nE4JT7NPs-pylo4OloDKRuwi8J7sUJwE0REv6mXpdjTYxbi_yUXelBeTbgOC0RQzkBEtaYbRpPPXBN3ApI0RoNGPmMRdcVypB_n09kwfKI_7oHP3hSY-ibR-20PTJQiTrUClYHXvGUf8S9yY1bomd5znx58OGV7C3GDxkYAgNVkq1bEdviuw9o7LCiMUy34jKmdjFnNBqJObMt7xTKLbpUVvNAsfCclDrnkB790tRXWggrIWBDEJu8dm_aEq18IZTnVYIRK-stY/4m0/hBao5612RdmzXm54ydsPhQ/h0/h001.vC2ReCQKxsROBvpNibLN2Mu5HgJHZO4F2mKbRraQTQc)******[FIGHT BACK with a donation to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will STOP RFK Jr and FIRE MAGA cowards!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXORSRIQeiOCMS9G3C_viYiwUUHHGOkcryRA_PBpsYo6u1pEns4xxfgVp-J1pL-Eo_5dhcGMm6V3Xs4r0EF0sxud9lJp8-4uAMR8nVCWEWaf6WGtjDO27xB4hK__0GwqilIPnNbeNTJLFht33c0wLkQdkyug43LTWHtJOain0V4SDCLonZbcSoizdN7HxR016mc4O29dvs08D1hK_bcfgcbo4_0JhFVDph4v2cNa5pvSii206Vycr8KsEbZABaJ_2LEaV8P3aSyuBarENgFxRL3AGVtwXfIMjiHRTi0PPBYQ3Ar6PcYJPsFEQGSGiIr-eruDH6qbigxmRo5mcsCDspHg7siUrecezqQmTUTksrngBo/4m0/hBao5612RdmzXm54ydsPhQ/h1/h001.3BKNneukeQAofVVlcBwl1P9rT5gogGxLdNqAk6xHZ3I)**

**** Hi Friend, Let’s talk about credibility. How is it that educated people, like MAGA Senator Bill Cassidy, a physician, no less, can look us in the eye, shred their professional honor, and make an absolute fool of themselves to prop up a madman and a failed agenda? RFK Jr. recently updated the CDC’s website to push the widely debunked claim that vaccines and autism are linked. Senator Cassidy, who was a key vote in RFK Jr’s confirmation, shrugged it off with, "life is lived forward." Is this what his oaths are worth? A cheap dismissal of his duty to the nation and public health – an absolute abandonment of the oath to do no harm. “Lives are lived forward” is an epic cop out with deadly consequences for our community. When crazed people are enabled by cowards with cliches, sometimes lives don’t get to move forward. **Able Dems exists to reject MAGA’s moral bankruptcy. We champion leaders who have the integrity, the compassion, and the clear-sighted**** _ability_****to legislate for us. We elect people who don't trade their honor for political survival.** **[If you are as fed up as we are with self-serving, incompetent leadership, chip in $10 today. With 4Patriots' easy pay plans, there is no reason to wait until the lights go out and wish you had pulled the trigger and made your purchase sooner." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017!" Gary R. "Very well built and does what it is advertised to do. I researched other solar generators and they were priced much higher than this one. I like being able to add an additional battery pack for more power and solar panels to increase recharge speed. I will be ordering those, too. I've never been disappointed. The generator was the cherry on top!" Linda S. "Storms can sneak up on you. Lights, flashlights, fans, the Patriot Power Generator 1200 can handle it all. And it doesn't have to be an emergency situation. Take it camping, play karaoke at a barbeque. I'm telling you, this is the perfect 'I love you and want you to stay safe' gift. Thank you, 4Patriots!" / / DISCLOSURE OF BUSINESS TIES: The sender of this email likely has an affiliate or material connection with the entities mentioned and may earn commissions from purchases made through associated websites. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m confident that we share these values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Will you help me fight for a better country?
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98269?refcode=em20251129-9775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9775%2E614464%2EPvF-qf)
I want to tell you about a few things that are important to me, Peter, so I hope you’ll give me just a minute or two of your time today:
**Public education:** My mom was a public school teacher right here in North Carolina, and I attended public schools all the way from first grade through university and law school. Our future leaders are learning in public schools today. I believe _every_ child deserves an excellent public education — no matter where their parents live or what they earn — and I’ll make public education a priority in the Senate.
**Health care access:** Expanding Medicaid was one of our most impactful accomplishments during my service as Governor of North Carolina. America is the richest country in the world, and every one of us deserves the care we need to stay healthy — and bringing Medicaid Expansion to NC helped more than 670,000 people get it. But the entire Medicaid system is now at risk because national Republicans decided to slash Medicaid funding and give a handout to the rich instead. I will fight to save Medicaid for all Americans.
**Voting rights:** North Carolina has been a proving ground for the GOP’s worst efforts to undermine voting rights and access. They’ve enacted ultra-partisan gerrymanders and restrictive anti-voter laws. In the wake of a 2024 election loss, Republicans even launched a lawsuit attempting to throw out tens of thousands of valid ballots and change the result. We must defend and expand voting rights to ensure that every one of us can have our fair say in our democracy — and we have to be prepared for the GOP to try to steal future elections that they lose.
**[Peter, I know we share many of the same values, beliefs and hopes for our nation’s future. I’m ready to do everything in my power to make this country better for all of us, but I need your help to make it to the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to split a $25 donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98269?refcode=em20251129-9775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9775%2E614464%2EPvF-qf)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98269?refcode=em20251129-9775&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9775%2E614464%2EPvF-qf)**
I appreciate all your help in this fight,
Roy Cooper

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=4&akid=9775%2E614464%2EPvF-qf).

name: Team Chris Pappas
subject: National attention and millions of dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3765%2E582294%2EK7guId)
There’s a reason why reaching our November fundraising goal is mission-critical:
**_The ONLY way Democrats will have a chance to flip the U.S. Senate is if we elect Chris Pappas here in New Hampshire._**
National attention and millions of dollars are coming into this race soon. We’re up against MAGA Republicans, right-wing billionaires, and Wall Street special interests in this fight. **We need you on our side to have a chance to win.**
**[So what do you say? Will you join us by making a contribution — even just $5 — before our end-of-month deadline on Sunday at midnight?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251129_2_eom.-o_4YJ&refcode=em20251129-2&t=2&akid=3765%2E582294%2EK7guId)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251129_2_eom.-o_4YJ&amount=5&refcode=em20251129-2&t=21&akid=3765%2E582294%2EK7guId)**
Thank you,
Team Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251129-2&t=22&refcode2=3765_582294_K7guId&akid=3765%2E582294%2EK7guId)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=3765%2E582294%2EK7guId)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3765%2E582294%2EK7guId)

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: 🥘 Got room for one last feast?
body:
All episodes now streaming on YouTube. | | | Hey Peter, Whether it’s the first dish you made from scratch in your grown-up apartment, or the dinner you shared with your partner on your first date, food is there through every stage of life. As I watched the _Just Flavors!_ season finale, I couldn’t stop thinking about my mom’s rajas con pollo — the meal she cooked for us after moving into our first home. What recipe reminds **_you_** of new beginnings? 🥘 👉[**Let us know today in the comments of our latest episode!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mtFotdo2NS8VUcgsdggMW-T1ogWBUFDAoCM9-A3dIm_O1Ei239RfZJCMip65f8dqFv76tqs0ZTUa5t-nemozuanzQBxqGjE5ti3VN3D0KMsJixyR6biWO-RoxlpDiiz9bSTa_Q2rxpt9jWFu8Qc0e_YiPq-_5alZ6iz3nIPhn9GqdKHQk1pgPll31l5OFWkMLW2RTUfHYh0uMGDmfj6dPWn8RFQke5Uxav_KuJ-4Z9lr8lXZrbiiXZIQGKwRvc9kwg/4m0/0qefjnPaQ--ys1so5SVdFQ/h0/h001.iVnr_Fs9AHH3GdBV7JJO_ilJc0kBt4M8UdPV9qC4tTY) It’s one final feast as our home cooks go head-to-head with the recipes their families made in their new homes after moving to the U.S: **[Watch Now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mtFotdo2NS8VUcgsdggMW-Tfq3aejZh4I1-2e0FRA0FGBRnnK8-cLSlR9rGdKJKGE1SAfqSx7z_UROW0KOPaWSHoEHJvCDZeT4w1tWIE-4UfzIhas5E4Kix2R4RadUuu6KpCEpjBr5-1HfxuWKsBDNKZFLIpQfNc_KS-qh7yT18ulLGMQTIhncOD8KOuMWZ6LLWdhMr2MSlZV9HaFJaAiMM8yLJwasJDrBwDlBeOVQkx_Nisi-5rKCERl8VaVvWDJQ/4m0/0qefjnPaQ--ys1so5SVdFQ/h1/h001.rDfLFdM971sxhoOfw4pWFHCvw75rUyVJLanIj03r__s)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mtFotdo2NS8VUcgsdggMW-T-pp9HM8mBSmOcaLzF1EQeRk4V_OPm3JusbMXoQmGhSDxYAxxUGH2sB5B5simAecsaZ7CrpA-6bkCBddgDJzCb8T5ZSCEYJMYxkuy-I0lhRUwZnrTwWNb5GGghYBm3n6Gyffm7MbTRpT0tKH3azBqW_Y61jAFAg6CI9sxKZnqpBpqHwb1_f6zsyyTxndsChFXrOBIs4du-t-eoylZQz2IP1G2aU7QUz_rteEkD0Z9Xyg/4m0/0qefjnPaQ--ys1so5SVdFQ/h2/h001.2oM9iIKfvQXenTEf4QW3Jm_xLoy6Z8cV2yl5PzOXGew)
Our communities have been loving _Just Flavors!_ because it casts a light on immigrant stories, and the strength, joy, and beauty in our immigrant cultures. Throughout this final episode, our contestants’ jollof rice and bánh mì hột gà will take you back to the first meal _your_ family shared in the U.S. These dishes, often created with limited resources but immense resourcefulness, are a reminder of the power of food to bring us comfort, culture, and connection. 🧑🍳🧡 [**Help yourself to one last serving of**** _Just Flavors!_****Season 2 today**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mtFotdo2NS8VUcgsdggMW-RV202gyCXwaUDXYbGeTD_-UuvnuM-1YYPnC8lj_5pMNWDzpK_MdAGH-vHTBvy4XVSpYxFatz8yu0QgoviFoTrQ1vS1fv40gxTwkouNipQe4cRkea6NBO6RHX94Vl0GnfLeVewUTGgPcMUWqY0pY3GBl9RByONJk7rmNfrzwbajFpFdoySztFMzsb6LbzkXG06x_sAeLLizUUNQpeqfgliucgqN7fYwh8sewpw2FeR6cg/4m0/0qefjnPaQ--ys1so5SVdFQ/h3/h001.EwW9S0Us1vBQ5p9tEauW9rRnyXBZmzbv7S5bpYvOYQ8), and invite your loved ones to watch along with you: **[Share on Facebook](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMctRoxlFO9O82fTB5zU1O8GM7gt5oGQ3dWJzdEHt1kZLTqghCnloH9Hqo7J-kMpqYzsuuTD8YNzv5GwCtMaqTpsFcsp-RU5f3vMStcj1vmJzfbRhAIkyw-2Sq8T2vy8WuyFl---Mm1qUNJdwArWnDaPW--1tLS9iPLywmb3oRxPDkZhf_0n6fdpe1GOXQ1iAF42XMEBmL5wI9FSVPnIf_qhoscU0rQoWyaXkKj_f6546WRD_tiYkIKXYC-4ZmEpMJugqeD31GmKPGUIBw988Ayx_cPibOcf0zmopiijUrIKfNhJVxAzrLX1XHHWioy1O5w/4m0/0qefjnPaQ--ys1so5SVdFQ/h4/h001.5U_7HIqojn7AdFoM_mpz9Mn3b_ubq52wBAzMayGgm1Y)** In unity, Matias and the UWD team

clean_body: All episodes now streaming on YouTube. | | | Hey Peter, Whether it’s the first dish you made from scratch in your grown-up apartment, or the dinner you shared with your partner on your first date, food is there through every stage of life. As I watched the Just Flavors! season finale, I couldn’t stop thinking about my mom’s rajas con pollo — the meal she cooked for us after moving into our first home. What recipe reminds you of new beginnings? 🥘 👉 It’s one final feast as our home cooks go head-to-head with the recipes their families made in their new homes after moving to the U.S: Our communities have been loving Just Flavors! because it casts a light on immigrant stories, and the strength, joy, and beauty in our immigrant cultures. Throughout this final episode, our contestants’ jollof rice and bánh mì hột gà will take you back to the first meal your family shared in the U.S. These dishes, often created with limited resources but immense resourcefulness, are a reminder of the power of food to bring us comfort, culture, and connection. 🧑🍳🧡 , and invite your loved ones to watch along with you: In unity, Matias and the UWD team | Follow us on: | | | | |

There are really only two scenarios:

A) National Republicans target this district in their effort to keep control of the House.

B) We hit our goal, hand Republicans another lousy participation trophy in PA-17, give Democrats a real shot at flipping the House, and stop the corrupt plundering of our government.

_I don’t know about you Derek, but I choose B._

As November draws to a close, so does one of our final fundraising benchmarks of 2025. **[Tomorrow marks our next end-of-month deadline, and I know it would mean a lot to Nikki to see your $3 donation before midnight tomorrow -- will you chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120229770/585635279/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.29.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmU4OTQ4ZS00ZGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=loImD_BAQ9_ZVpw5vRVoNo-oweuKjLZ89VmOkvvxzYY=)**

Nikki is one of the most effective fighters in Congress for working families in IL-13 and beyond. Full stop.

Despite the chaos of the Republican majority, she’s continued to bring real results back to Central and Southern Illinois -- from protecting good-paying local jobs, to expanding veteran care, and ensuring public education stays funded.

And during the historically-long government shutdown, she wasn’t hiding from Illinoisans like the GOP. She was on the ground in the district listening to folks’ stories and taking them back to Washington to keep up the fight.

Her tireless work is part of what makes her a Republican target in next year’s midterm elections. We already are facing multiple GOP challengers who want nothing more than to flip this seat back to red and expand their majority that puts billionaires before the middle class.

**[We’re preparing now for what’s to come, and it starts with meeting tomorrow’s deadline. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Got to ask...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'm writing to you with a very straightforward question:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1505%2E49239%2EOnGRxF)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9745?t=2&akid=1505%2E49239%2EOnGRxF)
---
Hi null, it's Haley writing to you with a very straightforward question:

**[Is there anything I can say to convince you to donate $5 – before my crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline – to help me win Michigan's battleground Senate race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9746?t=3&akid=1505%2E49239%2EOnGRxF)**
What if I told you that there is no path to flipping the Senate blue unless we protect Michigan's Senate seat?
What if I told you that I'm statistically tied with my Trump-backed opponent, Mike Rogers, among independent voters – and that your gift could help me surge ahead in the polls?

What if I told you I was born and raised in Michigan, and I’m in this fight for the Michiganders I know and love, not billionaire donors like the ones backing my GOP opponent?

What if I told you that national Republicans and their dark money super PACs have already started pouring money into Michigan, and that the worst is yet to come?

What if I told you Trump and his MAGA Republicans could eclipse $80 million in spending, which is what they spent last time trying to flip Michigan red?
Null, I can win this race. But only with committed grassroots supporters like you fighting alongside me. That's why hitting my $350,000 end-of-month fundraising goal – one donation at a time – is absolutely crucial.

**[So will you please chip in $5 to help me win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's chaos agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9746?t=4&akid=1505%2E49239%2EOnGRxF)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9747?t=5&akid=1505%2E49239%2EOnGRxF)
---
With grit and gratitude,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9886?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1505%2E49239%2EOnGRxF) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9745?t=7&akid=1505%2E49239%2EOnGRxF)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=1505%2E49239%2EOnGRxF)

Birmingham, MI 48009

body:
We’re officially less than 48 hours out |
#
---
Team, We’re officially less than 48 hours out of our November fundraising deadline. **But as of this morning, we’re still short of our goal.** We don’t have time to waste. This team was built to go toe-to-toe with Republicans who want to take away our health care, rip away fundamental freedoms, and roll back our progress. And that’s no small feat, because they’re funded by the billionaires who want the GOP leaders they support to do their bidding. _**We’re different.**_ We do our work with joy, grit, and grassroots power. We’re training the next generation of leaders who will shape the future. We’re supporting candidates who will always fight like hell for their constituents in some of the closest, most important races in the country. And we’re making sure Governor Gretchen Whitmer can keep making Michigan the best place in the country to call home. But there’s no part of this work that happens without supporters like you chipping in when it counts. And right now, with tomorrow’s midnight deadline on the horizon, _it counts._ **[Strengthen our people-powered movement with a grassroots donation today. This deadline will shape our campaign. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120230272/585636977/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGNiYTI1YTctNGRjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rQXtxoWHnkBRo98jnKPbeqffDQaSy7qedAhHArzwzLo=) | Hey Peter, I need to level with you. Tomorrow is our end-of-month deadline and we’re still really far behind where we need to be right now. [_**I’ll leave a link here if you can chip in now to help us reach our goal!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120230274/585636978/140958522?&refcode=E16464-20251129-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGNiYTI1YTctNGRjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rQXtxoWHnkBRo98jnKPbeqffDQaSy7qedAhHArzwzLo=) Here’s why this matters: My team and I are finalizing our budget for the 2026 election and we can only move forward with hiring field organizers, paying for Latino outreach, and launching our digital ads if we close the gap before tomorrow at midnight. These are the investments that help us meet voters where they are and make sure they hear directly from our campaign. **I hate sending messages like this, but we are running out of time to turn things around. If we fall short, we will have to delay important parts of our campaign that we should already be launching.** [_**So, can you chip in tonight to help us close the gap before the deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120230276/585636980/140958522?&refcode=E16464-20251129-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGNiYTI1YTctNGRjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rQXtxoWHnkBRo98jnKPbeqffDQaSy7qedAhHArzwzLo=) Thank you for being part of this team. It really matters. Josh

subject: Here's what we accomplished this month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120230726/585638729/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251129_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg5NWQ1ZWQtNGVjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WKaRAbhIJBkPdrrymW0mV88aGmuaF0Oxu0OHgeEDPQY=)

Hi there! Monica here from AZ Dems’ finance team. Our end-of-month deadline is tomorrow, and I wanted to share what we accomplished this November and why your continued support matters. Here's what we did this month:
* **We organized around Arizona's local elections.** We made sure Arizonans knew where to find their polling locations and drop boxes, mobilized voter protection volunteers, and responded to voters’ questions and concerns across multiple platforms.
* **We held Republicans accountable.** Whether calling out Juan Ciscomani’s food bank photo op, pushing back against Andy Biggs' lies about healthcare and his dangerous "domestic terrorists" rhetoric, and many other instances — we corrected the record and stood up for our values.
* **And we highlighted the warning signs for 2026** , just one year out from elections that will decide control of Congress and whether Katie Hobbs, Kris Mayes, Adrian Fontes, and other leading Democrats can keep delivering for Arizona.

Not to mention: We did all this while political analysts were writing us off, pointing to the doubled Republican registration advantage and calling 2022 an "anomaly." **Those analysts are wrong — but only if we have the resources to compete. We win by organizing year-round in all 15 counties, registering voters, and holding extremists accountable.** Every dollar helps me plan confidently for the organizing infrastructure, voter registration drives, and field operations we need to flip competitive seats and defend statewide offices won by razor-thin margins. [**Can you chip in before tomorrow’s deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120230727/585638730/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251129_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg5NWQ1ZWQtNGVjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WKaRAbhIJBkPdrrymW0mV88aGmuaF0Oxu0OHgeEDPQY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120230728/585638731/79744751?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251129_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg5NWQ1ZWQtNGVjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WKaRAbhIJBkPdrrymW0mV88aGmuaF0Oxu0OHgeEDPQY=)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120230817/585638971/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTlkY2FhN2UtNGZjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nwc3tclkF5YBqjyLY-7H5usz-11tudwGP4kQ2p9x5Xw=) **It’s official: there’s less than a year until the midterm elections.** I’m one of the most vulnerable House Democrats, and this is going to be one of the most important and competitive races in the country next year. If we want to take back the House and put up guardrails to stop Trump’s disastrous agenda in its tracks, then we have to protect this seat. [_**That’s why I have to ask: will you chip in now to help my team meet our end-of-month goal and gather the resources we need to keep OR-05 blue and help flip the House?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120230818/585638972/1565084121?refcode=email_112925_needyou&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTlkY2FhN2UtNGZjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nwc3tclkF5YBqjyLY-7H5usz-11tudwGP4kQ2p9x5Xw=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120230819/585638973/1565084121?refcode=email_112925_needyou&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTlkY2FhN2UtNGZjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nwc3tclkF5YBqjyLY-7H5usz-11tudwGP4kQ2p9x5Xw=)

Last year, we defied the odds and flipped this Republican-held swing seat blue, and it’s all thanks to the support of this grassroots team.
Together, we made history in Oregon, and we showed our commitment to fighting for a better, brighter future for our state.
As we look ahead to 2026, my team and I are preparing for another ultra-competitive race to defend this seat and take back the House majority.
National Republicans have already shown they’ll say and do whatever it takes to beat me — whether that’s blaming me for their failed leadership or launching misleading attack ads for standing up Trump’s disastrous agenda.
[_**To take them on and keep fighting for our families and communities in the House, I’m going to need the support of this grassroots team once again. clean_body: = It’s official: there’s less than a year until the midterm elections. I’m one of the most vulnerable House Democrats, and this is going to be one of the most important and competitive races in the country next year. Fellow patriot,

On 11/21, the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona had the chance to
do the right thing and DROP her wrongful prosecution against me – an
_innocent_ 80-year-old man facing 20 years in prison.

_But at the final hour_, she chose bloodthirsty VENGEANCE over
JUSTICE, and decided to continue her prosecution against me and put me
on TRIAL right after the holidays are over.

SHE IS NOW RUSHING TO THE _STATE_ SUPREME COURT FOR EMERGENCY
ASSISTANCE.

It’s all viciously calculated. She knows the President has no pardon
authority for _state_ crimes.

But let me be clear: I WILL NEVER GIVE UP THE FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM.

When President Trump and I were arrested in the most violent jail in
America, we proclaimed, “NEVER SURRENDER!”

Two years later, President Trump is back in the White House.

_BUT I’M STILL FIGHTING FOR MY FREEDOM! And Democrats have RIGGED
the case so that a federal pardon from President Trump is POWERLESS in
state court._

filed my mugshot under BOOKING # 2313757.

like YOU will not stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man
all for successfully defending President Trump as his lawyer, I’m

trust to retain a top-notch defense team to fight for my FREEDOM._

Peter,
---
Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America.* Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. **[For just $25, $50, or $100, you can help reunite a child with their parents before midnight.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4c5b629e4f4b45568e4ac6f183a08a5c&_e=7G8v1eC6PMKyPMqcp0jEch6VixlPkywPLtoIyGZzukDtn7QpSqH0uMiLKrXdeOkx34KHUquj8UODsk92TEAy_4Kv3sw_dsSGwdeN5UlIiIiPiSrBYljbbDZt6Iatd9RDV0I0GROtrJlhznhJMoX6zVH-MgmkBXwAa0uYy-Bbz9h9T8Qnd5Jh4QzaNu1LEFu_xz7zLCqklwi_0ik_7Cdk46U4jfnRi4APArOEoMpvw2AMQlevIJoJv0oZkQieGU2D8JBsIIcOkljlLxmg74LEgT6o1kC01qopnrZv-xNwEes5tZEp6Xi1ocvdqXNAGp2FRd0SpzKpsuIhxaNgcqKyJPBj9-nHPaQcVwRMjlASx-r8xX1vbL5t3lCKy5FgqQkUVuXoLxHVYWdpOBmDDyDvhLqzt2SOSBVWdnbro6qqinmcYsQeciLWKD2N8DFZ5pXCwedz2MsyBF68PPO1yS8bVRNpGNpDcrKMCPEnVhEusXeiKc4YM-eQ5P0N9_PLgi_ZQgvUXJD1jwuSCz5Yq5wZKOG2hbnJ2Cdeq_9WHM3ByrctZ_B3aKKXpQv767yKtdSqUIngwY8qbazk6mZiO5-yCozT1j-L64W5KRN1SehiHaTDuKZkEoFi8kGoo0xLYo7Bd3GLEssrVScn14F1VmWsDVAM3_a5VNVU7Dy2szAB7Vg-l0SrnY9P89J7a17JoISDbKCI-_Ja-_Vphp5qQK_p1B6sZ3Pmc7yOoW5KZbjKogJmeYSqGabHp2DULBOltgbYd-DGbEy3Uv2zDqCBRfnF2WrG5i3fHaHUYd23iX9vN_qGKeskD3VJuMPno1NvY7c4-Qn3RDm-Iu7lFhQoUzvrXg%3D%3D)** My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children?
---
[ YES EDUARDO — I’LL STAND WITH YOU TODAY](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4c5b629e4f4b45568e4ac6f183a08a5c&_e=7G8v1eC6PMKyPMqcp0jEch6VixlPkywPLtoIyGZzukDtn7QpSqH0uMiLKrXdeOkx34KHUquj8UODsk92TEAy_4Kv3sw_dsSGwdeN5UlIiIiPiSrBYljbbDZt6Iatd9RDV0I0GROtrJlhznhJMoX6zVH-MgmkBXwAa0uYy-Bbz9h9T8Qnd5Jh4QzaNu1LEFu_xz7zLCqklwi_0ik_7Cdk46U4jfnRi4APArOEoMpvw2AMQlevIJoJv0oZkQieGU2D8JBsIIcOkljlLxmg74LEgT6o1kC01qopnrZv-xNwEes5tZEp6Xi1ocvdqXNAGp2FO40ZHwqhOlhNoy-xOPbvVI36fmUgzhZMILp6EnwKHbcsrGndq5TvoUVnqlBVmC9T1mKrWsSZ8c1870P-BW_uH9IjvdaZun7muYcREoV1rfOBrI0pNVMDYOOpfUW23BmsP0DSoHddrKZzruA4FytftWSVIIzAgJJgsiXsyMPNgtCgEIhdE4bM4Q1LzqAXbFl38G1w22RykGnI8sBIFuHJEtIBDQBzVdJbIW37vEPqHwDhWQL46tdlVZb6jiPkiJ7nISEJmcuXFJZmY3PPyMh2zKILccFzbP8FM_ksvRpANwDYTF6vCGz8u6PHKJnJqoItd8WASruxp9X076eCtqAzDXARxjU2NHkYRqBcCqdNKbDpwJHKIeapzFgYPFBLeucrRpd9E1XHZY4xl-N04oJi5fbH1gnhoMRnOfutTxF_jaSU9qAO95wVZ1gKJZ4iAtEpgXjT0JcGLTxsmivOU3KGo09SwmhTFCIQS234sGDu0zaYRL0KtRDUnaMp-whG3pq3vkDdtoPWnCjKKzF-xa14KA%3D%3D)
---
I'm reaching out to you from the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. clean_body: Peter, help me save a child before midnight| | | Peter, Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America. Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children? I'm reaching out to you from the Sound of Freedom Foundation -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The Sound of Freedom Foundation team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight? Peter, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day: Most victims are only 12 years old 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue: $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift $50 provides transportation to a safe house $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation "Let the little children come to me." -- Jesus 2024 National Center for Missing & Exploited Children 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

_"It's on, Texas." - Gavin Newsom

subject: Susan Collins, Chuck Schumer, and AIPAC are trying to bury us before we even get started....
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
Peter,
Janet Mills just entered the race against Susan Collins. So you’re about to get a million fundraising texts and emails from Mills and her campaign (if you haven’t already).
I’m new to this whole politics thing, but I’ve begun to learn how this works: After you donate to any establishment Democrat, Chuck Schumer and the DNC turn around and use your email address and phone number to put their thumbs on the scale – propping up their choice, even when that person is not the strongest candidate in the race.
It’s all part of the corrupt system in Washington. Corporations buy candidates through corporate PAC checks. Special interest groups like AIPAC pour millions into Super PACs. And Chuck Schumer and the DNC buy loyalty by sending millions of texts and emails to funnel money to milquetoast candidates, even when they don’t have the best chance to win.
I’m not the choice of corporations, AIPAC, Chuck Schumer, or the DNC. And that’s exactly why I’m the Democrat who is finally going to actually defeat Susan Collins and turn Maine blue.
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a Democrat who will actually support Medicare for All and call what’s happened in Gaza a genocide.
But I’m going up against Susan Collins, AIPAC, and the entire DC establishment. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I am counting on folks like you to chip in now to our campaign.
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Graham Platner and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3&amount=25]
This is a pretty pivotal moment in our campaign, so no amount you can afford is too small. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
#

_Peter, we’re reaching out today with an important message from Mark Kelly. Please read Mark’s note below and then, if you can,[**split a $5 contribution to help fight back.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25-kelly.WuAWqz&refcode=em251129-2-f&t=1&akid=1174%2E5691347%2Eb9OFIV) Thank you_ \- Team Ossoff
* * *
Peter,
This has been quite a week for our country.
If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI has asked to question me and other members of Congress.
All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.
If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter.
I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.
If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.
And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:
[**Split a donation between Jon Ossoff and me. It would mean a lot.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25-kelly.WuAWqz&refcode=em251129-2-f&t=2&akid=1174%2E5691347%2Eb9OFIV)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Mark Kelly and Jon Ossoff instantly:_

name: George Latimer
subject: My career in public service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
I’ve served Westchester for over three decades — and my commitment to delivering for our communities hasn’t changed.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=vQ1kHVPntaArzEvQ0BMzX2PHcDBo6%2FdiUx%2Fkav25Hp5AAkA8BdBChn5EW29hXrGmb1eR9T6O6a29Zva%2FWRxU1QbsApMy%2FVuZbhgUI2qXeY0Hg3q%2B7MHJd%2FuDUxwnonQYZEZeutZl2t0zrAYtTB2zshcgCkgD9amwO5wh%2FJLw9928xCL1MM2YEl24ppkA9nJ9A5qn5%2BGtEo6wC6H8M54rb0WqhO09OSfj7pURAoPxGMT%2FDjGnjJt6UDopJ0NMXZSlsaWTtkqOlvbEAZ6OjCfiN%2FBPCOVt0VP1GJxjM9oElLclpC%2BCi7etZNxnupO780Ar%2BjS8obO7Leam4Ve37ERTU02jGNAGWGvecY4GyR2Y3L3JHUk5d7ERJdi6Uw3wqrF2ToGa8dHXCQJeaoF5rd4NeBShHx3qRooO9%2BwxSuPRGLE039H1CIiSM0lODSHFF1V9)
---
| |
---
Peter, When I first entered public service more than three decades ago, it was because I believed the government should be a force for good — a place where we solve problems, improve lives, and make our communities stronger. That belief hasn’t changed. I meet with families, small business owners, seniors, and local leaders across NY-16 and what I hear from them is clear: **people want practical solutions, not partisan chaos.** They want a government that shows up, listens, and focuses on the issues that affect their day-to-day lives — healthcare, affordability, public safety, and the stability of our institutions. That’s the work I’m committed to. Whether it’s fighting to protect healthcare access, strengthening our infrastructure, supporting our schools, or ensuring our democratic systems remain strong and accountable, I approach each issue with the same mindset: people need results, not rhetoric. **[Chip in $10 if you’re ready to elect a Democratic majority that will fight for working families, and will hold Donald Trump accountable for his destructive agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120231757/585641653/1087608061?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_112925_EOM02_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I3MGQ4ZTctNTNjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9eONCyLbWdzMOC6DfEy1sTBrfy2O4ABwc_7rFZBu6ic=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: I’ve served Westchester for over three decades — and my commitment to delivering for our communities hasn’t changed. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, When I first entered public service more than three decades ago, it was because I believed the government should be a force for good — a place where we solve problems, improve lives, and make our communities stronger. That belief hasn’t changed. I meet with families, small business owners, seniors, and local leaders across NY-16 and what I hear from them is clear: people want practical solutions, not partisan chaos. They want a government that shows up, listens, and focuses on the issues that affect their day-to-day lives — healthcare, affordability, public safety, and the stability of our institutions. That’s the work I’m committed to. Whether it’s fighting to protect healthcare access, strengthening our infrastructure, supporting our schools, or ensuring our democratic systems remain strong and accountable, I approach each issue with the same mindset: people need results, not rhetoric. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — George Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120231881/585642096/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTdkMDAzYi01NGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAXPC4e3O_JzCh9rbUp4lxP9SnpUGV7doEILJunNvLw=)
**➤➤ NEW: Ten Democratic Secretaries of State sound the alarm** Friend, Ten Democratic Secretaries of State – from Washington to Maine – just sent a joint letter to the Department of Justice and the Department of Homeland Security demanding immediate answers on the Trump administration’s**unprecedented and secretive effort to gather sensitive voter registration data.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120231882/585642097/1645614939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTdkMDAzYi01NGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAXPC4e3O_JzCh9rbUp4lxP9SnpUGV7doEILJunNvLw=&emci=be820a1e-70c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=157d003b-54cd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=26828920)
[📄 Read the full letter here ↗️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120231883/585642098/1645614939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTdkMDAzYi01NGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAXPC4e3O_JzCh9rbUp4lxP9SnpUGV7doEILJunNvLw=&emci=be820a1e-70c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=157d003b-54cd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=26828920) The Trump administration is quietly compiling sensitive voter registration data behind closed doors, with no transparency, no oversight, and no regard for the privacy of millions of Americans. It’s a serious abuse of federal power, and it’s already being used to suppress the vote and target voters in key states. **This is a critical moment.** The Trump administration’s misuse of federal power to hoard private voter information is a serious threat to our elections. These officials are standing on the front lines, defending your rights,**but they can’t do it alone.** We must give them the resources and grassroots support to keep fighting, because **the federal government has made clear they’re not backing down.** This is not normal. And we can’t afford to be silent. [**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to help us defend democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120231884/585642099/-248329304?refcode=em-11.29.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTdkMDAzYi01NGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAXPC4e3O_JzCh9rbUp4lxP9SnpUGV7doEILJunNvLw=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120231885/585642100/-248329304?refcode=em-11.29.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTdkMDAzYi01NGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NAXPC4e3O_JzCh9rbUp4lxP9SnpUGV7doEILJunNvLw=)**

name: Governor Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Women will win in 2026. Here's how:
body:
It's time to take care of business |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120232408/585644202/-1510725204?sourceid=1057384&refcode=WUEFEK74_20251129_WhitmerSurrogate_PL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU3MmRhNC01NWNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vg05QVRbX_bft84JxCQ_iui7UNw95WU0Rx9bHtQ1X7A=) Hi Peter,

It's Gretchen Whitmer.

When I last reached out to you, the 2024 election had just shown us how deeply divided Americans are about our vision for our country. Today, we're seeing health care and basic necessities being ripped away from the people who need it most.

Democrats have a clear to-do list. We need to get organized, we need to get energized, and we need to show up for the people who rely on us to make a real difference in their lives.

And the great news is — when we do that, we win. We just saw powerful Democratic victories in 2025, proving that voters are still ready to stand up for reproductive freedom and support leaders who fight for our fundamental rights.

It's time to take care of business, Peter, which, in Democratic politics, means one thing — it's time to look to EMILYs List. **My friends at EMILYs List have been helping Democratic pro-choice women win elections for 40 years and counting. Their role in changing the face of power in American politics can't be overstated, and I'm proud to be an EMILYs List woman myself.[ Their work is entirely donor-supported. Here's what I know for sure: More freedom is better than less. Some rights, like the right to make our own **damn** decisions about our own **damn** bodies, are nonnegotiable. And when more women are at the decision-making table, we all do better.

I'm thrilled that in 2026, a record 10 Democratic women governors will be in office — every single one of them an EMILYs List woman. I'm here to tell you firsthand, Peter: **We need more women in charge of our states.**

Republicans haven't taken a day off from coming after our fundamental freedoms. So we can’t take a day off either. **And coming off strong wins this year, we have real momentum — but only if we keep pushing.** Our victories in the 2025 elections can set the tone for midterms in 2026. Taking back power starts right here and right now.

[**Will you donate to EMILYs List during their End-of-Month drive, Peter? I know they've got a big goal to hit, and I've seen firsthand what a difference this community can make for women running for office everywhere. clean_body: It's time to take care of business | = Hi Peter, It's Gretchen Whitmer. When I last reached out to you, the 2024 election had just shown us how deeply divided Americans are about our vision for our country. Today, we're seeing health care and basic necessities being ripped away from the people who need it most. Democrats have a clear to-do list. We need to get organized, we need to get energized, and we need to show up for the people who rely on us to make a real difference in their lives. And the great news is — when we do that, we win. We just saw powerful Democratic victories in 2025, proving that voters are still ready to stand up for reproductive freedom and support leaders who fight for our fundamental rights. It's time to take care of business, Peter, which, in Democratic politics, means one thing — it's time to look to EMILYs List. My friends at EMILYs List have been helping Democratic pro-choice women win elections for 40 years and counting. Their role in changing the face of power in American politics can't be overstated, and I'm proud to be an EMILYs List woman myself.= | = Here's what I know for sure: More freedom is better than less. Some rights, like the right to make our own damn decisions about our own damn bodies, are nonnegotiable. And when more women are at the decision-making table, we all do better. I'm thrilled that in 2026, a record 10 Democratic women governors will be in office — every single one of them an EMILYs List woman. I'm here to tell you firsthand, Peter: We need more women in charge of our states. Republicans haven't taken a day off from coming after our fundamental freedoms. So we can’t take a day off either. And coming off strong wins this year, we have real momentum — but only if we keep pushing. Our victories in the 2025 elections can set the tone for midterms in 2026. Taking back power starts right here and right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up, Gretchen = Gov. Gretchen Whitmer = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . name: Michael Bennet
subject: sorry to interrupt your Saturday afternoon:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
I know Colorado can provide the vision our country urgently needs. That's why I'm in this race.
| | |
---
Hey, friend – I'm sorry to interrupt your Saturday afternoon, but it couldn't wait.
**[Before I ask you to make the best contribution you can toward my $50,000 goal ahead of the end-of-month deadline tomorrow,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120232837/585645567/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1073-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDI1ZDA1Ni01NmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OSkVsAbxCkja-vmx8mSZxXRLKoE7VtdCbT8zcr0j0c=) I want to make sure we're on the same page about why I'm in this race.**
Colorado is at a critical moment, and right now, we need and deserve a leader who isn’t willing to simply color inside the lines.
For my whole career, I’ve challenged the status quo. Before I went to Washington, I improved student achievement as the Denver Public Schools superintendent. I helped balance the City of Denver’s budget as chief of staff, and I turned around failing businesses in the private sector.
I’ve taken that same spirit to the Senate. I helped expand the Child Tax Credit, which cut childhood poverty nearly in half. I passed a bill to ban insurance companies from surprise hospital bills. I introduced the first bill to ban members of Congress from becoming lobbyists. And I’ve tried to lead by example by rejecting corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money.
I have spent years traveling to every corner of our state, building relationships and convening Coloradans to take on our greatest challenges and solve them.
Wherever I've gone, I have fought for and delivered meaningful change. And I believe that's exactly what Colorado's working families need today.
**_That's_ why I'm running for governor.** Because I know that together, we can rebuild our middle class, make our economy work for us all and make this the best state to raise a family. Together is the only way.
The best line of defense against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda is in the states. And I know Colorado can provide the vision our country urgently needs.
**And with the biggest end-of-month deadline yet of this race just over 24 hours away , this people-powered campaign will not have the resources to make it happen without a groundswell of grassroots support from people like you, starting now.**
**[Every dollar will make a difference in the outcome of this race. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120232995/585645971/-1739126990?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM4_251129_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ2Nzk3YS01NmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iO-NwaPj0kbcBCN3OkG7KSISdbZZOudy8kUpc98Q-Ow=) Derek, here’s the reality:

Republicans have their eyes on this Senate seat, and we’re getting absolutely pummeled with attacks from the far-right.

**First:** Laura Loomer launched an online smear campaign against Mark Warner calling for him to be "tried for treason” and “removed from office.”

**Then:** Donald Trump had a meltdown, attacking Mark from the Oval Office, calling him a "bad senator," and attempting to undermine Warner’s record delivering for Virginia.

**Now: Not one. Not two. BUT THREE far-right Republicans have announced their campaign against Mark Warner.**

[_**Can you rush a $5 donation before our critical end-of-month deadline to help protect this seat from Republican attacks and flip the Senate blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120232996/585645979/-1739126990?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM4_251129_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ2Nzk3YS01NmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iO-NwaPj0kbcBCN3OkG7KSISdbZZOudy8kUpc98Q-Ow=)

We're not going to sugarcoat it, Derek: when you're one of the loudest voices standing up to the Trump administration, the attacks from his allies don't stop – and Mark Warner has been absolutely pummeled with lies and smears.

He’s not going to back down from this fight. He's not going to let online trolls and meltdowns from the president prevent him from serving his constituents and standing up for what's right. But Mark’s going to need our help to keep up the fight.

The more Mark Warner speaks out against Donald Trump and his dangerous administration, the more we need to be prepared for an expensive reelection campaign.

The more Mark Warner speaks out against Donald Trump and his dangerous administration, the more we need to be prepared for an expensive reelection campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Warner Before you go: Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters. And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia. =****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:

| | |

[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1145?t=1&akid=5905%2E400544%2EHb1M8M)
Just $5, friend.
That’s the donation I’m asking you to make before midnight **tomorrow** to support my campaign for governor of New Mexico.
| [Pitch in $5 ](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1332?t=2&akid=5905%2E400544%2EHb1M8M)
---
Nov. 30 is our next major fundraising deadline, and with GOP megadonors already lining up to buy this race, it's crucial we show the strength of our grassroots campaign.
$5 will help us reach our ambitious goal of raising $50,000 ahead of our end-of-month deadline, helping us fight back against the flood of far-right attacks that are sure to come our way.
$5 will help us launch TV and digital ads, ramp up our statewide organizing and continue traveling to every corner of the state to build undeniable support from New Mexicans everywhere.
**But we still need a lot of supporters to chip in $5 between now and our end-of-month deadline, friend.**
**_[So please, will you make a donation of $5 – or whatever you can spare – right now?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1332?t=3&akid=5905%2E400544%2EHb1M8M)_**
| [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1332?t=4&akid=5905%2E400544%2EHb1M8M)

Be fierce,

Deb

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN HARRIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/KDlagQ5jganfjvrW-P6fyQ~~/AAPPABA~/uNTWrN9nTAapnzGHUGOomkxL9AiNB1zZE0fT7vWGOnw4AzgcGsQpJlQrJoPUn4IdUjFMtxSTPhymONxwEYxe9P3mrBS2ToKBxusmDC-RDdzapn79LJ6lmr-mGVJvFmgGfIj0SDGcgEH4Rimiu9wiI47n7xHY0uCWR5hJ86n_QxPS-epgPLgr9vXcval6--dEN3P9kHSCBjO3CJQbBbKlMwYUAEkUZQDmxZg8K2kP-VcakgZIJ9pM50RVPrwy-_2rI1az3_H7W-Ax4gcKQNjWFBd4BweyE-t9Tt00QCucUncPgA2tC9EiTrTnQchJK6oz)
---
Marjorie Taylor Greene's resignation has set off a political earthquake. **A special election is coming. The entire country will be watching. And this district -- our district -- could determine who controls Congress.** I'm Shawn Harris. Democrat. Husband. Father. Retired Brigadier General. Farmer. And I'm running to represent Northwest Georgia with the seriousness, steadiness, and leadership it's been missing for years.
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/ZcfV73_7V3M8YAVnprOOqw~~/AAPPABA~/PLckhnQZZjCE73jU2j4TklUB9iDKEf7uIpznApZFUgI42ZtRTOO1udmxEpmFYRBnOZguvb2bhXpIIqgvenME6i8YZBVWre18gTMMVf4Y2kZAqijhyDpRL_evBUriLfc-eA0k0oOjTBl_-FrDl28WSftDR3Fmys72Yl6-XURQrG7VIAsfWw7QRuefol0JjLr7VeOG_arNCEWf1aa8nb_T_QvYf_RnD98Ow-l-qqD93BM1tOjtEhKc4QeMLQkFoj0l7PPKYjDlhmHo_7WRKwHLoZ26M5QA6-diozl5LqYIBqzReJOFf2Mc7igblAfXgQd5)
---
MTG's resignation isn't the end of the disaster she created -- not yet. **If Republicans hold this seat, they 'll elect another extremist determined to follow her lead. Another conspiracy theorist. Another chaos candidate.
