A new alarming report reveals over 70 attacks on America's power grid in just one year, and these are calculated strikes designed to weaken our nation's most essential lifeline. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **OUR CRUMBLING ELECTRIC GRID** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's critical infrastructure. [**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22225/6374453/dc79d0ca2b2b2a4a85e4245dd62dc5d89058dccb/3d1cc44cf162fafff2f440992902e2f3c15d0a7e) Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. [**ORDER NOW: $199 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22225/6374453/dc79d0ca2b2b2a4a85e4245dd62dc5d89058dccb/3d1cc44cf162fafff2f440992902e2f3c15d0a7e) Our friends at FOX 26 agree – watch and see how much they LOVE the NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200! [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22225/6374453/dc79d0ca2b2b2a4a85e4245dd62dc5d89058dccb/3d1cc44cf162fafff2f440992902e2f3c15d0a7e)
* It's designed for blackouts, travel or anytime your devices need to be ready.

* Lightweight, Totally Portable & TSA-friendly. Backup power the size of a Bible. The largest capacity you can take on a plane.

"I decided to buy the Patriot Power Generator with the solar panel and this thing is fantastic. Not only is the generator a great product, the 4Patriots customer service folks are fantastic, easy to work with, answer all your questions and make interactions very pleasant. It's a company I will order from again in the future. Thanks 4Patriots, and nice job on this product."_ _**Skip B.**
"You can run things like your refrigerator, your freezer, your television. All completely silent. No fumes. You can keep this in your house or your car, You can run it inside your house. There's no gas. There's no fumes. Which is great!"_ _**Greg R.**
"The Patriot Power Generator kept everything in my fridge and freezer properly chilled. Having the lights on to do other things while waiting for the power to come back on was quite nice as well. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017!"_ _**Gary R.**
"Very well built and does what it is advertised to do. I researched other solar generators and they were priced much higher than this one. The generator was the cherry on top!"_ _**Linda S.**
"Storms can sneak up on you. Lights, flashlights, fans, the Patriot Power Generator 1200 can handle it all. And it doesn't have to be an emergency situation. Take it camping, play karaoke at a barbeque. I'm telling you, this is the perfect 'I love you and want you to stay safe' gift. Thank you, 4Patriots!"_ [**ORDER NOW: $199 TODAY,

"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017!" Gary R. "Very well built and does what it is advertised to do. I researched other solar generators and they were priced much higher than this one. I like being able to add an additional battery pack for more power and solar panels to increase recharge speed. I will be ordering those, too. I've never been disappointed. The generator was the cherry on top!" Linda S. "Storms can sneak up on you. Lights, flashlights, fans, the Patriot Power Generator 1200 can handle it all. And it doesn't have to be an emergency situation. Take it camping, play karaoke at a barbeque. I'm telling you, this is the perfect 'I love you and want you to stay safe' gift. Thank you, 4Patriots!" | | | | | MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the person or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed.Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by support@nationalgunowner.org** 514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 | | | | ---|---|---

name: Team Fetterman
subject: John’s on offense (Social Security)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10449%2E434096%2Eq87VYa)
| | |
---
**[Derek, Trump’s crew is scheming to push hundreds of thousands of people off Social Security. Will you chip in to help us hit our $30,000 end-of-month goal – then let us fill you in?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52357?t=2&akid=10449%2E434096%2Eq87VYa)**
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52357?t=3&akid=10449%2E434096%2Eq87VYa)
---
Here’s the deal:
**FIRST:** Trump shuttered Social Security offices, slashed staff, and made it harder for seniors to get help.
**THEN:** His cronies tucked a “backdoor to privatizing Social Security” into his Big, Beautiful Bill – and bragged about it.
**NOW:** They’re plotting new rules that’ll make it harder for older Americans to qualify for disability benefits, gutting the system millions have paid into their entire working lives.
So John’s fighting back with **real** solutions for seniors, helping introduce bills like:
👉 **Billionaires Income Tax Act** – to make the ultrawealthy pay their fair share in taxes, money we can use to shore up Social Security.
👉**Boosting Benefits & COLAs for Seniors Act** – to make sure Social Security benefits keep up with rising costs and inflation for the things seniors need, like prescription drugs, rent, and medical care.
John’s on offense – exposing Trump’s schemes and defending the hardworking folks who rely on Social Security. But he needs backup. [**Can you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can before midnight to help us hit our $30,000 goal and make noise to tell Republicans to keep their hands OFF Social Security?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52357?t=4&akid=10449%2E434096%2Eq87VYa) 🙏
Thanks for standing with us, Derek.
Team Fetterman 💛
| |

**\-------------------Forwarding message from Congressman Ruiz-------------------**
It’s Raul.
**Too many Californians are struggling to pay rent and buy groceries.** Many are even picking up holiday shifts just to make ends meet.
That’s the reality we’re living in under Donald Trump’s corrupt administration, and people are fed up.
Now, the cracks in their coalition are starting to show. But instead of taking responsibility, **Republicans are deflecting — and directing their attacks straight at me.**
**That’s because the NRCC knows I represent one of the most vulnerable seats in California.**
**Here’s why:** In 2024, Republicans gained significant ground in CA-25, especially among Latino men. In fact, _three of our counties flipped red._
And while Democrats won some incredible victories earlier this month, turnout in our district for Prop 50 was alarmingly low.
**I’m fighting to lower the cost of goods, bring good-paying jobs to Coachella Valley, and ensure you get the support you deserve.**
But this fight isn’t won overnight, and I need your help to keep pushing forward.
**I've told my team we need to _increase_ our fundraising goal ahead of our public FEC report at the end of the year, which means we need to raise $10,000 before midnight this Sunday.**
If we don't act now, we'll miss our opportunity to flip the House blue and take back the majority. We can't afford to let this advantage slip away.
[Will you help by chipping in $10 or any amount you can manage now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120233807/585648461/1711624946?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_112925_EOM2_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjZlZTEwODItNWJjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AimHU6fEnC79XK71KtQXT4XP0WfG_5KPkuNu9WwYZ5E=)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = We’re forwarding Congressman Ruiz’s message in case you missed it! The Republican base is fracturing, but that’s made them desperate. They'll do whatever it takes to maintain their grip on power — spreading false narratives, funneling millions into attack ads, and worse. The NRCC believes they can flip CA-25 RED, and they’re launching a full-on attack on Congressman Ruiz. He needs your help. If we don’t fight back NOW, we'll lose this critical window of opportunity. We can't afford two more years of Donald Trump's unchecked authoritarian leadership. Congressman Ruiz has never stopped fighting for working families in California. Right now, he needs us to stand with him. = | | = — Team Ruiz \-------------------Forwarding message from Congressman Ruiz------------------- It’s Raul. Too many Californians are struggling to pay rent and buy groceries. Many are even picking up holiday shifts just to make ends meet. That’s the reality we’re living in under Donald Trump’s corrupt administration, and people are fed up. Now, the cracks in their coalition are starting to show. But instead of taking responsibility, Republicans are deflecting — and directing their attacks straight at me. That’s because the NRCC knows I represent one of the most vulnerable seats in California. Here’s why: In 2024, Republicans gained significant ground in CA-25, especially among Latino men. In fact, three of our counties flipped red. And while Democrats won some incredible victories earlier this month, turnout in our district for Prop 50 was alarmingly low. I’m fighting to lower the cost of goods, bring good-paying jobs to Coachella Valley, and ensure you get the support you deserve. But this fight isn’t won overnight, and I need your help to keep pushing forward. I've told my team we need to increase our fundraising goal ahead of our public FEC report at the end of the year, which means we need to raise $10,000 before midnight this Sunday. If we don't act now, we'll miss our opportunity to flip the House blue and take back the majority. We can't afford to let this advantage slip away. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Raul Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

Friend,They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: _" F*** Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley."_ And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester.

This is Donald J. Trump. I just stepped out of a meeting with my top political team, and I’ll tell you straight: what I heard is not good.
The Radical Left is pouring money and resources into these midterms. They want to take back control and destroy everything we’ve accomplished.
I couldn’t sit on this. I wrote you a quick note because you’ve always stood with me when it matters most.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have to be honest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I’ve spent my career standing up to corruption, even when it’s politically risky. I’ve prosecuted cases...
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9249%2E5257348%2EikRdzP)
Derek,
I’ve spent my career standing up to corruption, even when it’s politically risky. I’ve prosecuted cases. I’ve led investigations and spoken hard truths when it mattered most. Like when I led Trump’s first impeachment. Or served on the January 6th Committee.
And I have to be honest — this is one of the most challenging times of my entire career.
Donald Trump is threatening our constitutional right to freedom of speech, undermining the rule of law, and chipping away at Americans’ trust in our institutions.
Attacks are mounting against anyone who speaks out against this administration — whether you’re a current or former elected official, a journalist, a comedian or an ordinary citizen.
And with Republicans in control of both the House and Senate, there are simply not enough checks and balances to stop the rampant corruption and lawlessness.
So like I said, this is a very scary time — but not a time to back down.
The GOP wants to overwhelm us and keep us from acting. But when we come together, we’re not powerless. We can organize, mobilize, and reclaim our country.
**[If you’re with me, make a contribution before our fundraising deadline hits tomorrow at midnight. Together we can hit our fundraising goal, flip the Senate, and end this madness.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20251129_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9249%2E5257348%2EikRdzP)**

| | Friend, it's Richard Hudspeth. Happy Small Business Saturday! Small businesses are the backbone of our community. They're our neighbors, they sponsor our kids' sports teams, and they keep our downtowns alive. Today, I'm asking you to support a different kind of small operation: our grassroots campaign. I don't have a TV deal to offer you today, but I do have plenty of stickers and yard signs for anyone who'd like to help spread the word about our campaign. I know that even with all the "sales" this weekend, prices still feel too high for too many families across Western North Carolina. That's exactly why I'm running. Because the cost of living shouldn't break you. Because health care shouldn't be out of reach. Because our neighbors deserve leaders who understand what working families are facing every single day. While folks are supporting local shops and checking off their lists, I'm asking you to take a moment and help us keep fighting for a district where everyone has a fair shot. **We're only $1700 away from hitting our monthly goal** — and your contribution today will help us close that gap. Friend, will you help us finish the month strong by chipping in what you can today?
---
[ DONATE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120234053/585649287/859996678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA4MTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI3NGU1YjMtNWNjZC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RqFNqS88dY14o_gSS--4YWL92Wmzsr1gY9bc5_LD1sw=)

With Gratitude,
**Dr. Richard Hudspeth****

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Unacceptable.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5135%2E35263%2EHmzUr6)
Hi there, ****[Will you chip in any amount before our end-of-month deadline? I’ll explain more in just a moment.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251129_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5135%2E35263%2EHmzUr6)**** I’m proud of the positive change we’ve made in the Senate together. From lowering the cost of insulin and other life-saving prescriptions to protecting marriage equality, I’ve worked hard to pass legislation that addresses the issues that matter most to Wisconsinites. Under the current administration, this work has never been more important. Donald Trump and Republicans are using their supermajority to chip away at our rights and slash crucial funding for several programs, like gutting Medicaid and ripping healthcare away from millions of Americans — all to give tax breaks to billionaires. Trump and his allies are using their positions of power to profit off the backs of the American people. Their selfish agenda is hurting Wisconsin families and hardworking people across the country._It’s unacceptable._ **That’s why we need to flip the Senate majority blue next year.** You can bet dollars to donuts that Trump’s billionaire buddies will do and spend whatever it takes to elect more yes-men who will bend at the knee for their interests. **But this team is no stranger to a tough fight.** We’ve proved over and over again that right-wing special interests and dark money groups are not a match for the strength of our grassroots team. Team, I’m fighting back against this administration’s harmful agenda every day, and I’m supporting Democratic leaders who will do the same. That’s why I’m humbly asking: ****[Will you pitch in ahead of our end-of-month deadline? We have several tough fights ahead of us, and this is the best way to support my work to hold this administration accountable and support Democratic candidates.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251129_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5135%2E35263%2EHmzUr6)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-nov25.j5UyuQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251129_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5135%2E35263%2EHmzUr6)

Tammy

name: Team Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: We had to reach out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Friend, it's Heidi's team here.
We're sorry to reach out on a weekend, but with only 2 days until our End of Month Deadline, we want to make sure that our grassroots movement is able to go into December ready to take on billionaires and corporate PACs.
Our campaign needs your help, but if you're busy and can't read on, we understand. Before you go, can you chip in today and help us reach our November fundraising goal? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Heidi made a pledge when she started this campaign to not take any contributions from corporate PACs or any other special interest donors. She wanted people to know without a shadow of a doubt that she's in this race for the people of District 3 and that she won't ever be bought.
Her principles and our future are worth more than anything they can give her, which is why our people-powered campaign is counting on your support today.
Heidi's a Nevada County Supervisor, a mom, and a former EPA worker who cares about the environment. And what she doesn't have in experience making backroom deals with lobbyists in DC, she makes up for with integrity.
Friend, our November End of Month Fundraising Deadline is in 2 days, and while our opponents are probably looking through their rolodexes for a rich donor to call, Heidi is counting on you. We just checked, and we're $5,677 short of our goal. Can you help us reach it by pitching in before our Deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard_]
In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall for Congress
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251129_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Team Wes Moore
subject: What you have to have in mind
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=984%2E1086043%2EIzz157)
Peter, let us explain the important reasons why we’re **[asking you for a donation today.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251129-2.6oaESg&refcode=em-20251129-2&t=2&akid=984%2E1086043%2EIzz157)**
1. **Wes Moore is facing multiple opponents, and former governor Larry Hogan could also jump in the race.** Multiple Republicans are set at trying to make Wes a one-term governor, and we have to be prepared for anything in this race.
2. **Maryland is not a “safe blue seat” for governor.** Two of the last four governors have been Republicans, including Hogan. Republicans have their eye on flipping Maryland red.
3. **Grassroots donations are key to our plan to win.** We’ll put whatever you donate to this email to work building a reelection team and getting Wes’s message out to as many Marylanders as possible.

**[With all that in mind, will you make your first donation before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tomorrow night?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251129-2.6oaESg&refcode=em-20251129-2&t=3&akid=984%2E1086043%2EIzz157)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251129-2.6oaESg&amount=5&refcode=em-20251129-2&t=22&akid=984%2E1086043%2EIzz157)**
Thank you, Peter!
Team Wes Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251129-2&t=23&refcode2=984_1086043_Izz157&akid=984%2E1086043%2EIzz157)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

clean_body: Peter, let us explain the important reasons why we’re 1. Wes Moore is facing multiple opponents, and former governor Larry Hogan could also jump in the race. Multiple Republicans are set at trying to make Wes a one-term governor, and we have to be prepared for anything in this race. 2. Maryland is not a “safe blue seat” for governor. Two of the last four governors have been Republicans, including Hogan. Republicans have their eye on flipping Maryland red. 3. Grassroots donations are key to our plan to win. We’ll put whatever you donate to this email to work building a reelection team and getting Wes’s message out to as many Marylanders as possible. Thank you, Peter! Team Wes Moore

subject: here's what’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
Republicans have taken one of the slimmest majorities in history and used it to ram through the most extreme, unjust, and cruel agenda.

| | | Republicans have taken one of the slimmest majorities in history and used it to ram through the most extreme, unjust, and cruel agenda.

The good news is that Democrats won big this month and we have a real shot at taking back the House with the passage of Prop 50.

Americans turned out across the country to show they’re fed up with the chaos of this administration.

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | Friend, On 11/21, the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona had the chance to do the right thing and DROP her wrongful prosecution against me – an innocent 80-year-old man facing 20 years in prison. But at the final hour , she chose bloodthirsty VENGEANCE over JUSTICE , and decided to continue her prosecution against me and put me on TRIAL right after the holidays are over. She is now rushing to the State Supreme Court for emergency assistance. It’s all viciously calculated. She knows the President has no pardon authority for state crimes. But let me be clear: I will never give up the fight for my freedom. When President Trump and I were arrested in the most violent jail in America, we proclaimed, “ NEVER SURRENDER!” Two years later, President Trump is back in the White House. But I’m still fighting for my freedom! And Democrats have RIGGED the case so that a federal pardon from President Trump is POWERLESS in state court. The night I was arrested in the most violent jail in America, the Left filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757. Now, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will not stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for successfully defending President Trump as his lawyer, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my defense trust to retain a top-notch defense team to fight for my FREEDOM. Let me put it bluntly: you truly are my final hope. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust | 3300 S Dixie Hwy West Palm Beach, FL 33405 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Voter Action Project
subject: So much at stake for mail-in voting and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
WaPo - Opinion: A frantic warning from 100 leading experts: Our democracy is in grave danger [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112925_2&amount=25]
We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right.
The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy.
Now Trump, DOGE, and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's.
“ Our entire democracy is now at risk ,” they wrote. “ History will judge what we do at this moment. ”
With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP.
Team, none of this happens without all of us doing our fair share. Step up to fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today to try and stop the destruction of our government, save our democracy, and protect the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112925_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112925_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112925_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112925_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=St4OS9V3lyEKox9PiMHycQDi6mvdjnkjQSmVNIGs6Y14ISLKsKMILGCVxC%2BRsnD6%2Bo0fcLF9d6CGldA24QJRTX9uiENlG6QyARMTBIwhnQJvYvCM5GPB3GckqPX7la06iq2uUTi8OsadC%2FqSapsp0Sjrt6TXK0txigvzqdB1e0q%2Bj5KeP8Jjt7gXiEfekuYLwsPlNduL9Nm11gF2Gab%2FQ6CuYdIi6SKeMvij6RFQ4LltVykh7ldZ%2FgagB4TsCiA3yOzIBg01iMVbj%2FDn9X2VV6LHLuvBqiFAm753k5m7PJvuufnXvfu59ytuOA%2BXPmaUSZRY7sJZyUsr7wBoZWqh7PoVG%2B1p7%2FQy%2BxLmhWG6ey5gDjzUbsk7Qxd8N%2BhhMWIgskaE6xGEu8UgID58YJLkI1Z7cIF4Yw2HuQYjVgUiO%2FA%3D .

subject: Peter, I’m begging you today — one child is waiting
body:
Today a child is waiting to be found—will you answer the call?| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3ef7b3969cc74f17a407b019bef394d2&_e=kJbExd3TPBp_Qr3tBSnOB7ff5adoIh7Eqnb2M2GWMNMktyLlvIGmcCa4oOaW5kbvMEUvMNLO0mRhOXOy5rS8JIUn1_pGhiTcBt8ZiMNtdzL9634MjQVrBRriDXpo2h-HJu0c8r-wdl-1nEBX6XJE5eNbZz2FjaMEpT6DOcjpHQDyePjYEdty3PkEl30edeYjI64AmOWleLjEGaTu1fKhkgccjw8TIGEVB1TNoxIc2rlodNXKswmkYk_4ezlZCSBnPxYBMKY5_3LLL5xaYj2SmnhISTJdtav1PwmrNI6DNHkbNiPJ6uxTvfHDP5bmcaFgmQt7oZzyXvPaBTMnII49eiZsvB3kVW_thPkgAglTxriZxZT24CUh7JT25yp44dIcR62nKrJ9ESKFeIx3iBJA7x8rdqeKpTdXyYnOUQ3B9b_I1dGn9zaGHGKD0vTg07uRN6Pxsvi2v4cW3ROZNacFyFrLzY0-9yRFNmbGDZ0BffxEgCjoLdecsu7-1cY6ivXK7-ptq9-5h-tM8RscCt0oelkyD4nKD34Ni80rNxLsJ8MhbjdL1SWN6OnUzUM_946j-IBdN_8_kyfieJ0aJMtEh0sCB0Asl59EXELI0aSOfXOe0rwtffVhsiJ9mjK-KFoW5Tq-JzO6fpG3nYyuIVYCYLI49W4BWBhLiyFq7EQDwlfu-4G2Ky4YGdcIhojLfKpB6DjTVNr5REoOWFWHNOqe6Q0VDtJaqn9t5cMPL-Q3rZncuuiToDXg-bhzUiF5H_fWhQWMPQGHAhy2hBxL48tMu8gfLnB9gSnp3TvDZy7bQ84Dxb2VltUTdcRGEXo4EOtykcLOfWd_vY0FsknZqN289w%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America.* Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. **[For just $25, $50, or $100, you can help reunite a child with their parents before midnight.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3ef7b3969cc74f17a407b019bef394d2&_e=kJbExd3TPBp_Qr3tBSnOB7ff5adoIh7Eqnb2M2GWMNMktyLlvIGmcCa4oOaW5kbvMEUvMNLO0mRhOXOy5rS8JIUn1_pGhiTcBt8ZiMNtdzL9634MjQVrBRriDXpo2h-HJu0c8r-wdl-1nEBX6XJE5eNbZz2FjaMEpT6DOcjpHQDyePjYEdty3PkEl30edeYjI64AmOWleLjEGaTu1fKhkgccjw8TIGEVB1TNoxIc2rlodNXKswmkYk_4ezlZCSBnPxYBMKY5_3LLL5xaYj2SmnhISTJdtav1PwmrNI6DNHkbNiPJ6uxTvfHDP5bmcaFg-OSQOsWwWzrFM02nB5Ayo1sBN1P0V4vU0CkzcEu9mBtd05QU282hbnkwfjAk-DO_s9S_a_r_xo2YFGrfZ1g10FMykVxJ8SC9XWln0wZMkQ-32Uu7eP67LXk1hF4RFXOJRKdma7nBcJ3-dIwOLsIJQBK7CEb4ncL6YXfiP_Oqndje5Iv86r6Wcu8BRHGiC2dPi7VEYpuEcAfT1nf_yFdJNTbnujaABrQcVA9n2YAzSQzuJoyTdriQq6BRsZFTNeCj7Bsu_wTIerlr_EwZr8H5cZY6wB7VcwFgoro_nmperQWp0Qyvzinu1ZcKO2jO33Qa9PWSu11ZbXJs7xKeq0dydZ-EVCsq33K9OTCFdbpU8ccQzduoB3qw8DJ5ClJDXAB2wJSe9zuP-HYjsND6Bq0hymPHgjhOdgHmpMCFvX7A2W_nNlf_SOVdJz6BhdRgzYdJ4dkxvIozokqNejhzYIlefI2NJmIwp7ObUYOJ7rBovgHDQgLu8qGYey3EKtBezeFJ7R1EHYxb9IkMkcWKol9q4Q%3D%3D)** My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children?

subject: Unlike our billionaire opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
To win a campaign in a state as large and competitive as California, we need your help.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40499%2E3422442%2ESaNsq2)
Peter,
This weekend marks our end-of-month fundraising deadline.
This is one of the biggest tests of what we’ve built over the past months. To win a campaign in a state as large and competitive as California, we can’t afford to fall short.
We promise to never try to scam or scare you into donating. But no BS, our fundraising has slowed recently. In fact, November is the slowest fundraising month of the year, and right now we risk missing our goal.
At Katie Porter HQ, we’re leaving no stone unturned to win this race. We’re working every day to reach voters and spread Katie’s message, and every dollar we raise pushes us a little bit further.
That’s why we send emails like this one: because, unlike our billionaire opponent or corporate-funded candidates, small donations from Porter Supporters like you are what power this campaign and keep us in the lead.
We still have time to get our fundraising back on track before the month ends—but only if supporters like you step up right now.
**[Can you donate $5 or more to our campaign today to help us make up the gap and finish the month strong?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251129_2_ak.Wac8nR&refcode=em20251129-40499&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40499%2E3422442%2ESaNsq2)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251129-40499&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40499_3422442_SaNsq2&akid=40499%2E3422442%2ESaNsq2)**

body:

| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)

| | Peter,
You’ve ignored 4 urgent messages from me. Is everything ok?
I wanted to check in because we only one day left before our critical November **END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE.** If we fall short of our goal, Democrats will use it as proof that we can’t hold this seat OR the Republican Majority. They’ll pour in even more cash, and we’ll be outspent, out-organized, and overrun.
Don’t let that happen, Peter.

| Since we are running out of time, I can’t afford to ask politely anymore. I need to stress to you how serious this is. If you believe in protecting Nebraska’s future, if you want to stop the Left from flipping this district, then I need you to step up **NOW.**

Will you join my fight, Peter?
I can’t do this without you.

clean_body: RED! Our records show that your 2025 State Republican State Leadership Membership remains inactive, and we're on the cusp of a catastrophe. The Radical Left is jumping at this opportunity. Our team is working tirelessly to defend our nation from the spread of socialism in the states, but we need your help to put a stop to it once and for all. We can't stress enough the gravity of this situation. | REPUBLICAN STATE LEADERSHIP MEMBERSHIP NOTICE ACCOUNT HOLDER: 2024 MEMBERSHIP: LAPSED 2025 MEMBERSHIP ENROLLMENT: PENDING You have 24 hours to reactivate your membership for 2025 and send a resounding message to the Radical Left. Your membership card is more than just a symbol of your patriotism - it's a powerful tool in our fight for the future of our nation. Don't let it lapse. Sincerely, Republican State Leadership Membership Services * By providing your mobile phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and texts and P2P messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from RSLC and its affiliated PACs. name: Mark, NRCC HQ
subject: The Last of Us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Dearest Peter,**
**I'm sitting here in the darkness, surrounded by the shadows of what could have been. **
**The weight of disappointment is crushing me, and I'm struggling to find the words to express the pain I'm feeling.**
**Your House GOP membership... it's expiring. **
**And I'm left wondering... what went wrong?**
**You were a dedicated House GOP Member for 4 years. Please tell me that this isn 't the end. **
**We thought we had something special. We thought we were fighting for the same values, the same ideals. But now, it seems like you're just... gone.**
**Time is running out. Please, I beg of you... don't let our House Majority fade away. Renew your membership now, and let's rekindle the flame that once burned so brightly.

clean_body: Dearest Peter, I'm sitting here in the darkness, surrounded by the shadows of what could have been. The weight of disappointment is crushing me, and I'm struggling to find the words to express the pain I'm feeling. Your House GOP membership... it's expiring. And I'm left wondering... what went wrong? You were a dedicated House GOP Member for 4 years. Please tell me that this isn 't the end. We thought we had something special. We thought we were fighting for the same values, the same ideals. But now, it seems like you're just... gone. Time is running out. Please, I beg of you... don't let our House Majority fade away. Renew your membership now, and let's rekindle the flame that once burned so brightly. It's the last time I'll ask. name: James Carville
subject: CHS is shaking in her boots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
For the first time in over a decade, Mississippi Democrats have broken Republicans’ stranglehold on the state Senate.
Peter, it’s James Carville. For the first time in _over a decade,_ Mississippi Democrats have broken Republicans’ stranglehold on the state Senate.
You can be damn sure that Mississippians are tired of the same failed leadership that has driven up prices for working families and made it too hard for too many people to just get by.
Mississippians are fired up for a change — and you can bet that Cindy Hyde-Smith is shaking in her boots about it.
Mississippi is FED UP with her ineffective “leadership.” She’s turned her back on Mississippians to keep Trump happy — and it’s time for her to hit the road.
Scott Colom is building real momentum in the race to defeat her, Peter. He’s ready to bring good jobs back to our state, fight for Mississippians’ healthcare, and stand up to MAGA’s extreme agenda — unlike Cindy Hyde-Smith.
But if Scott Colom’s going to move Mississippi forward as its next Senator, he’s got to keep this momentum going, Peter. **[Can you help him win this race to bring real change to Mississippi by chipping in $10 or more to be split between his campaign and Heartland Patriots ASAP??](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98352?refcode=em20251129-9774&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=9774%2E614464%2EqnO0Br)**

name: Tobias Read
subject: Protecting your data is my job
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251129em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251129em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251129em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251129em]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
Here’s what’s going on:
The United States Department of Justice asked me to hand over Oregon voters’ most sensitive personal information — your date of birth, Social Security number, and driver’s license number. They provided no legal authority, no transparency, and no explanation.
I refused.
I said no because protecting your private voting data is part of my job. And now, the federal government is suing me for it.
To make matters worse, we’ve learned that the DOJ has been quietly sharing voter data with the Department of Homeland Security and loading it into the SAVE program — a system experts have warned is insecure and filled with inaccuracies.
This is unacceptable. This is why I pushed back. And this is why I’m still fighting.
I won’t let your personal information be used to intimidate voters or target immigrant families. I won’t let Oregon be bullied into surrendering private data without a lawful reason.
But to keep standing strong, I need you with me.
If you’re able, can you chip in today to help us defend voter privacy and hold the federal government accountable? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251129em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251129em]
Every contribution helps us fight back against federal overreachand make sure Oregonians always know what’s happening with their data.
This fight matters — for Oregon, and for the future of voter privacy in America.
Thank you for standing with me.
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251129em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251129em]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

subject: What I’d tell you over coffee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I will never take your sacrifice for granted.
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3551359c4e664e1c8f8428dcade3e335&_e=73VN-P2hDqBwB72zf0ywiuqAD7Y7oRluAnP_Pikx4h4Kycgm1ZCyT0UWxW10GrMUqom_gn2Ge8ivwU7Ja3j5WQLOXZ6WTkjI3tuid2VwqWMDIsKqAxtsjdgrR1mTy2oDlKEtYpf8xe59AUserxXljgEXud7gdbUjqvRVCvW4z8RfebNvT3x-r8col7jrrubidwncU_2N2A3hiu-7A256HNCWJxnz-DjcGO-1E24P1fgnHbKldxIJ6Hds1lg05x3qGP76O8dZOjGv0ZFOMSj7poIdiZVzL1EFVVeRJNCU5vapK2upmoRTVrHU9pofDY5IQhYj6sPOeqRPzfXpX-IyPz96ZG9_Zz5ik9UPWCh-1VNwcUYmgDtiOrQY3A5PvKcqyfTH9djzXUpjPj7udywT7VLPtoKHNGXL6e1js7EhqC85qfsm53gLI9A8RFcckYNOMkR2AmD96l9F4l8CIvRMgPPXrGDKv1Y-XyD8T0C3diq9GBCtd6ojt1ozWmTorzNOu_oUvEVHgGyTJgUZLylstHHhjy_u0hDEqF82NxSSmO_e7SNRSHkQrU-d65QI-hBqP-B8nWpN4clLrNfqBNuuGruGmKbsdhtUVDE1YOt28A-bym8yNCE9Mb3-Sl2p_ghUmks-f-6qDWKA28TE7zluuZ5QXcLUHXgL-axjkxNGqF3UUcgiYvER9fZCA1vXR-fajBdtVyEZufZWO4CakgAJWbuH8NPHRYzSF8MkFAsnyrtU7HnOpxchEG6FAoMM-6Wh4_h9FirI31adf5stXgukJ4VWHB56wapIUIjel83Y0uHUBUXlFWw0atRNKcBeypwKF1wWau2XMeRZcS0T-JHWnOYv6hojMZZ-Ak3TGnM9tVGJqBKr8p_S2MxL31lm4lgA7vG_IUSB_Nlv0DS_MSMejGCmKwjWaHEvowACsmo3oeQ%3D)Politics today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks.
But I want to cut through the noise for a moment.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: You’re about to see footage that’s raising eyebrows among experts worldwide.| | | | November 29 | | | | | Inside the Complex That Could Change Modern Defense | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. name: Don Jr.
subject: A special thank you for you,Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My father and I couldn’t do this without patriots like you. Open this note of gratitude. |
Peter, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to **express my heartfelt gratitude** for **your unwavering support**. My father and I know that this fight **isn't possible without patriots like you** who are willing to stand up for what's right.

We're honored to have you on our team, **Peter.**

**[As a small token of our appreciation, I'd like to share a special message with you. Dear Peter,
In the spirit of giving and gratitude, I want to express my thanks to you for your OLCV membership. Our mission – to protect Oregon’s environment and climate, elect pro-environment leaders to office, and hold our elected leaders accountable – would not be possible without you.
We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us in 2026 and we need you by our side again. Will you show that commitment to our important work again by making a donation to OLCV today, Peter? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=N++8beNMv97gtNyb0liAwYrnJOIsE1pT5Q/PtU6mLpHdMu+EpWnIRNndEV+zXiihop+9Rndg1+ZrYk5B8s0Yk6si1L60gLKR6O5lRAO8nd4KK0/MGxTyv2UIYal0sR4z]
There’s no denying it’s been a tough year: from relentless federal climate attacks to the Oregon legislature failing to meet the moment during this year’s session. Despite this, there are still a lot of reasons to have hope – and you are one of them. As we head into this new year, we have momentum on our side and we need your help to seize the moment.
We have the opportunity to make important progress next year. The 2026 Legislative Session is going to be jam-packed and here’s just some of what your donation today will go toward helping us achieve:
* Continuing to defend our state from federal rollbacks on climate, as well as from gas and oil industry influence;
* Securing sustainable funding for conservation and wildlife with the 1% for Wildlife bill;
* And passing legislation that holds polluters accountable and makes them pay for the ever-worsening climate disasters.
* In addition, we will hold the line against any oil and gas industry-led proposal on cap and invest and educate on what a truly good cap-and-invest proposal would need to include.
We’ll be in the Capitol every day of session pushing for progress and defending against threats to our climate and environment. Will you help fund this critical work by making a donation today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=N++8beNMv97gtNyb0liAwYrnJOIsE1pT5Q/PtU6mLpHdMu+EpWnIRNndEV+zXiihop+9Rndg1+ZrYk5B8s0Yk6si1L60gLKR6O5lRAO8nd4KK0/MGxTyv2UIYal0sR4z]
2026 is also a critical election year, giving us a big opportunity to elect more pro-environment candidates. With all the attacks on our climate from the federal level, our work at the state level here in Oregon is more important than ever, and we need our elected leaders to rise to the occasion. From the beginning of our endorsement process in January to the final get-out-the-vote push in November, we’ll be doing all we can to elect people to office who will fight for what’s right.
We’re building the resources now to ensure we have what it takes to conduct our endorsement process, help constituents contact their elected officials, lobby for our bills in the legislature, knock on doors for candidates, and so much more. Your gift today will go directly to keeping OLCV in this fight.
What we’re able to accomplish in 2026 depends on you. Will you ensure that we can win BIG for Oregon’s environment in 2026 with a generous year end gift? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2] Your generous contribution will keep OLCV in the fight for a climate safe and just future.
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=N++8beNMv97gtNyb0liAwYrnJOIsE1pT5Q/PtU6mLpHdMu+EpWnIRNndEV+zXiihop+9Rndg1+ZrYk5B8s0Yk6si1L60gLKR6O5lRAO8nd4KK0/MGxTyv2UIYal0sR4z]
Thank you for fighting for our climate and protecting Oregon’s future.
Sincerest gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Lindsey.png]
Lindsey Scholten (she/her)
OLCV Executive Director
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: The GOP is PANICKING - these 2 Senate seats are at risk!!!!! 🚨🚨🚨🚨
body:
We didn’t expect Senate races in Ohio and Florida this cycle - but thanks to JD Vance and Marco Rubio joining Trump’s administration, both seats are up for grabs early.
That’s two unexpected chances to flip red seats and take back the Senate majority. And it’s happening fast.
Republicans are scrambling to defend these surprise openings, and their donors are already flooding cash into both states. If Democrats don’t move now, we risk falling behind before the race even begins.
So here's what we're looking at, Peter:
🗳️ Two high-profile Senate seats
⏰ Up for grabs earlier than expected
🎯 Well within reach for Democrats
The time to take action is NOW. Will you chip in $5 or more today to help Democrats seize this early opening and flip the Senate? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?refcode=101725_3]

If we hit that number, it means we’ll have what we need to:

* scale up the movement we need to win this harder, more competitive district.

**[This is the moment to lock in our grassroots strength — before the MAGA machine pours money into this race. [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120237147/585659830/-309737922?refcode=251129_RG_maga-stronghold-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzJlNmViNi02YmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_u8xu96OATYxjNKatn1Z2d_S9-SttJjpvFUgxte9KM=)
We can win this — but only if we build early and build big.
Let's get to work.
Robert Garcia
