name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Update from Ernest Lineberger, November 29, 2025 ​
body:
[image: image.png]

Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

*About Three Months from Primary Election Day 2026! Time to get busy and
Put the Signs out!*

*For the last year, *we have been working at a low level to get more name
recognition and share our message. We’ve been respectful of other
elections and other events. Now, it is time to raise our flag and work
purposefully to end as much division as possible and bring the district
together behind one candidate for US House in CD26.

*2026 is nothing like 2024!* We have a proven poor opponent in our current
representative. He has a record of supporting bad moves for CD26,
including tariffs and other bad tax and high-cost impacts against our
working-class district, unplanned DOGE cuts to important government
services, threats against judges for doing their jobs, and empowering
extreme executive overreach that would not have been tolerated were the
parties flipped. Plus, we have a primary opponent! In 2024, with no
primary opponent I did not get the press coverage that similar campaigns
with competition received. Also, with two Democratic campaigns working to
send voters to the polls, we ought to get more turnout.

*Affordability and the cost of a reasonable quality of life* are going to
be our number one issue. We will still be for *ALL* people’s rights,
Health care access for all, voting rights, getting money out of politics,
civility in government, having government do its full job and provide
services, and more, But Affordability will be the first item on our list.

*I’m very excited about our Cooke County Congressional Town Hall* coming up
December 10th at 6 PM in NCTC Gainesville Campus, Health Science Lecture
Hall. We have been doing a lot to get the word out with press releases and
more. I hope to fill the venue with people from all backgrounds and show
them that I want to work for what is best for them. The most important
feature of this event is to let the attendees know that I am listening to
them and will work to support them in ways they may not be used to. In
addition to promoting my campaign, I plan to promote Vikki Goodwin for Lt.
Governor and Clayton Tucker for Agriculture Commissioner.

*What’s Next?*

The Primary election is March 3, 2026 with early voting starting February
17, 2026 (80 days away). We are going to push hard in primary season to
take every opportunity to get our message out.

*We have signs*.
If you have one, put it out. 90 days prior to election day is
December 3, 2025. That’s when they can officially go up.
If you have extra, let people know. Find them a good home or make
a plan to put them in an allowed location.
If you need one, find me at an event or request one by replying to
this email with your contact information.

*We will be attending events*.
And it’s often useful to have extra hands to staff a table or show
increased support for the candidate. So, plan to come when you can.

*We will be Block Walking*.
This is more fun than it sounds. Front lines getting our message
out to the many who are unaware, making new friends and allies. Come join
us.

*We will be making calls*.
From the comfort of your own favorite spot, you can be the way our
message reaches others. You help them know and care enough to be part of
the difference.

*How To Get Involved - Volunteer! *

Thanks to those of you who have signed up already. Remember, there is no
obligation on your part. We will put your contact info on our volunteer
list.

>From time to time, when we have emerging needs for volunteers, we will send
out an email to the list saying what we need. If you can help with that,
you reply directly to the email. If not, no action needed on your part.
No need to apologize or send a doctor’s note.

To get on or make sure you are on the volunteer list, just reply to this
email with your preferred contact info.

We have a few champion volunteers now in continuing campaign roles. They
are helping to make events happen and finding more ways to reach more
voters. We always need help with schedule planning, social media coverage,
and more. It’s all part of being part of the solution.

*Donations!*

We are doing all we can to get donations to make sure we have the funds to
defeat Brandon Gill in November. Many of you have already donated. Thank
you! To donate again or to help someone else donate, use my main campaign
website: https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/

*Upcoming Events: *

*Block Walking *

- We had our first group event about a week ago, Saturday, November 22
Noon – 3 PM
- More will be coming soon. They will be announced in an email to
those on the volunteer list. We can’t use Mobilize for our block walks
until after the Primary.
- *Castle Hills Holiday parade and Neighborhood Holiday Event*
- We joined in the parade and the holiday event, mingled and greeted
other participants.
- *Gainesville City Council, to introduce myself and invite others to
the Town hall*
- Tuesday, December 2, 2025, 6:30 PM, 200 S Rusk St, Gainesville
- I’m signed up to speak briefly.
- *Gainesville Christmas Parade, to greet and share with parade
attendees*
- Thursday, December 4th, 6 PM, on California St. Between Red River
St and Commerce St.
- We’ll mingle and greet parade goers and share our message where we
can.
- *Ramp Project with Argyle UMC, Dec 5, 2025, Details TBD*
- *Roanoke Hometown Holiday Street Festival, Dec 6th, Details TBD to
meet and mingle*
- *Detrick Deburr for HD65 campaign launch event*
- Sunday, December 7th, 3 – 5 PM, Nico’s Cocina, Josy and Frankford,
Carrollton
- *MMC Music Ministry Conservatory Christmas Concert*
- Sunday, December 7th, 6-8 PM
- Christ United Methodist Church Farmers Branch, 2807 Valwood Pkwy,
Farmers Branch
- *Callisburg City Council, to introduce myself and invite others to the
Town hall*
- Monday, December 8th, 6:30 PM, 92 McDaniel St. Callisburg, TX 76240
- *Cooke County Congressional Town Hall*
- Wednesday, December 10th, 6 - 8:30 PM
- NCTC Gainesville Campus, Health Science Lecture Hall, 1525 W
California St, Building 600
- *Lewisville Dems Happy Hour – 2nd meeting of this revitalized group*
- Friday, December 12th, 5 – 8 PM
- Prairie House Restaurant, 119 E Main St, Lewisville, TX 75057
- *Early November: A Decision on Redistricting in Texas*
- The court’s decision about redistricting that we had been waiting
for came out in our favor saying that Texas will use the same districts
used in the 2022 and 2024 elections for the 2026 election. *BUT then*
Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito put an emergency temporary
stay on that
decision pending further Supreme Court action. *This puts us back to
using the new and worse gerrymandered districts until further notice*.

*Holidays are approaching*

Whether you have big plans or not. Keep it safe. Take care of yourself in
travels and at home. Remember to reflect on our many blessings and be a
blessing to others.

Thank you so much for your continued support! We are building to make the
2026 election fall in the favor of the people.

Putting People’s Needs First,

Ernest Lineberger

Democratic Candidate for US House of Representatives (Texas CD26)

LinebergerforUScongress.com <http://linebergerforuscongress.com/>

To unsubscribe simply reply “stop” to this email address
clean_body: [image: image.png] Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress! About Three Months from Primary Election Day 2026! Time to get busy and Put the Signs out! For the last year, we have been working at a low level to get more name recognition and share our message. We’ve been respectful of other elections and other events. Now, it is time to raise our flag and work purposefully to end as much division as possible and bring the district together behind one candidate for US House in CD26. 2026 is nothing like 2024! We have a proven poor opponent in our current representative. He has a record of supporting bad moves for CD26, including tariffs and other bad tax and high-cost impacts against our working-class district, unplanned DOGE cuts to important government services, threats against judges for doing their jobs, and empowering extreme executive overreach that would not have been tolerated were the parties flipped. Plus, we have a primary opponent! In 2024, with no primary opponent I did not get the press coverage that similar campaigns with competition received. Also, with two Democratic campaigns working to send voters to the polls, we ought to get more turnout. Affordability and the cost of a reasonable quality of life are going to be our number one issue. We will still be for ALL people’s rights, Health care access for all, voting rights, getting money out of politics, civility in government, having government do its full job and provide services, and more, But Affordability will be the first item on our list. I’m very excited about our Cooke County Congressional Town Hall coming up December 10th at 6 PM in NCTC Gainesville Campus, Health Science Lecture Hall. We have been doing a lot to get the word out with press releases and more. I hope to fill the venue with people from all backgrounds and show them that I want to work for what is best for them. The most important feature of this event is to let the attendees know that I am listening to them and will work to support them in ways they may not be used to. In addition to promoting my campaign, I plan to promote Vikki Goodwin for Lt. Governor and Clayton Tucker for Agriculture Commissioner. What’s Next? The Primary election is March 3, 2026 with early voting starting February 17, 2026 (80 days away). We are going to push hard in primary season to take every opportunity to get our message out. We have signs. If you have one, put it out. 90 days prior to election day is December 3, 2025. That’s when they can officially go up. If you have extra, let people know. Find them a good home or make a plan to put them in an allowed location. If you need one, find me at an event or request one by replying to this email with your contact information. We will be attending events. And it’s often useful to have extra hands to staff a table or show increased support for the candidate. So, plan to come when you can. We will be Block Walking. This is more fun than it sounds. Front lines getting our message out to the many who are unaware, making new friends and allies. Come join us. We will be making calls. From the comfort of your own favorite spot, you can be the way our message reaches others. You help them know and care enough to be part of the difference. How To Get Involved - Volunteer! Thanks to those of you who have signed up already. Remember, there is no obligation on your part. We will put your contact info on our volunteer list. From time to time, when we have emerging needs for volunteers, we will send out an email to the list saying what we need. If you can help with that, you reply directly to the email. If not, no action needed on your part. No need to apologize or send a doctor’s note. To get on or make sure you are on the volunteer list, just reply to this email with your preferred contact info. We have a few champion volunteers now in continuing campaign roles. They are helping to make events happen and finding more ways to reach more voters. We always need help with schedule planning, social media coverage, and more. It’s all part of being part of the solution. Donations! We are doing all we can to get donations to make sure we have the funds to defeat Brandon Gill in November. Many of you have already donated. Thank you! To donate again or to help someone else donate, use my main campaign website: Upcoming Events: Block Walking - We had our first group event about a week ago, Saturday, November 22 Noon – 3 PM - More will be coming soon. They will be announced in an email to those on the volunteer list. name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: Stop. *Record scratch. Freeze frame.*
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
**Stop. *Record scratch. Freeze frame.***
You may be wondering how this young public school teacher on the Westside of San Antonio...
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251129-2-ak&t=1&akid=280%2E1347274%2E6RG_KU)
Ended up here — running in one of the most competitive Senate races in the country with the chance to flip a seat many folks had long written off:
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251129-2-ak&t=2&akid=280%2E1347274%2E6RG_KU)
The truth is, it started before the classroom.
James isn’t just a former middle school teacher, he’s also an eighth-generation Texan.
He learned the courage to do what's right at a young age when his mother left a violent relationship — packing up all of her stuff (and James) into her little Ford Escort to start anew.
James ran for the Texas House in 2018 to fight for his constituents — people like his mom and his students. It was a district no one thought we could win, but he flipped a district Donald Trump had won just two years earlier.
As a state legislator, James went toe-to-toe with the billionaire mega-donors who have taken over our state.
He went up against Big Pharma and other special interests to lower the cost of prescription drugs, child care, and housing.
Now it’s time to bring James’ fight to the U.S. Senate.
But this will not be easy.
We’re going up against those billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. We’re going up against a rigged system. And we’re going up against a lot of money.
But we're in this together. If we believe we can win this race and do what it takes to get it done, we will win.
So with our November fundraising drive coming to a close soon in what has been a slow fundraising month, James is asking:
[**Please make a contribution of $5 or any amount you can afford to James Talarico's campaign for U.S. Senate in Texas. Together we can win this race and give people hope that a better politics is possible.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251129-2-ak&t=3&akid=280%2E1347274%2E6RG_KU)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-launch.3s2pDp&refcode=em251129-2-ak&t=22&akid=280%2E1347274%2E6RG_KU)**

| **[Other Amount](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-launch.jEYg2l&refcode=em251129-2-ak&t=27&akid=280%2E1347274%2E6RG_KU)**

****
James has had our backs. Now let’s have his.
Team Talarico

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=28&akid=280%2E1347274%2E6RG_KU) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=29&refcode2=280_1347274_6RG_KU&akid=280%2E1347274%2E6RG_KU)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=30&akid=280%2E1347274%2E6RG_KU).

name: George Conway
subject: as spineless as they come...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120237449/585660908/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.29_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGJhYWU2My02ZGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=al5p0N9y_bTBPNTBvkOXIYOgAXnlW7fjp3iT_5_Jx1A=)
It’s George Conway. I’ve spent _years_ calling out Donald Trump, the Republican Party, and their enablers! **And if there’s one man who embodies political cowardice more than anyone else, it’s _Lindsey Graham_.**

Here’s the truth: Lindsey Graham is as spineless as they come.

I watched him go from calling Trump a “kook” who was “unfit for office” to becoming Trump’s most loyal lapdog in the Senate. Which is even offensive to dogs because unlike Lindsey Graham _they actually have spines_. Lindsey twists himself into whatever shape necessary to kiss Trump’s 🫏. It’s pathetic. And it’s dangerous.

South Carolina needs a Senator with a backbone. Someone strong enough to stand up to corruption and special interests to put our communities first. That’s why I’m supporting Dr. Annie Andrews, and I’m asking you to support her campaign today too. | | [ DONATE NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120237453/585660913/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.29_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGJhYWU2My02ZGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=al5p0N9y_bTBPNTBvkOXIYOgAXnlW7fjp3iT_5_Jx1A=)
---
Annie is a pediatrician, a mom, and a fighter. She doesn’t owe anything to the Washington establishment. She’s running because she knows firsthand what’s at stake for our communities, and because she’s had enough of Graham’s weakness and corruption.

But Annie can’t do this alone. Defeating a 30-year incumbent backed by billionaires takes serious resources and grassroots power.

[**_So I’m asking you directly: Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to join me in this fight and help Annie Andrews and Maggie Hassan hit their fundraising goals? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120237459/585660918/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.29_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGJhYWU2My02ZGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=al5p0N9y_bTBPNTBvkOXIYOgAXnlW7fjp3iT_5_Jx1A=)

George Conway

clean_body: = It’s George Conway. I’ve spent years calling out Donald Trump, the Republican Party, and their enablers! And if there’s one man who embodies political cowardice more than anyone else, it’s Lindsey Graham. Here’s the truth: Lindsey Graham is as spineless as they come. I watched him go from calling Trump a “kook” who was “unfit for office” to becoming Trump’s most loyal lapdog in the Senate. Which is even offensive to dogs because unlike Lindsey Graham they actually have spines. Lindsey twists himself into whatever shape necessary to kiss Trump’s 🫏. It’s pathetic. And it’s dangerous. South Carolina needs a Senator with a backbone. Someone strong enough to stand up to corruption and special interests to put our communities first. That’s why I’m supporting Dr. Annie Andrews, and I’m asking you to support her campaign today too. | | = Annie is a pediatrician, a mom, and a fighter. She doesn’t owe anything to the Washington establishment. She’s running because she knows firsthand what’s at stake for our communities, and because she’s had enough of Graham’s weakness and corruption. But Annie can’t do this alone. Defeating a 30-year incumbent backed by billionaires takes serious resources and grassroots power. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Annie Andrews and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Lindsey Graham sold his soul for power. Annie Andrews is in this fight to give power back to the people of South Carolina. That’s a trade I’ll take any day. Let’s get this done. George Conway If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Tony Johnson
subject: The fight against Antifa just got real
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/e1e91736d2b24ac893b11afa4be1fbde-cc3c56829a7f46cbad579b614e2de710/63)
---
| |

---
|

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Enough is enough. I’m glad to see the Trump administration is taking action to combat the rising tide of left-wing violence in America.

After years of witnessing Antifa members incite and commit violence against innocent people, attack law enforcement officials, and torch federal and private property, President Trump officially designated Antifa as a domestic terrorist organization.

This is a move The Heritage Foundation’s scholars have promoted since 2019. It will prioritize attention and federal resources on Antifa and provide tools for stopping the funding that allows Antifa to operate.

Antifa is not just “a set of ideas.” It is an organization with a logo, trained activists, funding, and uses pre-made signs and pre-gathered vehicles, gear, and projectiles.

This is a great first step. But there is even more President Trump can do to protect Americans from leftist violence.

The Heritage Foundation is urging the FBI to designate Transgender Ideology-Inspired Violent Extremism (TIVE) as domestic terrorism, following a string of attacks by trans or trans-supporting criminals.

Especially in the aftermath of the Charlie Kirk assassination, this action is long overdue.

If you want to help erase the threat of Antifa, please consider activating your Heritage Foundation membership today.

Your tax-deductible gift will help create and promote public policies that will help defeat the threat of violence from Antifa and transgender extremism.

**It just takes a moment. Click the secure link below to activate your membership today:**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/activate-2/**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/e1e91736d2b24ac893b11afa4be1fbde-cc3c56829a7f46cbad579b614e2de710/63)

Thank you for your dedication to protecting our country.

Best,

Tony Johnson
Director of Membership

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

---

---

Peter,

Tomorrow is one of my last fundraising deadlines before the midterm election year, and the stakes are increasing fast.

Here are two reasons why I’m counting on your continued support:
1. The passage of Proposition 50 was a resounding win for our democracy, but it also adds tens of thousands of new voters to my district. We need to end the year with strength to have the tools we need to reach these voters who have never seen my name on the ballot or heard my story and what I’m about.

2. While Prop 50 makes many Democratic-held seats safer, CA-27 is still listed by _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ as one of the most competitive nationwide. With that label comes an increase in Republican attacks -- I’ve already faced baseless lies from the NRCC, and outside spending is almost guaranteed to increase in the new year.

Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

Null – we didn't think we'd be so far off our goal with less than 24 hours to go before our end-of-month deadline. But we need to be completely blunt with you: _**Falling short is not an option.**_
Haley Stevens is fighting with everything she has to win Michigan's Senate race, because it's the only way Democrats can hope to take back the Senate. But right now, our Trump-backed opponent Mike Rogers has more cash on hand than he did at this point in the race last time around.

And remember, last time, national Republicans spent nearly $80 million trying to elect Mike Rogers – only to lose by just 0.34%. This time, all signs are pointing to them spending even more, especially with polling statistically tied among the independent voters who will decide this election.

**That's why we are sending you an urgent call to action:[_Rush a donation of $5 or more to help Democrat Haley Stevens hit her end-of-month fundraising goal. Every dollar we raise will help us compete against huge amounts of GOP money to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats._](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9909?t=3&akid=1510%2E49239%2EYghkL-)**

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9913?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1510%2E49239%2EYghkL-) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9908?t=9&akid=1510%2E49239%2EYghkL-)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Colorado needs us this week
body:
We can’t publish our next report without your help.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | Peter,
I’ll keep this short because we’re in the final stretch.
Rocky Mountain Voice is just **$3,750 away** from hitting our November **end-of-month goal** , the level we need to keep publishing the stories the political establishment hopes you never see.
If you believe Colorado deserves watchdog journalism that actually tells the truth.. **[Chip in $10, $25, or $50 today to help us close the gap →](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
This month alone, our team has been digging into:
* The actions of our representatives in Washington
* Free speech in our school districts
* Where tax dollars are being wasted
* And the issues real Colorado families are worried about, not the ones the legacy media fixates on

But here’s the reality: **we can’t release the next round of reporting unless we meet our budget for the month.** We run lean, and every dollar goes directly toward research, writing, and getting these stories in front of the public.
That’s why I’m asking you,Peter, for your help right now.
**[If just 150 readers chip in this week, we’ll hit our goal. Can you be one of them?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[Give here →](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
Colorado needs a voice that stands up, tells the truth, and doesn’t back down. Thank you for being part of this movement.
— Heidi Ganahl
_President, The Rocky Mountain Voice_

name: Rob Bonta (personal)
subject: I’m asking you for help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
I want to share a bit about my personal life that you may not know yet.
I was raised by social justice warriors — decades before that term existed!
My dad marched for civil rights in Selma, Alabama where he heard Martin Luther King Jr. preach. My mom, born and raised in the Philippines, spent years fighting for the restoration of democracy in her home country.
My parents had me while living and working in the Philippines as social justice missionaries. I was born as a dictator was rising to power and martial law was imminent.
It was critical to both of my parents that I grow up in a country with democracy, freedom, rule of law, and human and civil rights — and sadly it became clear to them that wasn’t the case in the Philippines. So they brought my family here, to California, when I was just two months old.
A short while later, my parents began working with the United Farm Workers of America—fighting for workers’ rights, fair pay, and shade and water breaks alongside Dolores Huerta, Cesar Chavez, and Philip Vera Cruz.
I would never have guessed as a young kid that I would grow up to serve as the Attorney General of California — but as long as I can remember, I’ve known that I wanted to fight for those most vulnerable to have a fair shot at the California Dream.
That’s why I do this work. I know, without a doubt, that the California Dream is alive and well because I’m living mine — and I’m committed to using every bit of platform and power I have to lift people up and fight for justice for all.
I want nothing more than to continue this fight.
California needs leaders who will stand up to those who abuse their power — whether it’s corrupt politicians, corporate polluters, extremist groups trying to roll back our rights, or powerful interests that exploit workers, cheat consumers, and put profits ahead of people.
So I’m asking you for help: Will you donate to my re-election campaign before our November end-of-month deadline? Every single donation helps us build a stronger grassroots movement to protect our freedoms. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=25] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=100] DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=250]
DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=500] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Thanks very much for your support. It means a lot to me to have you on this team.
—Rob
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
To contribute via check, please address to:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Thank you for supporting Rob Bonta. Grassroots supporters like you help us protect California’s working families, advance criminal justice reform, and keep our communities safe. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to protect and serve the people of California, we need you with us every step of the way.
If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, click unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tsXL_NR2qEmgRRek5GtgsA2?unsubscribedata=qnNRIcYRo%2BK8%2FarsciyEFrlWAXN3By4r4cLQRvZ1Xtshz9RglJubIxdIRULFzy2l0Iyu%2BXgGKc7d2%2Brv9SElgwz60ntzZq9FM%2BvSXTlotnSiVZ2cbsQJkRrKC2mMGFyexYE5moHBwjXCtYJLWeG8fjLqn5SHxFCZMsXt5gF9ZPwRUvnE9Lj6%2FSk8M5EgVQnrORcdAqGWLuqZ05iGkwPWZVXKbf3t9%2FBqlv1xroBpy%2BQ%2BF4AGFWd1yQe%2Be7f1HaH2ibvj8WgLRtTPFkrTNgpsUISmYZU5DNBwrwxRtaLSNAR%2F3E8XSew2DqNRIQUj4EKl5dQYTGvu3J9jiunrBRb%2FaM83YTgV2O1nONTKNgn544c6yrWFfDo2ZYEKghrpAfW6FNby6XbePTggtVzXZHyXiAKH6algSIfqDIQuGir5yuawU2Ozu4THnCijdVW9wiV9 .
From all of us at Team Bonta, thank you for your support!

name: Alia K.
subject: I wanted to check in with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1381%2E251025%2ESh_k0R ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1381%2E251025%2ESh_k0R ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi Peter, it’s Alia, Abdul’s Deputy Campaign Manager.

Now that we’re back from the Thanksgiving holiday, I wanted to check in
with you.

As we prepare to close out the last quarter of the year, we’re finalizing
plans for early 2026.

The most important thing for you to know is that if we don’t hit our
fundraising goals, I may have to make some tough decisions — the kind that
really affect whether we can win this competitive primary. Things like:

* Scaling back our organizing plan
* Cutting down the number of ads we can run
* Re-thinking how many more events we can put on the calendar

Those aren’t theoretical trade-offs,
Peter. They’re real choices we
have to make. And in a race this close, every one of them could cost us
the margin we need to win.

That’s why I have an ask for you, depending on whatever you’re comfortable
with:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/543?c0=em-ms-aes-20251129-2-ak.VYnEIB&amount=10&refcode=em20251129-1369&t=1011&akid=1381%2E251025%2ESh_k0R ]If you can afford it, please consider starting a monthly recurring
contribution. This is a HUGE help as it gives us a predictable source of
support each month.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251129-2-ak.DDU_xc&amount=10&refcode=em20251129-1369&t=1012&akid=1381%2E251025%2ESh_k0R ]If you’re able to support our campaign with a one-time contribution,
that’s still impactful. Every donation, even $1, gets us one step closer
to victory.

We’re up against a candidate backed by AIPAC and corporate PACs, who can
write huge checks without batting an eye.

Our campaign, on the other hand, is 100% powered by people like you. So if
you can pitch in anything before the month is over, it’ll help us hit the
ground running in 2026:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/543?c0=em-ms-aes-20251129-2-ak.VYnEIB&amount=10&refcode=em20251129-1369&t=1013&akid=1381%2E251025%2ESh_k0R ]Donate monthly ››

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251129-2-ak.DDU_xc&amount=10&refcode=em20251129-1369&t=1014&akid=1381%2E251025%2ESh_k0R ]Donate once ››

Thank you, truly, for being part of this team. 💙

Alia
Deputy Campaign Manager

clean_body: [ ]Abdul for US Senate [ ]Abdul for US Senate Hi Peter, it’s Alia, Abdul’s Deputy Campaign Manager. Now that we’re back from the Thanksgiving holiday, I wanted to check in with you. As we prepare to close out the last quarter of the year, we’re finalizing plans for early 2026. The most important thing for you to know is that if we don’t hit our fundraising goals, I may have to make some tough decisions — the kind that really affect whether we can win this competitive primary. Things like: Scaling back our organizing plan Cutting down the number of ads we can run * Re-thinking how many more events we can put on the calendar Those aren’t theoretical trade-offs, Peter. They’re real choices we have to make. And in a race this close, every one of them could cost us the margin we need to win. That’s why I have an ask for you, depending on whatever you’re comfortable with: [ ]If you can afford it, please consider starting a monthly recurring contribution. This is a HUGE help as it gives us a predictable source of support each month. [ ]If you’re able to support our campaign with a one-time contribution, that’s still impactful. Every donation, even $1, gets us one step closer to victory. We’re up against a candidate backed by AIPAC and corporate PACs, who can write huge checks without batting an eye. Our campaign, on the other hand, is 100% powered by people like you. So if you can pitch in anything before the month is over, it’ll help us hit the ground running in 2026: [ ]Donate monthly ›› [ ]Donate once ›› Thank you, truly, for being part of this team. 💙 Alia Deputy Campaign Manager

body:

They know John James is rising.
They know Michigan is shifting under their feet. **If we miss the $25K target, they will claim the headline was hype. * * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Seth for Massachusetts
subject: Too many in Washington stay quiet.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
Seth won’t.

| |
---
Hey there, As we head into the end of the month, Seth’s been doing something too many people in Washington avoid: telling the truth about what’s not working. He’s tired of the status quo that shrugs at families being priced out, ignores corruption, and relies on the same outdated playbook while people struggle. That’s not leadership, it’s complacency. So instead of staying quiet, Seth has been speaking up, pushing back, and showing up everywhere he can. From hearing students at UMass Amherst talk about affordability, to meeting families in Western Mass, to volunteering at a food pantry. He’s listening to the people Washington keeps overlooking. Because if we want something better, we need leaders willing to call out what’s broken and fight to fix it. clean_body: Seth won’t. | | Hey there, As we head into the end of the month, Seth’s been doing something too many people in Washington avoid: telling the truth about what’s not working. He’s tired of the status quo that shrugs at families being priced out, ignores corruption, and relies on the same outdated playbook while people struggle. That’s not leadership, it’s complacency. So instead of staying quiet, Seth has been speaking up, pushing back, and showing up everywhere he can. From hearing students at UMass Amherst talk about affordability, to meeting families in Western Mass, to volunteering at a food pantry. He’s listening to the people Washington keeps overlooking. Because if we want something better, we need leaders willing to call out what’s broken and fight to fix it. And with just one day left in November, we need to show that this campaign has the momentum to challenge the old way of doing things and build something better. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Sununu could flip this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
The GOP sees this race as their best opportunity to flip a seat in 2026.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251129_3_warren.ACvesm&refcode=em20251129-3&t=1&akid=3771%2E582294%2EXlCjfM)
I know what it’s like to run against a Republican with high name ID and a national donor network behind him — I’ve done it before. And I won.
Now, Chris Pappas is facing the same kind of threat in New Hampshire. National Republicans managed to recruit former Senator John Sununu into the race — and the latest polling shows it’s already a statistical dead heat.
Look, if Sununu flips New Hampshire’s Senate seat, Democrats have next to no chance at retaking the Senate majority in 2026.
**[That’s why I’m in this fight with everything I’ve got. And why I’m asking you to please pitch in $5 right now to help Chris Pappas stand up to big-money Republicans and win.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251129_3_warren.ACvesm&refcode=em20251129-3&t=2&akid=3771%2E582294%2EXlCjfM)**
**[Donate $5 to support Chris Pappas »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251129_3_warren.3dIibh&refcode=em20251129-3&t=3&akid=3771%2E582294%2EXlCjfM)**
Chris is a Granite Stater through and through. He’s not in this for power or prestige or to cozy up to billionaires. _He’s in it to make life better for working families — the folks who get up every day, work hard, and are struggling to get by._ He’s fought Big Pharma to lower prescription drug prices, stood up for veterans, and protected reproductive rights when they’ve been under relentless attack.
Chris Pappas fights for the people — not the wealthy and well-connected. He shows up, he listens, and he gets things done. That’s what New Hampshire needs, and it’s what working people across the country need.
**But Republicans know New Hampshire is one of their best shots at flipping a seat in 2026.** Sununu has the name recognition, the right-wing billionaire network, and the full weight of the national GOP behind him.
We’ve seen this before. Special interests will flood races with corporate money and try to buy Senators who will work for them instead of their constituents. We can’t let this happen.
**If you believe, like I do, that government ought to work for working people — not the rich and powerful —[then I’m asking you to please chip in to Chris’s campaign now to help him compete and win.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251129_3_warren.ACvesm&refcode=em20251129-3&t=4&akid=3771%2E582294%2EXlCjfM)**
I know Chris has what it takes to win this race. But we all need to make sure he has the resources to fight back against this massive right-wing spending.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251129-3&t=5&refcode2=3771_582294_XlCjfM&akid=3771%2E582294%2EXlCjfM)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=6&akid=3771%2E582294%2EXlCjfM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=7&akid=3771%2E582294%2EXlCjfM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=3771%2E582294%2EXlCjfM)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

| Before anything else, I want to say thank you. You’re the reason this grassroots campaign is as strong as it is, and I never take that for granted.

I know your inbox is full — so the fact that you choose to open my emails truly means something.

There’s a lot at stake. Republican megadonors are flooding key districts with cash, and their committees are sitting on massive war chests. Their strategy is simple: Overwhelm us with dark money so they can push a dangerous agenda that doesn’t reflect the values of West Michigan.

We don’t have the luxury of matching their billionaire networks. What we do have is a powerful community of people who believe in honesty, decency, and a government that works for families.

If we want to keep this seat blue and protect our House majority, we have to show we’re ready to fight back together.

[_**Can you make a contribution today to help us stay competitive and prove that grassroots voices can beat Republican money?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120238787/585665091/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-11-29_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjVmM2Q1NC03NmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=veorONrYEZJrqBctZCn57Sv8kA7ix97JFdJh2DEZve0=)

clean_body: You’re the reason this grassroots campaign is as strong as it is, and I never take that for granted. | = | Before anything else, I want to say thank you. You’re the reason this grassroots campaign is as strong as it is, and I never take that for granted. I know your inbox is full — so the fact that you choose to open my emails truly means something. There’s a lot at stake. Republican megadonors are flooding key districts with cash, and their committees are sitting on massive war chests. Their strategy is simple: Overwhelm us with dark money so they can push a dangerous agenda that doesn’t reflect the values of West Michigan. We don’t have the luxury of matching their billionaire networks. What we do have is a powerful community of people who believe in honesty, decency, and a government that works for families. If we want to keep this seat blue and protect our House majority, we have to show we’re ready to fight back together. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. 🩷 – Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Our fight doesn’t take breaks, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re still $4,000 short. Can you help close the gap?
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251129-5652-footer&t=1&akid=5652%2E420207%2E3Aik67)
Hey Peter,
**🚨 We’re in the final 24 hours of our end-of-month fundraising push — and we’re still $4,000 short of reaching our $33,000 goal. 🚨**
We’ve made real progress, but we still haven’t fully bounced back from the holiday fundraising dip. That’s why we’re counting on every supporter reading this to step up right now and help close the gap before it’s too late.
**[If you’re in a position to, can you please pitch in $3 before midnight tomorrow to keep Pramila and this movement operating at full strength?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251129-2.rEC3-C&refcode=em20251129-5652&amount=3&t=2&akid=5652%2E420207%2E3Aik67)**
**[DONATE](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251129-2.rEC3-C&amount=3&refcode=em20251129-5652&t=3&akid=5652%2E420207%2E3Aik67)**
We know this is the season for rest and spending time with loved ones, and we hope you’ve had a chance to recharge this week. **But unfortunately, this work doesn’t take breaks — and neither do MAGA extremists.**
While most people were offline over the holiday, Republicans stayed busy stacking resources, ramping up their cruelty, and laying the groundwork for their next attack on working people:**letting health care subsidies expire on December 31.**
Pramila will be on the front line when Congress returns Monday, fighting to protect millions from losing coverage or facing skyrocketing costs. But because she relies 100% on grassroots support — not corporate PACs — we need to show up now and keep her laser‐focused on _legislating_ , not scrambling to fundraise.
Because this isn’t just about hitting a number. It’s about defending health care, stopping GOP cruelty, organizing against authoritarianism, and flipping the House in 2026 so working people finally win, _not_ billionaires.
And it’s about showing that the momentum we built at the ballot box earlier this month was _only the beginning_. If we let up now, MAGA will seize the moment. Let’s make sure they don’t.
With so many supporters offline, your support has never been more important, Peter. [**If you can, please chip in before tomorrow night to close the gap and keep this people-powered movement fighting at full strength.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251129-2.rEC3-C&refcode=em20251129-5652&amount=3&t=4&akid=5652%2E420207%2E3Aik67)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251129-2.rEC3-C&amount=3&refcode=em20251129-5652&t=23&akid=5652%2E420207%2E3Aik67)**
Thank you for your support.
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251129-5652-footer&t=24&refcode2=5652_420207_3Aik67&akid=5652%2E420207%2E3Aik67)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:

name: Team Husted
subject: A quick note + small ask of you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Husted for Senate
body:
As we head into the holiday season, our team has been reflecting on just how much Senator Husted has done since stepping in to serve.

Friend, we promise this will be quick!
Our team has been reflecting on just how much Senator Husted has done since stepping in to serve.
When he was sworn in to replace Vice President J.D. Vance in the Senate, he didn’t hesitate for a single moment. He jumped in with both feet, committed to doing everything in his power to support our communities, stand up for what’s right, and deliver results when they were needed most:
– Closing our borders
– Lowering your taxes– Gutting waste, fraud, and abuse in D.C.– Reopening our government– Restoring faith in America
...And so much more.
He’s done all of this without ever asking for anything in return.
[SUPPORT JON HUSTED
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byhG/?__vbtrk=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
That’s why we want to take a moment to show him just how grateful we are. It’s the very least we can do for someone who dropped everything and answered a call to serve our country with integrity and heart.
[So in the spirit of the season, we set an internal team goal to raise $10,000 as a way to say thank you and ensure he has the support he needs to keep going strong.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byhG/?__vbtrk=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
So here’s our simple ask:
Would you be willing to spare just five or ten dollars today?
[SUPPORT JON HUSTED
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byhG/?__vbtrk=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Every bit brings us one step closer to showing our gratitude in a meaningful way.
[If you’re able, please chip in today to help us reach the finish line. Your support truly makes a difference.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byhG/?__vbtrk=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Thank you so much for standing with us.
– Team Husted
|
---
|
---
| Paid for by Husted for Senate
---

P.O. Box 6290
Columbus, OH 43206

[Privacy Policy](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byhH/?__vbtrk=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1OTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Cate (Team Walz)
subject: I noticed something in your donor file, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
Can I show you something?
#
Hey, Peter! It’s Cate. I’m the Finance Director here at Tim Walz HQ.
**I just finished reviewing the list of folks who’ve contributed to Tim’s reelection campaign so far in November, and I noticed that your name isn’t on the list yet.**
So I wanted to reach out personally to ask if you can **[make a contribution of any amount before we close out this month. Anything you can chip in would make a big difference as we strive towards our November goal.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251129_3.WwhONd&amount=5&refcode=em20251129-196&t=1&akid=196%2E34582%2EZtq3LP)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251129_3.WwhONd&amount=5&refcode=20251129-196&t=2&akid=196%2E34582%2EZtq3LP)**
Honestly, the team and I are getting a bit nervous about where we stand in our progress to this month’s fundraising goal.
Coming up short could mean having to _make cuts to our programs_ at a time when more and more Republicans are jumping into the race to try to defeat Tim and flip Minnesota red.
I know how deeply you care about reelecting Tim, so I thought I’d show you exactly what I see in your file for the month, then **[ask you to pitch in before our deadline if your budget allows for it.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251129_3.WwhONd&amount=5&refcode=em20251129-196&t=3&akid=196%2E34582%2EZtq3LP)**
**Peter's November Supporter Record** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**November Donor:** Not yet!
**Suggested Donation:** $5 **[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251129_3.WwhONd&amount=5&refcode=20251129-196&t=4&akid=196%2E34582%2EZtq3LP)**
---
Thank you for all you’ve done for the campaign so far, and for standing by Tim in big moments like this one.
Thankfully yours,
Cate Paterson
Finance Director
Tim Walz for Governor

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251129-196&t=5&refcode2=196_34582_Ztq3LP&akid=196%2E34582%2EZtq3LP)**

body:
$10. That’s the donation I’m asking you to split between me and New Dems before our End of Month Deadline.

| **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120239309/585666918/-325789208?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20251129_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTFlODg0My03OWNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P7gwQCJxVcCZP8q51FgB6g768k-zsp86XMiGHH19CAo=)** $10.

That’s the donation I’m asking you to split between me and New Dems before our End of Month Deadline. That’s not a typo – **just $10.**

$10 to **COUNTER** the GOP’s scheme to rig the midterm election.

$10 to **EXPOSE** Donald Trump’s plan to ban mail-in voting and suppress our voices.

$10 to **ENSURE** voters know Republicans refused to fix the healthcare crisis they caused.

I know a $10 donation might seem small compared to Team Extreme’s piles of cash, but $10 from each of our grassroots supporters will allow us to:

**→** compete with extreme MAGA Republican fraudsters
→ ensure our message reaches every critical voter

We could not have protected the 2020 election results without Fair Fight’s pro-voter work. Their leadership in the past few election cycles has been critical for our democracy.
And now I’m working with Fair Fight to raise the alarm about a new threat to free and fair elections.

The Supreme Court is considering striking down a key plank of the Voting Rights Act. They could allow for the dismantling of congressional district maps that give people of color fair opportunities to elect the candidates of their choice. And that ruling could give Donald Trump and the GOP enough additional seats to lock in their party’s control of the House for a generation.
This all started when the Supreme Court took the extremely unusual step of rehearing a case that had covered narrower legal ground, giving them an opportunity to issue a more sweeping decision. The last time I can recall the Court rehearing an election-related case? Citizens United, which, of course, unleashed unlimited corporate money into our elections.
The timing of this case also reminds me of how the Court handled Citizens United. Usually, landmark rulings — like this one is poised to be — come in June. But the Court announced its Citizens United ruling in January 2010 — at the beginning of an election year. Now, it seems very likely that the Court’s ruling in this case could come by this January, giving Republican-run states enough time to gerrymander new maps ahead of the 2026 elections.
**Rigging control of the U.S. House is just one piece of Trump’s plans to attempt an autocratic takeover. **
It goes hand in hand with the voter suppression policies Republicans are enacting around the country. We could also see the Trump Regime deploying troops to more and more cities by the time voting starts — even using troops to close streets around certain polling places, resulting in longer lines and preventing communities from making their voices heard.
**Fair Fight is pushing back against this anti-democracy agenda by calling the nation’s attention to the damage the Supreme Court may inflict on our democracy, exposing and preventing voter suppression, making sure voters have the information they need to get to the ballot box, helping elect voting rights champions, and organizing against the rise of authoritarianism. **
**[So I’m asking if you can help ensure the strength and survival of our democracy by donating to Fair Fight today. Your support makes it possible to stay vigilant against new threats, and that’s only becoming more and more critical as MAGA escalates their attempts to undermine free and fair elections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120239332/585666970/-413138639?refcode=emm_ff_20251129_T1_MarcEliasLiftNote_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThiMjlhZi03OWNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fbWJjbg3pWaAv4JQUya56IgDMZxSWc7hBT_kzoqYzR8=) **
Thank you for everything you do as a member of this movement. It all adds up, and when we stick together for these fights, we win.
Marc Elias

clean_body: Keep reading for the full story | | | We wanted to make sure you saw this note from Marc Elias. He explained a rare step that the Supreme Court just took, the sweeping consequences it may have for our democracy, and how we can fight back for free and fair elections. Keep reading for the full story — = In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team | = \--------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------- From: Marc Elias (via Fair Fight) Subject: Flashback to Citizens United Hey** there, it’s Marc Elias. When Donald Trump and his allies filed a flurry of lawsuits to try to overturn the 2020 presidential elections, I took them to court again and again, winning 64 cases to uphold the will of the people. We could not have protected the 2020 election results without Fair Fight’s pro-voter work. Their leadership in the past few election cycles has been critical for our democracy. And now I’m working with Fair Fight to raise the alarm about a new threat to free and fair elections. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- The Supreme Court is considering striking down a key plank of the Voting Rights Act. They could allow for the dismantling of congressional district maps that give people of color fair opportunities to elect the candidates of their choice. And that ruling could give Donald Trump and the GOP enough additional seats to lock in their party’s control of the House for a generation. This all started when the Supreme Court took the extremely unusual step of rehearing a case that had covered narrower legal ground, giving them an opportunity to issue a more sweeping decision. The last time I can recall the Court rehearing an election-related case? Citizens United, which, of course, unleashed unlimited corporate money into our elections. The timing of this case also reminds me of how the Court handled Citizens United. Usually, landmark rulings — like this one is poised to be — come in June. But the Court announced its Citizens United ruling in January 2010 — at the beginning of an election year. Now, it seems very likely that the Court’s ruling in this case could come by this January, giving Republican-run states enough time to gerrymander new maps ahead of the 2026 elections. Rigging control of the U.S. House is just one piece of Trump’s plans to attempt an autocratic takeover. It goes hand in hand with the voter suppression policies Republicans are enacting around the country. We could also see the Trump Regime deploying troops to more and more cities by the time voting starts — even using troops to close streets around certain polling places, resulting in longer lines and preventing communities from making their voices heard. Fair Fight is pushing back against this anti-democracy agenda by calling the nation’s attention to the damage the Supreme Court may inflict on our democracy, exposing and preventing voter suppression, making sure voters have the information they need to get to the ballot box, helping elect voting rights champions, and organizing against the rise of authoritarianism. = Thank you for everything you do as a member of this movement. It all adds up, and when we stick together for these fights, we win. Marc Elias = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff929e36-6fc8-45c8-95ce-7b88f60f6709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff929e36-6fc8-45c8-95ce-7b88f60f6709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**by Cliff Schecter**_
I exited the suburban movie theater last night, pondering the powerful portrayal of The Nuremberg Trials I'd just witnessed in the film "Nuremberg" (side note: Russell Crowe is spellbinding as Hermann Goring).
A reminder of when the world--or at least what was left of it--dragged itself out of the rubble, looked at the mass murder and destruction on an industrial scale it had just survived, and said: _Never again._
Not "never again, unless the former back-up weekend Fox-bro turned bantam-weight, Secretary of _Defense_ Pete Hegseth felt like committing a war crime." Not "never again, unless murdering other humans breaks Trump out of his deep slumber of dementia and misdirects Americans from the Epstein Files."
No, it was quite simply: **never again.**
The Allies built an entire system of law around that idea. Forged wholly new international law and a new international culture of cooperation. It was as radical a break with the past as the Declaration of Independence or Emancipation Proclamation, and as beneficial to the world.
(This, btw, is the entire architecture--the last 75 years, that Putin wants to destroy with all his various attacks on the West. For pretty obvious reasons.)
They created the Geneva Conventions. The UN, the World Bank, NATO, and more, [a new architecture of peace and cooperation](https://substack.com/redirect/d4d5101e-b6b6-4e43-a374-a4f1a7cd42d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to help prevent countless deaths, destruction, and ease the suffering of many struggling peoples around the world.
They made war crimes prosecutable. They established the principle that even the worst monsters deserve a trial, because restraint is what separates civilization from the abyss.
We didn't shoot defeated Nazis in the streets or line them up against a wall. We didn't dump them in a ditch. As you can imagine, there was sentiment among Allied bigwigs to do just that. Yet, political, legal, humanist, religious, and philosophical voices realized the opportunity they had.
_We were not the Nazis; we should not act like the Nazis._
So we dragged these Nazis into court. We made them answer for it--**in public.** With evidence. With rules. With humanity. So not it wasn't just never again. It was never again, _because next time we 'll_ _possess the precedent for prosecution, and you will be judged_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22397dbc-1ec7-4259-b207-f4627842d0a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff929e36-6fc8-45c8-95ce-7b88f60f6709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
United States Supreme Court Justice Robert Jackson, on leave from America's highest court to be the lead American prosecutor at Nuremberg, said it plainly:
> **" We must never forget that the record on which we judge these defendants today is the record on which history will judge us tomorrow."**
And then--because the universe enjoys a sick joke, and what is the Trump Administration but that--I woke up this morning to learn Pete Hegseth ordered the bombing of boats **after** they were disabled. With survivors still inside.
Let me translate from _Fox Male Small Dick_ to English: **[Pete Hegseth admitted to blowing human beings into pieces who posed no threat](https://substack.com/redirect/81d20e0c-65d3-4ef2-8017-2a1bb4f134d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **Our cut-rate, frat-rat, dumb-bro Christian Nationalist masquerading as a serious government official.
**In this equation, he 's not Robert Jackson. He's Hermann Goring.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22397dbc-1ec7-4259-b207-f4627842d0a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That [this whiskey-soaked sod not only illegally bombed the boat](https://substack.com/redirect/81d20e0c-65d3-4ef2-8017-2a1bb4f134d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--as he has many others--but ordered the commander to attack a second time by saying _" kill them all" _should be revolting to any civilized human being.
But it's not "tough." And it's not "war." It's page one, paragraph one of the "Here's a War Crime" handbook.
I ask you to think about this for a second: Robert Jackson, Harry Truman, Dwight Eisenhower, whomever you want to credit (and their British and French equivalents) captured men who exterminated over 12 million civilians in camps, tens of millions more in a war of aggression.
They wished for a more civilized world so they tried the monsters in a court of law. Hegseth saw a boat with (maybe?) drug smugglers and couldn't be bothered to capture or try them. Then when he had the same success rate with bombing as he's had using Signal, he went back again to ensure the slaughter.
This is why "Nuremberg" is not just some historical footnote with men in gray suits. It is a film about the moment the world stopped and decided: **civilization doesn 't survive if we let murder become policy. And if we don't constantly enforce it, there will always be more Pete Hegseths.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff929e36-6fc8-45c8-95ce-7b88f60f6709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff929e36-6fc8-45c8-95ce-7b88f60f6709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Adam Kinzinger, former U.S. Rep and Air Force veteran, and someone who's actually been shot at unlike a certain former Fox host whose mother hates him, didn't mince words.
> **" Pete Hegseth is admitting to a war crime."**
Not implying. Not suggesting. **Admitting.**
And whichever military official obeyed Hague-seth and broke international law with that second lethal attack--or in Nuremberg parlance, lined the Nazis up against the wall, sans trial, and shot them all--may wanna talk to a lawyer.
This is exactly the kind of order those six Democrats [who caused Trump to fetch his second Depends of the morning](https://substack.com/redirect/0e8fea7c-3d6b-4762-ba1d-ff1ce3fdb270?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) were saying you refuse. And what Justice Robert Jackson warned about during the Nuremberg Trials:
> **" The common sense of mankind demands that law shall not stop with the punishment of petty crimes by little people."**
And what's clear from their own words, is **it wasn 't a slip, or a misremembered moment in the fog of war. This was branding. **And precisely the conduct the Geneva Conventions were drafted to prohibit.
This is how nations begin normalizing atrocity. As the Tribunal wrote:
> **" Crimes against international law are committed by men, not by abstract entities, and only by punishing individuals who commit such crimes can the provisions of international law be enforced."**
The Nuremberg Charter specifically mentions **" Violence against persons on the seas... killing of shipwrecked survivors.." **Awkward, Pete-y, _I think they 're talking about you._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22397dbc-1ec7-4259-b207-f4627842d0a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Whether a general, a foot soldier, a cable-news influencer, or some a-hole in over his double-digit IQ-mixed-with-sweet-vermouth head, thinking he's an 80s action hero doing 50 pull-ups for the cameras (which he couldn't finish, lol)...
**The law is the law. And a war crime is still a war crime, pal.**
* * *
## **Call to Action: Investigate Pete Hegseth Now**
If the United States still believes in:
-- the rule of law
-- military honor
-- the Geneva Conventions
-- anything we said we stood for after 1945
[Then Pete Hegseth's confession cannot simply be ignored because...Trump feels like it.](https://substack.com/redirect/81d20e0c-65d3-4ef2-8017-2a1bb4f134d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
America's veterans deserve the reassurance laws they fought under mean something. Americans need to know _we still live under laws_. War crimes don't stop being war crimes because a roid-raged bro-sef is a mook who brags about it under klieg lights.
**If Nuremberg meant** _**anything**_**, Pete Hegseth didn 't confess to a controversial opinion. He confessed to a goddamn crime. **All four of the Nazis were charged with: Conspiracy, Crimes Against Peace, War Crimes, and Crimes Against Humanity.
Pretending otherwise would be the real disgrace.

clean_body: From Nuremberg to Trumpworld, Cliff Schecter dismantles the toxic normalization of atrocity -- and demands the accountability our heroes fought for. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? From Nuremberg to Trumpworld, Cliff Schecter dismantles the toxic normalization of atrocity -- and demands the accountability our heroes fought for. | | and | Nov 29 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- by Cliff Schecter I exited the suburban movie theater last night, pondering the powerful portrayal of The Nuremberg Trials I'd just witnessed in the film "Nuremberg" (side note: Russell Crowe is spellbinding as Hermann Goring). A reminder of when the world--or at least what was left of it--dragged itself out of the rubble, looked at the mass murder and destruction on an industrial scale it had just survived, and said: Never again. Not "never again, unless the former back-up weekend Fox-bro turned bantam-weight, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth felt like committing a war crime." Not "never again, unless murdering other humans breaks Trump out of his deep slumber of dementia and misdirects Americans from the Epstein Files." No, it was quite simply: never again. The Allies built an entire system of law around that idea. Forged wholly new international law and a new international culture of cooperation. It was as radical a break with the past as the Declaration of Independence or Emancipation Proclamation, and as beneficial to the world. (This, btw, is the entire architecture--the last 75 years, that Putin wants to destroy with all his various attacks on the West. For pretty obvious reasons.) They created the Geneva Conventions. The UN, the World Bank, NATO, and more, to help prevent countless deaths, destruction, and ease the suffering of many struggling peoples around the world. They made war crimes prosecutable. They established the principle that even the worst monsters deserve a trial, because restraint is what separates civilization from the abyss. We didn't shoot defeated Nazis in the streets or line them up against a wall. We didn't dump them in a ditch. As you can imagine, there was sentiment among Allied bigwigs to do just that. Yet, political, legal, humanist, religious, and philosophical voices realized the opportunity they had. We were not the Nazis; we should not act like the Nazis. So we dragged these Nazis into court. We made them answer for it--in public. With evidence. With rules. With humanity. So not it wasn't just never again. It was never again, because next time we 'll possess the precedent for prosecution, and you will be judged. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- United States Supreme Court Justice Robert Jackson, on leave from America's highest court to be the lead American prosecutor at Nuremberg, said it plainly: " We must never forget that the record on which we judge these defendants today is the record on which history will judge us tomorrow." And then--because the universe enjoys a sick joke, and what is the Trump Administration but that--I woke up this morning to learn Pete Hegseth ordered the bombing of boats after they were disabled. With survivors still inside. Let me translate from Fox Male Small Dick to English: . Our cut-rate, frat-rat, dumb-bro Christian Nationalist masquerading as a serious government official. In this equation, he 's not Robert Jackson. He's Hermann Goring. | | ---|---|--- That he has many others--but ordered the commander to attack a second time by saying " kill them all" should be revolting to any civilized human being. But it's not "tough." And it's not "war." It's page one, paragraph one of the "Here's a War Crime" handbook. I ask you to think about this for a second: Robert Jackson, Harry Truman, Dwight Eisenhower, whomever you want to credit (and their British and French equivalents) captured men who exterminated over 12 million civilians in camps, tens of millions more in a war of aggression. They wished for a more civilized world so they tried the monsters in a court of law. Hegseth saw a boat with (maybe?) drug smugglers and couldn't be bothered to capture or try them. Then when he had the same success rate with bombing as he's had using Signal, he went back again to ensure the slaughter. This is why "Nuremberg" is not just some historical footnote with men in gray suits. It is a film about the moment the world stopped and decided: civilization doesn 't survive if we let murder become policy. And if we don't constantly enforce it, there will always be more Pete Hegseths. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Adam Kinzinger, former U.S. Rep and Air Force veteran, and someone who's actually been shot at unlike a certain former Fox host whose mother hates him, didn't mince words. " Pete Hegseth is admitting to a war crime." Not implying. Not suggesting. Admitting. And whichever military official obeyed Hague-seth and broke international law with that second lethal attack--or in Nuremberg parlance, lined the Nazis up against the wall, sans trial, and shot them all--may wanna talk to a lawyer. This is exactly the kind of order those six Democrats were saying you refuse. And what Justice Robert Jackson warned about during the Nuremberg Trials: " The common sense of mankind demands that law shall not stop with the punishment of petty crimes by little people." And what's clear from their own words, is it wasn 't a slip, or a misremembered moment in the fog of war. This was branding. And precisely the conduct the Geneva Conventions were drafted to prohibit. This is how nations begin normalizing atrocity. As the Tribunal wrote: " Crimes against international law are committed by men, not by abstract entities, and only by punishing individuals who commit such crimes can the provisions of international law be enforced." The Nuremberg Charter specifically mentions " Violence against persons on the seas... killing of shipwrecked survivors.." Awkward, Pete-y, I think they 're talking about you. | | ---|---|--- Whether a general, a foot soldier, a cable-news influencer, or some a-hole in over his double-digit IQ-mixed-with-sweet-vermouth head, thinking he's an 80s action hero doing 50 pull-ups for the cameras (which he couldn't finish, lol)... The law is the law. And a war crime is still a war crime, pal. Call to Action: Investigate Pete Hegseth Now If the United States still believes in: -- the rule of law -- military honor -- the Geneva Conventions -- anything we said we stood for after 1945 America's veterans deserve the reassurance laws they fought under mean something. Americans need to know we still live under laws. War crimes don't stop being war crimes because a roid-raged bro-sef is a mook who brags about it under klieg lights. If Nuremberg meant anything, Pete Hegseth didn 't confess to a controversial opinion. He confessed to a goddamn crime. All four of the Nazis were charged with: Conspiracy, Crimes Against Peace, War Crimes, and Crimes Against Humanity. Pretending otherwise would be the real disgrace. Hey BAM friends! We 're going big in 2026--including branching out to new platforms, like . Help give us a head start and be one of the first to follow us there! | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Reaching out personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hi Peter, it’s Jon.
If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can pitch in here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-nov25**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251129-3-subs&t=1&akid=1178%2E5691347%2ElxN6b4)
Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term.
There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections.
_But I have you, Peter._
Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority.
Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.**
Yes, this election will be tough.
But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.
_Let’s do it again._
So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign today. Here’s the link again: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-nov25**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251129-3-subs&t=2&akid=1178%2E5691347%2ElxN6b4)
Thank you,
Jon

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=1178%2E5691347%2ElxN6b4) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1178%2E5691347%2ElxN6b4) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

Friend,
---
In just a few short days, my grassroots campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul will be forced to close the books once and for all on our very FIRST month of fundraising.
---
_But this is no ordinary deadline..._
---
**It’s a golden opportunity to deal the _FINAL_ _BLOW_ to the most vulnerable governor in America’s struggling reelection campaign! **
---
_**You see, the State of New York unlocks matching funds at a rate of 6-to-1 once a candidate hits the fundraising benchmarks written into state law.**_
---
By CRUSHING this goal, we can take a massive step towards unlocking the **_LEGAL_ _MAXIMUM_** amount of matching funds to FIRE Hochul from office.
---
**I can’t overstate how critical these matching funds are.**
---
Kathy Hochul’s whole campaign strategy revolves around massively outspending us on the airwaves with her and her Democrat allies’ multimillion-dollar ad buys.
---
If we unlock these matching funds, we’ll have the resources we need to cut straight through her lying attacks and put our winning message in front of every New Yorker.
---
_With Hochul’s approval rating already at a RECORD LOW and the polls showing the governor’s race is already within the margin of error, that would be nothing short of catastrophic for the worst governor in America!_
---
**Our path to victory has never been clearer, Friend. But it all depends on unlocking these vital matching funds.**
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the upcoming end-of-month deadline to help WIN the New York governor’s race and unlock a REAL 600% MATCH on grassroots contributions.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Thank you,

Elise Stefanik
